name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: What they call me in Detroit…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
A reminder that I’m never in this fight alone. |
#
---
Hi, folks. You know, in Lansing, they call me governor. But in Detroit... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324703/566651065/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBjY2M2OWMtZmQ4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oPCFZZq7YWDv-fjYQZ08hO_KcFEQfJxUd8ru_YKrxw0=) It’s never been a name I thought about or would have picked, but it’s one I really appreciate. It’s funny, too. To me, Big Gretch is the persona I try to live by — **showing up with joy, grit, and fighting like hell for what I believe in, powered by a whole lot of grassroots energy behind me.** It reminds me that I’m never in this fight alone. Every day, I see people stepping up to power this movement. Like Anthony in Detroit, who gave $10. Or Nancy in Philadelphia, she pitched in $25. Even Susan in Phoenix, who chipped in $5, made a difference. That’s how we build strength. That’s how we take on the big fights. _That’s how we win. _ But here’s the thing. **Our end-of-month deadline is tomorrow, and we’re still short of our fundraising goal for August.** We’ve got big plans for the fall, and if we want to go toe-to-toe with the people trying to drag this country backward, we need to hit that number. **[So I’m asking: Will you bring some Big Gretch Energy to the fight and pitch in before our deadline tomorrow? What matters most isn’t how much you donate — it’s that you’re part of the team.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324706/566651068/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBjY2M2OWMtZmQ4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oPCFZZq7YWDv-fjYQZ08hO_KcFEQfJxUd8ru_YKrxw0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324714/566651072/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDBjY2M2OWMtZmQ4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oPCFZZq7YWDv-fjYQZ08hO_KcFEQfJxUd8ru_YKrxw0=)

body:
| | | [](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c917e933a7184cd1a9d315d0cc4cb348&_e=mKqh57NOdXFZSsBX5JUUYnx74aa2V-Rk9VQMBmAuvdpUzMtWwCO5YEhLUCnTJJcSdjjcsXoqcEoTtGZul8-mhbCd8G7Zl-JscwaDw2gGw3X7Z_9_r2n_sFEp9lYXEDwi14wJTYIoiMvZ8loQHzLAemOZXlXd35xhuBY0J9ZNQFn15bRRwcn0TM7EjXMByIsv1kqI79Nc0lqr9YcDqj0_sJwcbJhZbup8jad1jRLJVON67ohCIeAjUm12fHcd9i5cvjVOwXCtbFWRhtIgJ8XggRJikQw4YE5sLz6tXvVYUMe_XU0tx1QXlnMjinKTn0v6RlXbRVdAFl4WNKwtZRFeGhoUnJ4utVWlxRwvvY6L-ukHUtR-dWglNr-uuYwA6pSXq-SlKETo1wZpjU2qXT3-ZuNkydlzHIx7KEaAJHkK5bg%3D)

Friend, Every campaign has a moment when it either _**breaks through**_**** or****_**breaks down****.**_ For us, that moment is 24 hours away. **Friend, right now, things aren’t looking good. ** If we hit our goal, we go into September with momentum, strength, and the resources to take on the radical Left. If we fall short, the media will say this:**“John James campaign falters in key swing state.”** The mainstream media already has that line written. They’re ready to publish the obituary of our campaign. **_I will NOT let that happen. _**
---
[ **BE THE DIFFERENCE** ](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c917e933a7184cd1a9d315d0cc4cb348&_e=mKqh57NOdXFZSsBX5JUUYnx74aa2V-Rk9VQMBmAuvdpUzMtWwCO5YEhLUCnTJJcSdjjcsXoqcEoTtGZul8-mhbCd8G7Zl-JscwaDw2gGw3X-1MAxXZhEZaQ1EcgyRe3Kpw8HmfDmDG3H2weKMvykMglaH1EKXrs8yugTP-KAQrGdh-y_k8lAK37c05-0pRhXMGaMxw4pwEQ8F-OdfMtV6x5VDs7MzCh1g5UyKisgq2nwYkMGb7WhtXcXtaPYO2FJdCDWbKO3QhvZSm4bO89ICemD7E-Lmxib10f8zqfSdy8V4IkOptkitE6YVGHfCpKUl3TkcmSt6KLJpHw72ha4zCtpl2eLBYAlqdVTiiz4s_nP0PGsoKy0LrUcNqFsaoqz4_tmrC59yEKe3YwUUxr-DkbYvtnvhvaj_KNDUhtDI2k%3D)
---
But, look – I can’t downplay it. I won’t be able to keep up the fight much longer without your help. **_I need a co-pilot like you on this mission before it’s too late._** Michigan can tip America’s future in favor of freedom or socialism.****[**What we accomplish together in the next 24 hours will decide which way it falls.**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=c917e933a7184cd1a9d315d0cc4cb348&_e=mKqh57NOdXFZSsBX5JUUYnx74aa2V-Rk9VQMBmAuvdpUzMtWwCO5YEhLUCnTJJcSdjjcsXoqcEoTtGZul8-mhbCd8G7Zl-JscwaDw2gGw3XKog72eMTTdXlKqnm6dBpGIsu-RTFEc8dHeH-eqf2nfkfTcv3CPNgR0ppyI98rsUDSVrL7WDrNIc5H9r98I7prlQ7Qly7yt-Z_izP4rf0kWvDEnL6fh7IIJQljgbHjzWQ9twzt31nsCx8RyyxcpADgkSM2Ql9_6Drn4MNK8TeHx6UIuQVTEDzMnrgJqzmlUp0qJ9d7_gMH0zobiZoHG3CN0ahmV3u8Qdg_CUeRlH2wiXFPtm85PtTuAMDQyeuIl-hz0Z8WP1BJ_VlGGDw6B3he8SyhkkzSpDGv6IPTp0yupk2yiT_T7zImzho29a7xHBo%3D)

name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: No sense in waiting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We can't wait for some hero to ride over the hill at full gallop to come save us, folks. It's up to us, our movement, and supporters like you to fight back as vote-suppressors take over the Department of Justice.
Our fundamental right to vote is the most precious resource our democracy has. Please, RUSH $25 or more today to help us defend it in every state across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083025_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
DemDocket: DOJ’s New Top Voting Lawyer Worked for Leading Anti-Voting Law Firm [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083025_3&amount=25]
This seems like something out of a twisted novel, folks, but the new top voting lawyer at the Department of Justice was until recently an attorney and activist for a leading anti-voting legal group that has worked for years to spread fear about unproven illegal voting and press election officials to implement stricter, suppressive voting rules.
The lawyer, Maureen Riordan, worked side-by-side with Cleta Mitchell — the right-wing activist who played a key role in President Donald Trump’s failed bid to subvert the results of the 2020 election — following Mitchell’s pledge to “ reclaim our election systems from the left. ”
This appointment, along with the posting of Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon as head of the Civil Rights division, shows how DOJ has gone from a largely consistent defender of voting rights to instead working actively to undermine our fundamental rights.
Again, are we surprised? No. But these moves from the administration highlight how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083025_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Riordan's first lawsuit at her new job? Filed against North Carolina, it cites Trump’s March anti-voter executive order and aims to strip legitimate voters from the rolls and force North Carolina to do more to collect unnecessary information that’s required by new, suppressive state laws, all from people newly registering to vote.
This follows her work at the harmless-sounding Public Interest Legal Foundation (PILF), which is anything but. PILF specializes in pressuring states and counties — by threatening and bringing expensive and frivolous lawsuits — to more aggressively remove voters from the rolls. As part of that effort, PILF has worked to stoke fear about the threat of non-citizen voting, which is extremely rare.
Remember, the civil rights division of DOJ was created in 1957 -- often referred to as the “ crown jewel ” of the department -- has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote, not suing to restrict it or cut off access for voters seeking to exercise their rights.
But Trump's nominees to DOJ have sent out “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities and anti-voting conspiracy theories.
This administration is seemingly going to do everything in their power to attack our right to vote until they ensconce their control forever. We have to keep fighting back, no matter what the cost.
folks, will you fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $25 or more right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083025_3&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083025_3&amount=20]

clean_body: We can't wait for some hero to ride over the hill at full gallop to come save us, folks. It's up to us, our movement, and supporters like you to fight back as vote-suppressors take over the Department of Justice. Our fundamental right to vote is the most precious resource our democracy has. Please, RUSH $25 or more today to help us defend it in every state across the country >> [] Voter Action Project [] DemDocket: DOJ’s New Top Voting Lawyer Worked for Leading Anti-Voting Law Firm [] This seems like something out of a twisted novel, folks, but the new top voting lawyer at the Department of Justice was until recently an attorney and activist for a leading anti-voting legal group that has worked for years to spread fear about unproven illegal voting and press election officials to implement stricter, suppressive voting rules. The lawyer, Maureen Riordan, worked side-by-side with Cleta Mitchell — the right-wing activist who played a key role in President Donald Trump’s failed bid to subvert the results of the 2020 election — following Mitchell’s pledge to “ reclaim our election systems from the left. ” This appointment, along with the posting of Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon as head of the Civil Rights division, shows how DOJ has gone from a largely consistent defender of voting rights to instead working actively to undermine our fundamental rights. Again, are we surprised? No. But these moves from the administration highlight how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Riordan's first lawsuit at her new job? body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
#
This is Deb Haaland with some exciting news, Peter:
**We have officially opened the doors to our campaign headquarters in Albuquerque!** This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94354?refcode=em20250830-9353&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9353%2E614464%2EnRK-MZ)
And right in the heart of our office is our **Grassroots Donor Wall,** a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, _not_ billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall, Peter!
**We’re going to be adding the names of _everyone_ who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. [Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today so we can put your name up there?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94354?refcode=em20250830-9353&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9353%2E614464%2EnRK-MZ)**
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that you helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: **a people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please split a contribution of $15 or any amount today between my campaign and State Democrats Committee so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94354?refcode=em20250830-9353&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9353%2E614464%2EnRK-MZ)**
Be fierce,
Deb

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=4&akid=9353%2E614464%2EnRK-MZ).

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Slammed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**One $5 donation, Peter.**
That is what we’re asking of you today, before Jon Ossoff’s August fundraising drive comes to a close. We’ll explain more shortly, but if you’re willing to give that $5 right now, here’s the link: [**https://act.electjon.com/go/AugustDeadline**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250830-2-f&t=1&akid=703%2E5691347%2EAq1hIa)
We’re looking for a _massive_ number of donations before this deadline ends tomorrow. This is important.
As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely hammered by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans are spending millions of dollars on TV and online already. It's ridiculous.
And just last week they sent the Vice President to Georgia to join the pile-on.
So that means that we have to ramp up our fundraising earlier than we’d like — because we can’t let these attacks go unanswered.
[**Can you rush a $5 donation today to help fight back?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250830-2-f&t=2&akid=703%2E5691347%2EAq1hIa)
Jon Ossoff is the only Democrat running for reelection to the Senate in a state won by Trump. That is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.
So if Jon is going to defend this seat, we really need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.
**One $5 donation, Peter. That's what we're asking for before this deadline ends. Can you make it?**
[**Please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign before our end-of-month deadline. We’re being slammed with ads every day and need your help to build the war chest it takes to win.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250830-2-f&t=3&akid=703%2E5691347%2EAq1hIa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: It’s time to Free DC: Tell your representatives to support DC statehood.
body:
GOAL: 5,000 signatures opposing Trump’s takeover of the nation’s capital.

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4ODIyNjkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDU0NDk4MwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
| | **It’s time to Free DC: Tell your representatives to support DC statehood**
** ** Since taking office, Trump has exploited federal control over the District of Columbia to trample on its residents’ rights. Now, politically motivated National Guard deployments — and an unprecedented takeover of the city’s police force — has militarized our nation’s capital. Members of Congress need to hear from people like you who support democracy for ALL Americans. Tell your representatives in Congress to support DC statehood and return control of the city to its residents.
[**_Please take action right now — it only takes a moment to help us reach our 5,000 signature goal >>_**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fz04PxM-)
---
| | | [ TAKE ACTION NOW >> ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | | | Peter — In our nation’s capital, National Guard troops wearing camo and bulletproof gear are standing guard in busy Metro stations. Humvees and Guard troops are positioned outside our museums and alongside our national monuments. Checkpoints are springing up in neighborhoods. Donald Trump has seized control of the local Washington, DC police and is launching a military occupation of the city.
---
| | For far too long, residents of the District of Columbia have lacked full control of their local government. Without full voting members of Congress, DC residents — predominantly people of color — have limited control over decisions that impact their health and safety, their communities, and their government. It's a system intentionally designed to disenfranchise and limit the power of the Black community and other communities of color, and it’s why we’ve long supported DC statehood.
---
| | **Given the recent deployment of armed forces in Los Angeles and Trump’s threat to expand military deployments to other cities, it’s clear that we** _**all**_**must take action to oppose this power grab.** Deploying the National Guard and taking over the police force in the nation’s capital is a direct attack on our freedoms and the safety of communities across the country.
---
| | The bedrock of our democracy is that power belongs to the people, and the 700,000 residents of DC deserve the same power, freedoms and protections as the rest of the country.
---
| | [**_We’ve set a goal for 5,000 LCV members to write to their representatives and demand that Congress support DC statehood. It only takes a moment — please take action right now >>_**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrM8~ed4J_)
---
| | Instead of making our communities safer, this administration is instituting a political power grab. And at the same time, the Trump administration and his allies in Congress cut $1 billion of DC taxpayers’ own money from DC’s budget, crippling their ability to protect residents and keep communities safe.
---
| | Trump is wasting our federal and local resources and is using military members against their own communities. His administration’s extreme and politicized Justice Department cannot be trusted with good faith law enforcement — they must get their hands off of DC, and Congress must immediately grant DC its long-overdue statehood to restore local control.
---
| | Peter — equal rights for the people of DC will only happen if people like you make their voices heard.
---
| | [**_Please, take action today: it only takes a moment to demand that your representatives in Congress support DC statehood, bringing us closer to our 5,000 signature goal >>_**](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
| | Thank you for standing up and making your voice heard.
---
| | Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & DemocracyLeague of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12882269&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDU0NDk4MwS2&spReportId=MjI4MDU0NDk4MwS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12882269&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDU0NDk4MwS2&spReportId=MjI4MDU0NDk4MwS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---

For August, we’re still $6,000 short...YIKES! | | | | Every single donation matters. That $2.8M doesn’t come in at once—it’s built one gift at a time, from supporters like you. Let’s get this done. This hat means more than you think...
What it represents is more powerful than you realize

| | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=16f4772cba8c4be298c67ef6f407f127&_e=Tupf4viH219syzF-zbtL6ZKIhxY9XpunLuItngQgyMglydu7bPRC_7Ov-5pGlNVf8e8wHGXqC2ofD7XMDXHeSwJVX2DlJYsihajh4cAszEJdgm7wnLOihY7nQ-ZZsO1W547Qqcif4w8S7dljdri06T1grQH1t9POapebFqlBlSSO9FvxlTbhFlmxg3G2PUeeUvZeItn49hDj3q5TzBCCelb825DVEO-3R0DNvgDo6_JUY8QZv_p3KkgmgwJRW46qIEgn09sUTQ2yy7JVH4SZzxu0ROIVFiCxy8Bx_6r08KZneiK78XjbqQfi4irOXEuONsqpRCmE_Ag7pVnOFs2Ag98jxIlNootAS8o5Lc9mkowgDntSUS8SwosiCA2sGF5vq32Vj87oBw8Z-2RzFztY48f5KaDWfTXhjqu-O3tZt8wDdCn1s8J6RHP6fPQbtSB7q3ZFconTlASBOlBaUFEm9JxsmNgbfGKdN4MPQOciPCPV9MVKMcDBcp6PitVfsWk399O-DCGv7z0j9__XN2W9Zg%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
I'll cut straight to the point... I want to send you a FREE limited-edition "47" hat...The same hat college students have literally begged for during our campus tour stops.
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=16f4772cba8c4be298c67ef6f407f127&_e=Tupf4viH219syzF-zbtL6ZKIhxY9XpunLuItngQgyMglydu7bPRC_7Ov-5pGlNVf8e8wHGXqC2ofD7XMDXHeSwJVX2DlJYsihajh4cAszEJdgm7wnLOihY7nQ-ZZsO1W547Qqcif4w8S7dljdri06SrbN8HrnbFKN10T0LjToNjIfH87YB4zQ17Q4QNP7dbIsdz7GS3S1accIAzdNH3eLebpsZCw5e3CqFz2dMuqPkYlm86-36jsmN-6nPYS6Srn_7PpRhTVRGqPWqaa8tq8uPMPU6lsHHpaKDSs7Kc4f-G7ruxrzONLI6jnsnabwLkUqo9sPhGoQ3OrPjc7gwkkxl42Frdg9VeqJCx4BHABQDomraY6rA4KGwZGmUoO-5iBo7LvAHs11F6eD6i-vLepG9u-typzr9Mv-C4RS8KSUPkupe-GpwmbZM4XHQV9Pctc8dXxKJ83cv8SBPLy195Rc4LsC0AWZP2v3s2oIcbWTmzKhORbVhLrVmPWhMVzBLHbNi0w3NZGpXsbrM6Xl0RxkA%3D%3D)
---
But this isn't just any hat... It's a symbol.A symbol of what's happening right now across college campuses in America. _Students are waking up... Chanting "USA!"... Waving flags... and standing up for faith, family, and freedom._Everywhere Turning Point USA goes, we're seeing record crowds -- thousands of students -- fired up to defend this country and reject the Left's lies.And guess what?**They 're PROUD to be American.** This isn't just a moment... It's not a mere "shift"... This is a generational REVOLUTION!**And Friend, I want YOU to be part of it.**_All I ask?_**Make a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people ...**...and I'll send you a limited-edition "47" hat as my thank-you.
---

**Claim Your “47” Hat**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=16f4772cba8c4be298c67ef6f407f127&_e=Tupf4viH219syzF-zbtL6ZKIhxY9XpunLuItngQgyMglydu7bPRC_7Ov-5pGlNVf8e8wHGXqC2ofD7XMDXHeSwJVX2DlJYsihajh4cAszEJdgm7wnLOihY7nQ-ZZsO1W547Qqcif4w8S7dljdri06WfdUMenDazFU3ibqOWtRt_ExXdgEA0XuLAYtODcqMJxA3wBUB4_SuScqQphYYayNbMgf4RzTgi7yKhDbfB_FHMA6V0CEmbBQPHD5T2UCZg4SKwoFqWzz0uGl2Z3CdIQYI7VaOsaZu7njWJfCU0s0s8IQ9c4iUhO-aNtr3m2tREy-BeCnVry6wTjeDVMalxAE4Mz9_arFDhJZoDxn8tH79l4g5eVfwzkMXDW5t2BdQr1fLFew7CisvF2NAtqJtX1eXX8FlPI3kkDtPBcYrodzAQeiDr1wyDqOKpPMPNxc99ROtGNN3zjib_yKUgrW2fhZWCIZ-uvzSwQumNBsOGplWwyu3HH3LRRo2nuJEjHTG_f2P3e_xwLly_sD8KWLYLvpA%3D%3D)

Friend, this isn't a gimmick... It's not another piece of "merch"... This hat means something.To every student who wears one -- it's a statement: _" I'm not afraid to stand up for this country."_ To every patriot like you who fuels this mission -- it's a reminder:_ "I helped wake up a generation. I helped build a movement."_

**The "47" hat is a badge of honor for people who are saving this country.****So please -- make your first gift now to help Turning Point USA push this movement even further...**🔥 More campuses
🔥 More students
🔥 More hearts and minds changed _And I 'll send you your "47" hat as a symbol of the mission you've joined._

**Claim Your “47” Hat**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=16f4772cba8c4be298c67ef6f407f127&_e=Tupf4viH219syzF-zbtL6ZKIhxY9XpunLuItngQgyMglydu7bPRC_7Ov-5pGlNVf8e8wHGXqC2ofD7XMDXHeSwJVX2DlJYsihajh4cAszEJdgm7wnLOihY7nQ-ZZsO1W547Qqcif4w8S7dljdri06UQz4wmFb0Omtn4Zc1ldaR6gNCdPlWsjsEAgO2GbW_6hL7MlFAa7D_67QR_S5DKaZ0-mPPETZA1Q2RwzyXQtVf7nsW9EcKFCfD_A4ojyrOTgXwj2Z14EBJAqX0Hu3H6zwVDit3N1C0zSF4l01_Y3dUXssYW8ubNl_tEQehSZicWVH7JCAgRk0lBnIu1DQPbnw6-baBij6JQftjQOK8pe2Sa6WZu8eYqUbIt0r4h1G9VX9fkWgf0fo-ilHCV6qmsJVsWAnDti3rJl2AXnCnZbZ9thshroglQwg1MTaF41gQtfdZFnAUrR8gU5W4CWQUZF9709A-aAJVJusEjK92PxfdG5tK7WnTFE0vvK6Vu58cbFJkp3961cWiEazhk9qHL9lQ%3D%3D)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Leaked Washington Post call
body:
We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG. This exposes media bias at its worst. Our citizen journalists catch this in real time and stories like this keep coming because of you.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9d9hpc80jrihei6h0m0r6r1r2r1de4pktur85no_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob6cth2bs)
Dear Patriot,

**We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG.**

[**Watch here and please help OMG break through the mainstream by donating as much as you can today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5eq7n9dtio5eo5eirkj0k4vb00hin2ut9k33scg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob6cth2bs)

[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zt37557iq1vribb3u2sdmush33ppb8sg9lklga80_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob6cth2bs)
A former Trump pageant contestant reached out to us after the _Washington Post_ contacted her. **They wanted dirt on President Trump from his pageant days**. But she had only good things to say - Trump was kind and a true gentleman.

She recorded the call with Matt Viser, WaPo's White House Bureau Chief. He admitted: "If all we had was people saying Trump was a gentleman... **we wouldn't do that story**."

They only chase negative angles, **ignoring the truth if it doesn't fit their agenda**.

**This exposes media bias at its worst.**

The Post is out to "expose" Trump, **even linking to Epstein without proof**. But when faced with positive facts? They drop it.

Our citizen journalists catch this in real time.

Stories like this keep coming because of you.

**[**Our August drive needs your help**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z496dblq2h9ah1dpfqi72jvqtip8ivnf1qq7eo90_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob6cth2bs)** to fund more leaks and undercover ops and keep the leaks like this coming our way.

**We hold the media accountable - no matter who they target.**

[**Can you donate today? Just $25 powers our next big reveal.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdvioldcq3j8s737jp0cj5bf8p0h49bhb1ea1r48_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob6cth2bs)

_Please Donate Now_

Thanks for fighting with us. The truth wins when we stand together.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhip81jiqgbj5ne5b2ep7it42i6vv7kt3h0ddj7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrn3uq34u33jqbi6l8rii40cdnu15uuebjbrglo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf9s2q2d59goh79mol3ktkr61t852jnahj5534kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2r9c2d3vj6cep6lp1u3l3vfqs73u272mk9il2h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoumb4rfj6n5t3bc0qnfvr1oser95nn2s8nfccho_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_
**
[I’m not asking for much, but even $1 will do the trick now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze828uhnujcvff647olstbu0m0dhb1057vrb20h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs) **

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN ->**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkcgkd8kcs40o50em64rh76m0043u6dpf7oi9mko_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)
I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago.
**
[I’m virtually unknown in Minnesota, so I need to raise as much capital as possible to introduce myself to people across the state before the end of the year.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr7aobdoupe4emprdke19er98sosg32kqpcj6v60_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)**

**[Could you chip in $1 today to help me change that?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1le9qetrae30lp5qqf1qnd5hecmk1mg5dvqic28_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjadlf8evo4saifdvus9c267gg1hfe0t950t4b58_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)
We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing.

We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity.

We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education.

We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it.

But I can’t do it alone.

**I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything.
**
I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

**P.S:** The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me.

As a fellow American who loves this country, **[I ask you to stand with me. Your support, whether it’s $5, $25, or more](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8uiai87lajce856r602sah44d7pfl50b0emmu90_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)** , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdb600b7i82hvbtoe1shl6sk9c5210ccug35is6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)

| | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

---

_Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmogpmjpqvi2birgkfamoglsiiqm4uf2eusivpfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5ge1p75clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjt0999j3r62q1q2g52q21etrirsi633h6pgmouo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl2bk7sht5ivl96qsqdhfjn4ti16fhqoa565p6v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob1cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z12e6ot8lq8er1dk368bfqs1j5k3c2n5qckifft0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob5cjh2bs)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7m6grkhatrbfbe79ci7juu37mfbvub056qfedeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob5cjh2bs)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.

Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zerbcclgc93ufc9v8jrvko4ams1k39d9luteh4fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob5cjh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvvdqpitco4kouggghdveon48e9c80i9m48lp6ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob5cjh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaj5uvqjhg2i5au1vu6ovcgeqkmq844pkon9cdog_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob5cjh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zat38p4dk7mmfe9vfjn9cfkbrj93j6m29vh226go_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj62ob5cjh2bs)

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: I will never forget why we fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jtkv4aovl9egmn6dm6llnlkvqdangfielt0nbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3he981dksb35mggb07lahagi85qpbbdkqs8rv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z85sb7pllv3mrmpvfam84qa4bkog9pqit8gk386g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdueifjgefccasb5i7u6i0j6832fkt8854uvddd8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgma4dl8qtrqqufl2l0plaji5c525orto02fkgag_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_
**
[I’m not asking for much, but even $1 will do the trick now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztmn8eastb4qc4qb671odpdo7a806bg85lmmuubo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs) **

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN ->**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgu5g0p4udpcvcukebmklesh36p6srttakip79e0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)
I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago.
**
[I’m virtually unknown in Minnesota, so I need to raise as much capital as possible to introduce myself to people across the state before the end of the year.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqiq32osn075k6ej7lf8ijp9qfdfvq3pagjvv2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)**

**[Could you chip in $1 today to help me change that?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5fkb6kfc8a0kbh7vp5d1kavk5r6qt7mj64rqvq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zotk40djl1e9j787ckmgpvliftmq75eu9onmspn0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)
We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing.

We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity.

We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education.

We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it.

But I can’t do it alone.

**I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything.
**
I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

**P.S:** The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me.

As a fellow American who loves this country, **[I ask you to stand with me. Your support, whether it’s $5, $25, or more](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4hmegmmfod3slkruiktqcvenp00j0k885grhca8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)** , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuh3s9brkp3qi3u75gu7016ccqvkm1080ip8bfuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

| | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate

---

_Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl8al9jt1i0l9u23efdk8qlkrki6bbaaojuq7jog_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni62o70sjhm8oh1k8gn48n24hjmaor3cpimcoj3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo9bdd9oooki6dmn8b82t1m97guogb4kc5qr1br8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z51am0bdpmbk7mt6uogaoitpj7mf3p1j7607ep70_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5cdhmcpb6c9hm49fg)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This email breaks a lot of the rules
body:
Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqa24aksq6l3g7qldh1enh2lfrm8c88ej5rdnrho_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)
Urgent message from Senator Ted Cruz

Friend,

Please forgive me for sending you a long email.

But it’s about a dire situation in our education system -- from preschools to universities. In my book, _Unwoke_ , I detail what is happening in our schools:
* Children as young as pre-K are taught racial division.
* Radical school teachers are transitioning kids behind the backs of parents.
* Universities are forcing all faculty to pledge allegiance to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion, or what I like to call the DEI cult.

**Like me, I'm sure you receive 10+ emails a day asking you for money...**

They all say the sky is falling, but they don't provide details as to how they will use those funds.

_I'd like to break the rules._

Instead of sending you a short email, I am going to lay out a comprehensive strategy the Goldwater Institute deploys to defeat radical Marxism in our schools.

I spoke with Victor Riches, the President of Goldwater Institute, and I told him I would help them raise $50,000 in their fight against radicals in education. I am asking all my supporters to donate right away.

[Please donate $10, $35, $250, or any amount you can generously contribute >>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl4il3402gs329khre89m86fiudp2g484fejvopo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

The radical indoctrination of our education didn’t occur overnight. It took decades to unfold. And let me shoot straight with you... conservatives won’t fix it overnight. But the Goldwater Institute is attacking on all fronts. They’ve been in this fight for more than a decade, bringing school choice and protecting parental rights across the country.
Here’s what the Goldwater Institute is doing that makes them unique among conservative organizations.

Defending Parental Rights While in her 13-year-old daughter’s room, Amber Lavigne was shocked to find a chest binder—an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Upon further investigation, Amber discovered that her daughter had been secretly given the chest binder by a school social worker. This social worker had advised Amber’s daughter about gender transitioning and, worse yet, told her it would be best not to inform her parents.

The school violated Amber's parental rights as protected by the Constitution. In response, the Goldwater Institute is suing to hold the school accountable for its actions.

This radical ideology has no place in our schools, and it’s the latest in the battle against cultural Marxism. Goldwater is defending parental rights by providing parents with legal assistance to stop schools that violate the law.

[Can you contribute to the Goldwater Institute by donating $10, $35, or any amount today? Please help me raise $50,000 for them this week.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfrio5ak38706js2b1o9881mktqt4ls66uo6o8h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdj3l5mscfrg68oc3vii4pccl9c646r43j2qilr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze337ajbar904bdhlmnkg9ljjoa6qkac4a7qcgqo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zep96afrspjctm9sfvlf5nfd0p67l2flsndoeen8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj6apj2cdh2bs)

**We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG.**

[**Watch here and please help OMG break through the mainstream by donating as much as you can today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfrnb4aj40el2957br509p9tlcdni3ojab9rflk0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34cdh2bs)

A former Trump pageant contestant reached out to us after the _Washington Post_ contacted her. **They wanted dirt on President Trump from his pageant days**. But she had only good things to say - Trump was kind and a true gentleman.

She recorded the call with Matt Viser, WaPo's White House Bureau Chief. He admitted: "If all we had was people saying Trump was a gentleman... **we wouldn't do that story**."

They only chase negative angles, **ignoring the truth if it doesn't fit their agenda**.

**This exposes media bias at its worst.**

The Post is out to "expose" Trump, **even linking to Epstein without proof**. But when faced with positive facts? They drop it.

Our citizen journalists catch this in real time.

Stories like this keep coming because of you.

**[**Our August drive needs your help**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhhi4ta48p8s5g4oej7f7u8gkg55c1m8v45tfqpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34cdh2bs)** to fund more leaks and undercover ops and keep the leaks like this coming our way.

Thanks for fighting with us. The truth wins when we stand together.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Leaked Washington Post call
body:
We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG. This exposes media bias at its worst. Our citizen journalists catch this in real time and stories like this keep coming because of you.

| [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zigqr1t1jsl6ls313p8v7uu6uv1hjtjlkl7p0dlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34c3h2bs)
Dear Patriot,

**We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG.**

[**Watch here and please help OMG break through the mainstream by donating as much as you can today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4bo44k34q5ecceuaoq8tv6nkpv46nceucomkovo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34c3h2bs)

[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlb6mkbqkh6m1ko8v97vuk4aom1c5rd9bo6jni6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34c3h2bs)
A former Trump pageant contestant reached out to us after the _Washington Post_ contacted her. **They wanted dirt on President Trump from his pageant days**. But she had only good things to say - Trump was kind and a true gentleman.

She recorded the call with Matt Viser, WaPo's White House Bureau Chief. He admitted: "If all we had was people saying Trump was a gentleman... **we wouldn't do that story**."

They only chase negative angles, **ignoring the truth if it doesn't fit their agenda**.

**This exposes media bias at its worst.**

The Post is out to "expose" Trump, **even linking to Epstein without proof**. But when faced with positive facts? They drop it.

Our citizen journalists catch this in real time.

Stories like this keep coming because of you.

**[**Our August drive needs your help**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z37ibp3337a69uls28rm0fuv8cb66fdrjiedpef0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34c3h2bs)** to fund more leaks and undercover ops and keep the leaks like this coming our way.

**We hold the media accountable - no matter who they target.**

[**Can you donate today? Just $25 powers our next big reveal.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjr22uuip5c6b5m8kpm9i5rfi7c8blcqnvnbu9u8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61o34c3h2bs)

_Please Donate Now_

Thanks for fighting with us. The truth wins when we stand together.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zjf299sidosmptjkf3amg21scrnm1ms19fl2rns8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh43paobarj9sanud6hdis8reaqq3k4d6l1eqnbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zeuk4o6qt5jivvgs1kpjvoe8s358bm0dfpo129eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zaefrccdb62ec0adkfleiaet2s8h691f76g66db0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zem87ts7isamotnsmdit8ni7rm4o364phco70svo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2lak42gcvf93p8ncthvdrnfig1s2bdkqbi2ibt8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqfu4heig8hsq1h2o0td5m34j6o72224re16360o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs2d2qpkr35dti6pvp9ejuc97b2ju1fpbv3t6js0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7ta50mqupfkn3bhl7rp6ui3bqg0eklheudbmbkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztpmjggj8pj2e3n2uesq8pnn8pp41juqgkqjj8fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5ge1p77cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z23nscqsamejo24c02h60uhditlglvicf3tc7ibg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p70cjh2bs)_

subject: School officials banned them
body:
Across the country, Americans face growing censorship and discrimination for living according to their beliefs.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt18cq1edbi06j6c23nv9jasm57pbaum23negung_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p74c9h2bs)

##
**Freedom is under threat. You can help defend it --right now.**

Across the country, Americans face growing censorship and discrimination for living according to their beliefs. Alliance Defending Freedom is fighting back--and winning. Since 2011, we've secured 15 Supreme Court victories and defended fundamental freedoms at no cost to our clients.

But we can't do it without your support.

**Your gift will help maximize the impact of a $250,000 challenge grant!
**
Will you take a stand today? Your gift equips us to fight--and win--the legal battles that protect freedom for all.
[ GIVE NOW ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgbdqo6k3eb4fptki18cfihs0nrsc5nobqiejbc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdj61p74c9h2bs)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3m685d8jlfhljfroe5m9is0q1508cjqja4hd6gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6bsktioqdgivp8kg913puomfms9dsm3t5lshelo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1f197jaabs0dkfo6v7fbnmfnh02n7ptehllkmf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zef8tv6e24ihfg2b0slge6pico0gebqhjm3c7u20_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt9fsgjk1cu0t2cg6abemb8k0h9qq47f9ltia5kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt636sc691h6hmtihf2ruei2i4eegvo638m2vuv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9kagk24o7gqocrbtih6scb4m9ach46ri2crjndo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z71v0n21ib34epvn4q20kbltafd3v2iqdduldmo0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3cdgm8or2cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---

We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# Sunday, August 31, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1798, Isaac Davis carried out the [first bank heist in the U.S.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFyqzAQANDTQAcjJCHhQsVv3Pm3KZkFrYySBXlWazO-fSa5Qi7wivdxm2-QKR_3_7BjkFTmA89KKII8C3BOqUZcCRjj8yA405OkzFrpsVNTZ4Y5Qqb3bNsYEqJG02IY_Oicsd5M7Ra0tWCcR_Q2usXGybiLt_aihmWIgKrN4UdTkxkGpUbje5NQ2Usc1eLMNE6psQpjlsL9Z8mHbJjoXV7I_Vr2lsIm8qiN-dfoa6Ov53n2K_ADD0GuGxD1he-NvsKOnFeoXcpcpVvg-Oq4LAvyu-UQH2cmytX5xqr7Dpl-dflTySvo7wAAAP__hdx2gw), stealing $162,821 from the Bank of Philadelphia. He was caught after depositing the stolen money in the very bank he had robbed, as well as in other Philadelphia banks, which aroused suspicion. Some baby names remain timeless, while others rise and fall in popularity. Discover which names topped the charts in the 2010s [in today's _Sunday Rewind_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OqzAQRp_GdEHjPyCFi9vQ5bZbogmeCV4ZHOFJUN5-tbzCdp--4hzpfN2mG6actsd_XCkIl2mjo2YSoX0S3BNzjTRn3Cm-towHv7KUyYDxFxguVk8RU_5MromBiQzZhoLufddZ19uhWQJ7Gy1of0U0HD0MmtlRP18pakeamxR-aTBYrQG87VvLBO4aPdw7O_iBlQOKScrefpe0yUKcP-VNezuXtclhEXlWZf8pMyozHsfR1orto7yVGQvOosx4x_tnw5WqMmOkGeO5zseAhtousuZmD_F5pJxT7Xrl4LFiyqdD_hTmHcxPAAAA__8QaXdV). ## Court Rules Trump Tariffs Unlawful
A federal appeals court has ruled that most of President Trump's sweeping [global tariffs are unlawful](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAYBOCnwZsGfxD0wKFJ4217aZoeDcqPS_MrBnA3-_bNNu0T9DzJZL75vEwXGyjs65vd0BQfpx3vmbAUTFOxKXifHS5kE7pzJ3v3J5U4AYeu5n0t2snZQI9JVs54REBRoWl1p5SQWvTV1Wg3I0qplFDLAJ22Ui6DdzNwjQrsUAXzbOO9aFvOO6Eb4ZHLwXV8VqLves8kRxdKTM1XDHu5oqdHvGFqlrhVZK6lHJmJFwYjg9HOy1PQrPEZMxg_3hmMJZ3bkeuV4myp_nXVf6DaHgdayvUSz1QYjLnE9GBiDI6J1xa6tuUKZJWMO-6BKGSlmeTrZgP9jCj_eu5m4DsAAP__3W6COQ), potentially dealing a significant blow to the president's effort to reshape the country's trade policy. Upholding a lower court's decision, the appeals court found that many of Trump's tariffs on foreign goods [exceeded his power](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCBjG_AVLtLQXdqUyODdO0cLRmY56_4-IsofpBtppBm993Wf7j5S3B6ffgXHmKYNykHADHlinyPiEWAhnyGcG_mCJ3GalFRdLW2t2yn4SO_JVMEhgAJdgWuHru-1GbStnm4O2tqhVcrO3swKDd7mvkMJQ68BF1NFd61Jq9tWyk4PjUaQ5hY6OffadhaFkRAip9x8p7jxE5De6QW5WdJakXsy74fQH0KNQo2llGaZj4vi6oUaryjU6PcdPB31ks7MNedz3es_wDoSwcOTUGOVXdhLJIpHPwgjH6uP9HvE_7LzcuonAAD___V0emg) under federal economic emergency laws. Trump called tariffs the "[best tool](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO6yAUheGngY6Ii7m4oDiNu5x2SovAJibCxsLbifL2o4zmDaZe0i996-s6X0OpZbv_Dyt4zG3e4HVUQIQ-Y-gl5yNBrKFDOrcaXvms2GbJpWbcMSXmFEp9zwNNPgNIUBS8sNoYNVjl6OJvIsWsnTWBi3EcjYUoDPAx2hBtTDda_KfGnRKCc63sRWXgw5g0vxnltMtk4JAKtn55tLLhArm-2xP6JbaVVr8g7gdR_4iciJxwgaXU-tmInJa2wgdE5KQH66RQDPu57uyXxjo8ICIkFvYdQj1YbGdHIifafdpfpdZyGEsGfl9D-alS_NNNTy-_AwAA___h2Xyu)" to help workers and support American companies. The president said, _" If allowed to stand, this Decision would literally destroy the United States of America."_ The court's ruling will not take effect until October, allowing tariffs to remain in place until the Trump administration has a chance to ask the Supreme Court to take up the case.
## Ohio State Topples Top-Ranked Texas

## List: Ranking Cities With Affordable Homes
Buffalo, New York, ranks as the U.S. city with [the highest percentage of affordable homes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAURp_GbI6Mf8AZPHRhS9eOyOB7w60uOMImKH36Kn2Fbp_0SedI5-s23iIxbffPuEKomMcNzsJQK-xjjTshlgQzxx3SsXE88eCaR620k8pL044pEr9G26SAABpMA6HtXdcZ2xvfLAE6bezVaI8JlYnoplmb5LCN1qNyqqHwpilv2lYpZ_qLQVD2mpyaOuOdR2EVJKp5v3xn2uoCyK_8hP0y57XhsNT6KMJ8CD0IPdQFFmJ-f0IP01Fog1KEHpb83nehB2d73xsljyJnqgRFRsS8pzgxyCWvUCRTqfKHmPMp9NDsIT1OYqbS9cKq-xrpz9DUfyV7Bv0bAAD__1pOgHM), according to a recent housing report. Affordable housing [means households spend no more](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAQQL_GbCBjY3AGD13Y0rUjMtw5XHXBke3Eol9fpb_Q-UnvSe_rulw9MR23T39HV0JcDqyZsRRMS_GJQsiAG_uE8DzY1_DkEhcllWmlbXW_gCc-l6EBFxAV6gZdP5lx1MOkbbM7ANlfrIIVbTDSSGVw7TcI4IMfUa8NubdNWt33Uho9dTqgHC5g5Dpqa2wQg0SgElP3HekoOwY-4wtTt8V7w24v5ZGF_hBqFmqutXY_xBzrGws1J8zo07YLNa_PE1NuMwEyHQitDyEm8Ctjy5QLHbfcamOkFmpukoNHJWbK4yQGebt74r9k-denl1O_AQAA__9Ean36) than 30% of income on monthly costs, including the mortgage, taxes, insurance, and maintenance. July listings surged 20% year over year to 439,000, the highest since August 2022. About 55% of homes listed in Buffalo are affordable to median-income residents. St. Louis ranked second at 54.5%, followed by Pittsburgh, Detroit, and Cleveland at 54.3%, 52.8%, and 50.1%, respectively. Los Angeles, at 3%, has the fewest affordable homes, followed by San Diego with 6.4% and Providence at 9.1%.

**Whatever happened to World's Fairs?** World's Fairs used to be massive cultural and industrial showcases that drew global popular attention, where nations showed off scientific breakthroughs and visions of the future, like stepping into a preview of the future. Examples include the famous "White City" of Chicago's Columbian Exposition in 1893, or, more recently, New York's 1964 World's Fair, which drew 51 million people to see new consumer technology that has since become commonplace.

But today, [World's Fairs are greatly diminished](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O8yAUAE-DOyz-DLig-Bp3-dotrZfwiN8KmwhIrNx-lb3C9qMZab4u6wUo03H_DzuGnsp64Nky9o517VAppRbxlqFifB4ZzvTMvaxKqIkLz7VcI1B-r2aIISEq1AMG6SZrtXHaD1uQyRkF-orC-eislDHaaK_eg1EJ_DRQ-NiE11IKMWk36oTCzHESV6v95BMzAiP1UsfvQkffMOV3eWEdb2Ufcth6fzSm_zG1MLWc5zm2nfrWykFw7HD_YEwtG7Ve6puppW_IKzXkcESeIGdeEj9LzbHxBFQbl17Mbp6NZWoZaoiPk3KmZh0z4r4D5d90_9OvV1A_AQAA__8RU38Y) in status, for a variety of reasons. Most obviously, the rise of TV, the internet, and instant global communications made some of their purposes obsolete. Money disappeared too, as urban costs grew and the Olympics and other mega-events drew corporate sponsorship dollars away. Today, World's Fairs still exist, but they're more commonly known as World Expos, and they generally focus on global cooperation and world culture. What they don't do anymore is draw mass popular attention.

| The drive from Cleveland to Cincinnati takes just under 4 hours. Apparently, that's too long for Vivek Ramaswamy. While I drive a union and Ohio-made Jeep from campaign event to campaign event, Vivek is shelling out $80,000 a month — to a company he appears to own — to rent a private jet. In just the last few months, he's used that jet to fly across our state and even out of the country. It's the perfect imagery for what he believes, Peter — that he's above us. Vivek wants to push a narrative that Ohioans are lazy and don't work hard enough. But I’m literally on the ground with Ohioans, seeing the struggles they are facing every day. Property taxes are skyrocketing, public schools are way underfunded, and healthcare access is becoming a thing of the past. I understand these struggles. I lived in 18 different homes and even a tent by the time I was in high school. That struggle shouldn't be a common theme in our state. Vivek is an out-of-touch billionaire with an agenda that starts and ends with serving himself. I'm running for office not to serve myself, but to serve the people of Ohio, Peter. [Can I humbly ask you to split a special contribution of $10 or more between my campaign and Blue Amp Action? I know your money is hard-earned, so I wouldn't ask unless it was critical, and I promise I won't use it to rent a private jet.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3f33355a-9221-4dde-a0fc-b5fb9a74e053/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
