name: FIRE Tish James
subject: She knows she’s losing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
body:
This is our do-or-die moment to OFFICIALLY take the lead.
This is our do-or-die moment to OFFICIALLY take the lead.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1680642/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQ2hLNTN5QWZwOA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MzE/LbmNsWjFOdFA1Qg/qP2hpZHM9bmNxNjFoeFBXY3BHMHJscw/gaLRNfQ/sdpe79f82db)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Michael Henry here – the _only_ Republican candidate running in the election against New York Attorney General Letitia James.
---
When Letitia James LOST her $500 MILLION fraud penalty against President Trump, I promised you that was not the end. _Tish will not go down without a fight._
---
And right on cue, Tish is appealing the ruling: **Letitia James to advance fraud appeal as DOJ pressure campaign intensifies” _**(Source: The Hill)**_**
---
Tish knows she’s floundering, so she’s fighting tooth and nail to hold on for dear life.
---
She’s losing ground in her case against the President, she’s under investigation by the FBI for allegedly committing mortgage fraud, wire fraud, mail fraud, AND bank fraud, and her approval rating has cratered to a record low.
---
__We need to seize the moment and officially TAKE THE LEAD in the Attorney General race.__
---
And the stage is already set for us to do it. Just take a look at the _NY Post_ headline below:
---
**GOP’s Michael Henry hauls in donations as he eyes rematch to topple embattled NY AG Letitia James: ‘Time for Tish to go’**
---
_The upcoming August end-of-month fundraising deadline is our do-or-die moment to officially take the LEAD against Tish James in what’s become a single-digit race._
---
[**So, please make a contribution before the 8/31 CLOSE OF BOOKS – and per the benchmarks set by New York’s campaign finance laws, we will be able to 600% MATCH your grassroots contribution.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> 175](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >> $350](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75 >> $525](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> $700](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >> $1,750](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Michael Henry
_Republican for New York Attorney General_
---
---
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
---

Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: not the headline we wanted to see

body:

#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94360?refcode=em20250831-9355&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9355%2E614464%2EfHr4UR)
Peter, we’ll get right to the point. Yet another poll shows our MAGA opponent gaining on us in this race. Ciattarelli’s false attacks are working, and we need to fight back harder. (Stay tuned for more on our strategy there in the coming days!)
For right now, our focus is on reaching our fundraising goals before the end-of-month deadline later today. The tightening polls have put maximum pressure on our entire team to hit our benchmarks here — because the last thing we can afford going into the closing weeks of this race is to face a budget gap that prevents us from getting our message out.
**So, Peter, we truly need your support right now. If you could split $5 or more between Mikie’s campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us hit our goal before this critical deadline, our entire team, from Mikie on down, would be extremely grateful.**

Team Mikie

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team --
Our August end-of-month deadline ends in less than 24 hours. Is there _anything_ we can say for you to donate to help Gabby stop the gun violence epidemic in our country?
What if we told you that we need to flip just 3 seats to take back the House majority?
What if we said that Speaker Mike Johnson’s Super PAC has already raised more than $30 million this year — an off-year fundraising record for them?
And, what if we told you that we need more grassroots donations to power our work?
**For the families who’ve lost kids and loved ones to gun violence — they deserve more than thoughts and prayers. They deserve action from our elected officials.**
More than 50,000 people have chipped in this year to help fight back against the Trump administration and elect real gun safety leaders across the country. Now, as we head towards our August monthly deadline, we’re humbly asking:
[**Will you make your first donation to GIFFORDS PAC before our end-of-month deadline at midnight? Our average donation this year is $25. Some people give more, others give less. What matters most is that you choose to join the fight to end gun violence today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=1&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&amount=3&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=20&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-aug25.8KHFUP&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=21&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-aug25.J5-c7V&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=22&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-aug25.DZaPyu&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=23&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-aug25.Yj6wVz&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=24&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=25&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
Thank you,
GIFFORDS
**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $17](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&amount=17&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=26&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&refcode=em250831-1-b&t=27&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr)**
---
****

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=10833%2E3935704%2EFAZxAr) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: We weren’t expecting this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter —
Normally when I write you I like it to be different from most of the political emails you get.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, and the surreal experience of working in the Senate at this singular and disturbing moment in American history.
This email is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out this morning with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record.
**It is not normal for the GOP to be up on the airwaves and online with this kind of attack this far out from the election. It’s because they know Georgia is key. They know I’m strong. And they need to knock me down.**
_Will we let them?_
We knew these attacks were coming. But we’re facing more outside spending, earlier than we had expected — which means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight.
We will fight back. And we _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone.
I really need your help right now.
[**Can I count on you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today before our end-of-month fundraising deadline? Thanks in advance.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250831-1-f&t=1&akid=706%2E5691347%2EvEPO8E)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250831-1-f&t=2&akid=706%2E5691347%2EvEPO8E)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=706%2E5691347%2EvEPO8E) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=706%2E5691347%2EvEPO8E) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Rachel McDowell
subject: A personal note from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McDowell for Congress _Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress_ **Our mailing address is:**
body:
| | | _Hi Friend,_ _I wanted to reach out to you not just as Addison McDowell’s wife, but as someone who sees every single day the incredible work he does for our family, our community, and our country._ _From the early mornings to the late nights, he’s in the trenches—behind the scenes and making sure the progress doesn’t stall on all that he and President Trump are fighting for.**I see the daily sacrifices** he makes, and I see the passion he pours into every fight._ _The truth is, the end of the month is here, and the pressure is intense—especially because the summer months were slower than normal for the campaign because Addison spent so much time in DC._ _There’s a**major target on Addison’s back** , and we have no other choice but to rally our base to give Addison **the fighting chance he deserves** in the upcoming election._ _Every gift, every small step, every prayer—it means the world to our family and to Team McDowell. Your support gives Addison the tools he needs to push back against these attacks, maintain our momentum, and protect the victories he’s already fought so hard to secure._ [_**From my family to yours, I would truly appreciate you stepping up for my husband today. Together, I believe we can make sure Addison keeps fighting for our values, our communities, and our country.**_](https://link.mcdowellfornc.com/s/c/3RPSWNsRhqj2GAb9x-gyO3WGTgVFwTAd6too_srVcPLTuunhmv0v2vGXwd-kT1HueglGzMrfN5KecaCD2v0Th10dgYA7tcn175w2OC8i1v1qtjA9n8u0a4WaJDdK11q-BihL-aEH6XxalVISoBYQ_pVPgcS_xVU2A7OWPougliCVJQlMVO1J9KGDeWU9g7Sbo1UNscFcZI5ZzK2dz5l3FF0Zu0jEofIZFgLFl0v1Lv58b-aDwsp2eWJg8In2vCx9Y1knF71rYEsY9eyYakDqr5dKTZtSq9KFB8DVPIfoBTya05mkN6OZ_--zRmexCF7iH2093kIuWNv1J6Ea4DFFD8w6KzJ_1whfGb0hyWhJpaTmTeKAroPtW_m_SNIDh13i5yBhc8QXqnIXIszb-OaJwT9WTjt6_fNioLNHSHMaCYtUpTy_7zZYTsB3E52166FH1MWIduY9RT73G1EJ3dheFOgUMS9SE8rP0MQuBJsI_06mDAwJH4y_95wfdq1_r8jP8SGos_7FLbE1r89Xs-PxG3wQad0fzk4IixpW0h2MVVoKZ6OUVNE6MHFIF3Qq-RCTH6iU2jm-XXKaHQRrJLvGW-IZUSWQGGXhBeicBoX7xgSMhez9_gUxQDAXcoXSWVCOxPc4ZBaWnJEIDQo3wAoe6lYw0cA_hRmQyaFYvCvZB4rN68Q_lK2e2F-H5LEAcnU6NzRDlyumIjBLsdyoRwsAVb-QJND8tnR7vosm4-MbCRsYaZIzoY91VyxUJV6lb_3DYCffcAut-nAYWgZAJwQpazjC9jfP_BVIIbswmDV_leN2mJSoyF3Svjo/n-Xth1DzmUhtk0G2Kwj97MN9Xclo_RoT/12)

clean_body: | | | Hi Friend, I wanted to reach out to you not just as Addison McDowell’s wife, but as someone who sees every single day the incredible work he does for our family, our community, and our country. From the early mornings to the late nights, he’s in the trenches—behind the scenes and making sure the progress doesn’t stall on all that he and President Trump are fighting for.I see the daily sacrifices he makes, and I see the passion he pours into every fight. The truth is, the end of the month is here, and the pressure is intense—especially because the summer months were slower than normal for the campaign because Addison spent so much time in DC. There’s amajor target on Addison’s back , and we have no other choice but to rally our base to give Addison the fighting chance he deserves in the upcoming election. Every gift, every small step, every prayer—it means the world to our family and to Team McDowell. Your support gives Addison the tools he needs to push back against these attacks, maintain our momentum, and protect the victories he’s already fought so hard to secure. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for standing with us, Rachel | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by McDowell for Congress Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress Our mailing address is: McDowell for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , and .

Dear Friend of Religious Liberty, Because of your voice, Camp IdRaHaJe can continue to live out its Christian faith--free from government coercion. Praise God! When Colorado officials tried to force the camp to allow males in girls' private spaces, Camp IdRaHaJe didn't cave. It stood firm on its biblical convictions--and said, "We'd rather have Jesus." And you stood with the camp. Thousands signed the public statement of support. The outcry was heard. Colorado backed down. **Today, Camp IdRaHaJe remains a place where kids across the state can encounter the hope of the Gospel without compromise.** _**But the battle for truth and freedom isn 't over.**_ In Vermont, the girls' basketball team at Mid Vermont Christian School (MVCS) chose faith over fear--and paid a price. Faced with the prospect of competing against a team that included a male who identifies as female, the school declined to play. The school and its families honored their biblical beliefs about God's design for males and females. In response, **Vermont officials banned every MVCS middle and high school student from participating in all state-sponsored sports. Every student --benched.** This punishment has lasted two years. And it continues. We're helping MVCS challenge this injustice in court--because **no school, ministry, or student should be punished for following their faith.** Will you stand with this school and its students today? Add your name to the statement of support and tell Vermont: truth matters.
[ SIGN THE STATEMENT](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/lQ237CcoQDco3kcKxqsAe5sA9GnSMP2SwpLhfvfYWhJPhk2LCr-_QATZcAwqr9zXkLsf4MDx1Jpw46CgX2y-0_HF1cnwzJEbAvz_UorPOnE7eT-Hbb4mXmbSqwtjpwY1svPotaW717ZARiF3CW_Ayb27iDWnltcuuW6yQWrFoViTtHXVeJP5D_-SsSL2YUDTS6qTqZ_4MPEDMV5y9hiOHfAKmQt_bahD62_GIr9TSHJksPp1jflN7zNc7HXiV2ZudtFCJey5tMdMlyN28sJ1N7H8rxQFPU4PqP0o1TFvSt9y3lVBs8jfNyiL2j-sqjqmSn91ONuyYHUSngX8AymjCxl9t4jwBgFrseu34ps4EEfkuqpQU-zoMax_g6d_QuINF-WKlOiNWmpg1H6BAE25u6kpg1e9NZivyOcfGsbxxcEcWKR54WXW4e6seTZbnhU2OgPr22frGlK-f4Xj6umqJ5Fmzf7RouX0asKnVpNZw8lT81gXD_zjSCj21TN7FnpMyZb-LI8ZAmAkFxAOFLmCfb0HmSn18YWqDjFO4WmYoDjHnCig6rl1f2EbLs4wAp9eVt6d9f8B89KGVU1FT63c1ewVOTCxKP3WbyG9TPSXEDlk6OZidkpsNBAWNSItkFgncQvCrbPkTVoCGtJI2dVMy1bUYOJtO77hXWzkNscH64JZNAOh-RA8A8IL-IGMWzXp1swdWbye2TwGl1kPhXojiftpIAs9JiVhFu9dSfJKwy1zb83JFZe74mJudAeTF6CNruqbiM5n3E0ivL4sWg/kRPXMtckb2A8NYl1cLVTNW9RyPoT13SL/12)

name: Vann Bentley, Team Pappas
subject: Why I believe in Chris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Here’s why this campaign means so much to us:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2098%2E582294%2EatAnZB)
I’m Chris’s husband, Vann.
As we approach tonight’s crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, I wanted to share why this campaign means so much — not just to Chris, but to both of us.
Chris shows up every single day for the people of New Hampshire. I see how energized he is after spending the day with small business owners or meeting students who are counting on leaders to fight for their future. And more often than not, he stays up late reading reports of constituent calls and emails because he wants to hear every voice.
I’ve seen firsthand how committed Chris is to protecting our freedoms and expanding opportunity for everyone. I understand how important it is to Chris that he works as hard as he can for his constituents. And I know he’ll bring that same fight to the U.S. Senate.
[**Right now Chris is just hours away from his biggest monthly deadline yet. If you’re able, I hope you’ll chip in $5 right now to help him meet his $33,000 goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250831_1_vann?refcode=em20250831-2098&amount=5&refcode2=2098_582294_atAnZB&akid=2098%2E582294%2EatAnZB)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250831_1_vann?amount=5&refcode=em20250831-2098&refcode2=2098_582294_atAnZB&akid=2098%2E582294%2EatAnZB)**
Thanks for being part of this campaign. It means the world to us.
❤️ Vann
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

clean_body: Here’s why this campaign means so much to us: I’m Chris’s husband, Vann. As we approach tonight’s crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline, I wanted to share why this campaign means so much — not just to Chris, but to both of us. Chris shows up every single day for the people of New Hampshire. I see how energized he is after spending the day with small business owners or meeting students who are counting on leaders to fight for their future. And more often than not, he stays up late reading reports of constituent calls and emails because he wants to hear every voice. I’ve seen firsthand how committed Chris is to protecting our freedoms and expanding opportunity for everyone. I understand how important it is to Chris that he works as hard as he can for his constituents. And I know he’ll bring that same fight to the U.S. Senate. Thanks for being part of this campaign. It means the world to us. ❤️ Vann New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

Peter,
We wouldn’t be reaching out on a Sunday if it wasn’t urgent. We’re less than 24 hours away from our end-of-month deadline, and we’re still short of our goal.
With Keith’s leadership and your support, we’ve had incredible wins — taking on corporate greed, defending Minnesotans’ rights, and holding Donald Trump and his MAGA allies accountable. But we can only keep up the fight if we stand strong — together.
That’s why we’re reaching out this morning. Our end of month deadline is at midnight and we’re still $5,635 behind our target. In order to fuel this campaign and keep Keith fighting for Minnesota, it’s essential that we make up the difference.
[**Will you donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount right now to help us reach our goal before the midnight deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114353636/566744296/-1990644894?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDAzMzZjMy03Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T4LSY3p2dWMRuL_qQ74xmzoRoW9WlZY5BsV_9896Q6A=)

body:
An Historic Week

| | | [ ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HM6Vx3bJFWn0kHCKwY0V20z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250831_newsletter&n=1)
---
## [Tune in for today's LaRouche Show, starting at 7 pm (EDT)](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFhTLgw59O965B7CMSVsfTuF9f0fO3IOp9RG_KJ2RIE7m&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250831_newsletter&n=2)
---
Friend —
---
In the next days, a combination of meetings, starting with the August 31-September 1 Shanghai Cooperation Organization, followed by Beijing September 3, and then by the Vladivostok Eastern Economic Forum September 3-6, represent an extraordinary opportunity for a dialogue of civilizations. Seventy nations will attend the Vladivostok meeting alone. These are nations that are already assembled, prepared, and positioned to discuss, in general outline form, a new security and development architecture, including with the Presidency of the United States. Many projects are already underway among these nations. As with the meeting that Trump held with President Vladimir Putin on August 15, there are things of great moment that will determine the fate of the human race that can only be handled through face-to-face deliberations. “It is a process of dialogue that forces a change of axioms through a “coincidence of opposites.” In this way, we are able to arrive at a higher idea, giving us the capacity, as individuals, or a society, not only “to see ourselves as others see us,” but to see the seed-crystal of the future in the present and to thereby act, including with our “opposites,” in such a way as to make that future a reality. The horrific genocide in Gaza continues, but the population in both Gaza and in Israel are in upheaval. Because they are human, people there and elsewhere sense that a higher conception of humanity is required or Israel will cease to exist—not simply because it is bombed out of existence, but also because it becomes morally unfit to sustain itself. Helga Zepp-LaRouche's [Ten Principles for a New International Security and Development Architecture ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/for_a_new_international_security_and_development_architecture?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250831_newsletter&n=3)contains that higher conception of humanity that must be the starting point for the end of war. Nations of the world are conveying in Beijing to reaffirm the resolve to uphold what FDR and they achieved 80 years ago, in founding the United Nations. Will the President of the United States miss the opportunity of the next seven days, or seize it? Join The LaRouche Organization's activities and interventions to restore that positive historic role of the American Presidency which Lyndon LaRouche fought for so vigorously for half a century.

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Fellow American!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , **Fellow American**!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Fellow American, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **

name: Laura Gillen
subject: This is my least favorite part of the job:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Our August fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight and we’re still behind.

| Peter,

Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, but I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t urgent.

Our August fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight and we’re still behind.

Trump hasn’t forgotten 2018. Democrats took back the House, blocked his agenda, and held him accountable. He knows what’s possible when we push back and he’s doing whatever it takes to stop us.

But in 2018, Democrats saw unprecedented enthusiasm and raised record amounts of money. Now, Republicans are outpacing us and we need to catch up fast. We cannot take back the House without holding this seat.

| | The Senate may have been out of session this August, but Donald Trump and his allies haven't taken a break. They've spent this summer doubling down on their unpopular policies, spreading lies, and dragging our democracy and our country backward. When we return to the Senate after Labor Day, we'll be walking straight into critical battles — from making sure government works for working families instead of the wealthy and well-connected to defending our democracy itself. Trump and his allies will throw everything they can at us, but I believe in something stronger: the power of people standing together and building grassroots strength that billionaires and special interests can't buy. They've spent this summer doubling down on their unpopular policies, spreading lies, and dragging our democracy and our country backward. When we return to the Senate after Labor Day, we'll be walking straight into critical battles — from making sure government works for working families instead of the wealthy and well-connected to defending our democracy itself. Trump and his allies will throw everything they can at us, but I believe in something stronger: the power of people standing together and building grassroots strength that billionaires and special interests can't buy. = = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Here’s how you can fuel the fight before the deadline: [**🌟 Become a sustainer (recurring monthly donor at $10 or more a month) → receive a WFP Why now? Because the fight for 2026 is already underway. Your donation today fuels the work we can’t afford to put off — recruiting and training captains, securing staff and materials, and expanding the base of working people who power every campaign. If we build early, we build strong — and our champions will be ready to govern boldly. There’s no time to wait. name: The Democrats
subject: Here’s the situation:
body:
---
Derek, In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to [**make a contribution to the DNC ahead of our end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4446_fr&refcode2=4446_22930333_GKJfu0&akid=4446%2E22930333%2EGKJfu0) But first, we want to explain why your support is so important right now. Here’s the situation: In the last month, convicted felon Donald Trump has once again overridden local governance and wasted thousands of taxpayers’ dollars by announcing federal control over local law enforcement and deploying the National Guard for his political ends in Washington, D.C. And at the same time, his allies in several Republican-majority states are working to redistrict House Democrats out of their seats in an attempt to rig the 2026 midterms. **There has never been a more important time for Democrats to take action. With your help, that’s exactly what we’re doing here at the DNC:** We’re investing _big_ in state parties nationwide — across red, blue, and purple states — to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win at all levels of government this year and beyond. We’ve expanded our national organizing program nationwide over the summer, and we’re not slowing down now. To fight back against Trump, we need to activate and mobilize every voter possible, in every state across the country. That means showing up everywhere, and it means competing everywhere. But the truth is, efforts like these take a lot to keep running. When we hit our fundraising goals, we’re able to allocate resources effectively — ensuring that we can continue the fight against Trump while laying the groundwork to win elections this year, take back Congress in 2026, and the White House in 2028. **That’s why reaching our end-of-month fundraising goal is so important. So here comes our question for you, Derek:** [**Will you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense for you today to support our work nationwide and hold Trump accountable?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4446_fr&refcode2=4446_22930333_GKJfu0&akid=4446%2E22930333%2EGKJfu0) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4446_fr&refcode2=4446_22930333_GKJfu0&akid=4446%2E22930333%2EGKJfu0)**
---
****

If you've been looking for the right moment to get involved, we’re here to tell you this is it.
Thank you for your support,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Team –

We’re just hours away from our August fundraising deadline for Hillary’s campaign.

Hillary is building strong grassroots momentum, but summer fundraising has been difficult, and we need your support to help us stay on track.

Building this base matters. It means we can connect with voters, hire organizers, and continue to deliver a new political home in West Michigan.

That all being said, we need to make these final hours count.

body:
The American people want to know what our government is doing to make life more affordable. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW2ls3jz6TXBQ7P5g-yIxVegUuVIorZmvep69JzdpuXGUPEzM37U12sv6zdLhtaXKhACgPcG4JGXOrCdyBaTy5T9CQqMxCLa1qSN7sIlr5c9YO77WHrXJA765RYJU2dDMOvNdr8N5DiQfUumryLLNxv8R8cBhhT_T2vU_me4NE8_MCERTOlC2R67mTVwjRt1mD9HiP0UOr-Mf1Bn3U3wGO7TeCkkaVVnUqsPU8IJyRJVCMOIYfVCxK-0KYZmzmKYJwo2hXS0rtMi_BRvXE65HVd_1N8xGvEuYch_m2mBZPzOg/4ji/7B1K7MF8RryCE9abju4fnQ/h0/h001.-VK7FTLdOZ-oaNUJt2CPna-V0bFYr0mtCN-CTiC0lWw)
---
Friend, When Congress returns to Washington, DC on Tuesday, we’ll have just one month to pass a government funding bill to keep the government running. I have led congressional letters demanding Congress prioritize funding for lead abatement, housing and healthcare for veterans, water as a human right, childcare benefits, and household food safety. While these investments in our communities have wide support among my colleagues—including bipartisan support in some cases—Republicans have already demonstrated that they are more interested in handing tax breaks to billionaires than investing in our communities. **When they passed their Big Budget Betrayal earlier this summer, they voted to rip healthcare and nutrition away from tens of millions of people while handing massive tax breaks to billionaires and corporations.** Then they voted to send billions of taxpayer dollars to the Pentagon and ICE. Even with Republican control of Congress and the White House, we cannot give up. We must continue to demand a government for the people and by the people—not billionaires. [**Add your name now and demand Congress prioritize investments in our communities in the forthcoming 2026 budget, which is being assembled right now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcxHZnxSlQjdtj1uPs2SHrhjwwlhfbe_Ce1rqFYRd17qR57HtsQeueSTphl3f4OLEXj_MEG9g9Qjl2-83Ep9UudgDLLmmUVy4X7ostSciuRGAL5ebkgfr8Lk1YRPpz4nswaLjPob73FaXNwDKvHc5kktBaD-qjxoZ4jaYdQNdUd-8tvdmw3vSON8fvK_SWCFdw1gXkBgqpCrWwjKA69ucEC_A7AYw3IzNFrFYxdtvoF6HJOLXoezNA9wBv_XBZ2lMmGHIJbSQaqpVsneKNCMNpkZ1vNn9BBTu3Va4Xp2Np0yU6IeMkQRLLvAe4ifdTmXdzxWtjCXqcL_bnbO1noFalFA7qEawwONkJ8lxAyUl0ycx0WefKz2Fk37hb-B00ottMsS0qVbIFHa8dczIbBD6zwlnJXrOp8CBNt6FOBZJdbhf_i6qUaf5a4w_OkfhClHrD/4ji/7B1K7MF8RryCE9abju4fnQ/h1/h001.pjYXZztNrkPsmb-lJFjLMlYwj_cn_TOlYxQ7Kp7Arpo) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcxHZnxSlQjdtj1uPs2SHrhjwwlhfbe_Ce1rqFYRd17qR57HtsQeueSTphl3f4OLEXzA9zIelBmyqudkp1wE1GeE3Xd9ot0ew-_siBO3WkMH3qSfqICcRyK51z9Jf9RbHQLMWxfqaQBIpRWlgJGwXwxJeR2TVQg2ibvZVvqER2MFWKKP9PW5ZCPSHTYzZwJYNCyZrzKvm0mEImNhXH61IEbvg487Awuwr0R06Q_M8QFmSPnKHT7WqaACBBo0qcme37kSPFMtHWpS5kihKUPT6UaFjBUGV_cVpNtzJ8qmbq4WE5zcHxa92pL2p0lxCftqZFExoGkXwwAGuoG_GXFrmk1UKzA6_upD43zp6_g4to_rCc1gfk0nSyu09ldImAQpTBYxyW035yhqijM74WQdDamfG3YB7yxGYX42Bm-a0f9Q2dx7ZPYE9bCtbWQsElYHzU/4ji/7B1K7MF8RryCE9abju4fnQ/h2/h001.GBJPdKDJViDTO6psSx1LSmEec1s28tWKhV5DJIBrKdA)
---
Across political parties, the American people are asking what our government is doing to make life more affordable. Although the fascist-in-chief ran on a platform of lowering costs for working people, his policies have done the opposite―causing increases in the cost of food and everyday household goods while cutting essential services and programs.
I will never stop fighting for you and critical investments in our communities. That includes holding this administration accountable for its illegal actions and attacks on vulnerable people, and pushing for a Democratic Party and a broader government that actually deliver what the people need—such as universal healthcare and housing.
Thank you for never giving up in our fight for a just society.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Friend,
We’re just one month away from the expiration of 2025 government funding. That means, when Congress returns to DC after Labor Day weekend, we’ll be finalizing the 2026 budget to be voted on this fall.
**While Republicans have shown that they’re willing to slash everything from healthcare to nutrition in order to hand even more tax breaks to billionaires, we’re demanding a government that puts our communities’ needs first.**

Here are some of the priorities that are critical to my constituents, and which I’m demanding Congress include in appropriations bills:
**$1.5 billion for Lead Service Line Replacement.** These funds would allow states to identify, remove, and replace all lead service lines within the next decade. We’ve doubled the number of supporting Congresspeople since last year.
**$500 million for the Low Income Household Water Assistance Program.** Funding to help pay off water debts, bills, and other water expenses has expired. It’s urgently needed to keep people connected to safe, clean drinking water.
**$600 million for State Veterans Homes.** This has bipartisan support and would allow critical investments in long-term and supportive care homes for veterans.
[**Add your name to tell Congress to advocate for 2026 Appropriations funding for veterans’ housing and clean drinking water—including lead abatement and support with water payments.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39Vp4gkIh90ovDrixVFaBLcxHZnxSlQjdtj1uPs2SHrhjwwlhfbe_Ce1rqFYRd17qR57HtsQeueSTphl3f4OLEXtOPNxXJo3CYq05qNjVkm0ZTyjFSwoWph7tEZBOvBZZed3oD7EW66Dgzk5M-X96EgqCOitr6GQUKnX_kUz99Q3RSgRQw7uaFgHgyWRG8cvt1CyRrwJjWjn7w0CQuWU5jpCEPlE6b9rV6mSCMNlHzv79Sp_-VjN3b4WTxG3vTEcobMY3iLjQnWjLcQRcpTxq5qAwDWo9xH3lKUQa1HbW0RCiW2pj_K3Mg0hGHeDG4nTmnT2_LezXowj4Svh8PJkourWw1zfM1ETBOuVjobEHHfOd_Uguyq-q_jwXha3rGf-UA-BFIIg1ECXn7F8akwRxvK6J5-fAD5W-7zElJm3y96ww9r3rXzIbtJamTTUpFiW5AB1TGyf3Ed0j1JaOLHpFmc/4ji/7B1K7MF8RryCE9abju4fnQ/h5/h001.0Gm3nOXft8Rnhu4VRBR_Vi58qGO5jJgHXo1Ve7jJU00)
Other funding priorities I will never stop fighting for include universal healthcare (including healthcare for veterans), expanded childcare benefits, and household food safety. I’ll continue pushing back against Republicans’ dangerous funding cuts that put our families at risk, and I will continue holding the Trump administration accountable for illegally withholding congressionally allocated funds and illegally dismantling federal agencies.
Together, we’re demanding our government put people first, not corporations or billionaires.
With you in this fight,
Rashida

clean_body: The American people want to know what our government is doing to make life more affordable. | | | Friend, When Congress returns to Washington, DC on Tuesday, we’ll have just one month to pass a government funding bill to keep the government running. I have led congressional letters demanding Congress prioritize funding for lead abatement, housing and healthcare for veterans, water as a human right, childcare benefits, and household food safety. While these investments in our communities have wide support among my colleagues—including bipartisan support in some cases—Republicans have already demonstrated that they are more interested in handing tax breaks to billionaires than investing in our communities. When they passed their Big Budget Betrayal earlier this summer, they voted to rip healthcare and nutrition away from tens of millions of people while handing massive tax breaks to billionaires and corporations. Then they voted to send billions of taxpayer dollars to the Pentagon and ICE. Even with Republican control of Congress and the White House, we cannot give up. We must continue to demand a government for the people and by the people—not billionaires. | Across political parties, the American people are asking what our government is doing to make life more affordable. Although the fascist-in-chief ran on a platform of lowering costs for working people, his policies have done the opposite―causing increases in the cost of food and everyday household goods while cutting essential services and programs. I will never stop fighting for you and critical investments in our communities. That includes holding this administration accountable for its illegal actions and attacks on vulnerable people, and pushing for a Democratic Party and a broader government that actually deliver what the people need—such as universal healthcare and housing. Thank you for never giving up in our fight for a just society. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Aug 30, 2025 Subject: Add your name to tell Congress to prioritize our communities over billionaires To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, We’re just one month away from the expiration of 2025 government funding. That means, when Congress returns to DC after Labor Day weekend, we’ll be finalizing the 2026 budget to be voted on this fall. While Republicans have shown that they’re willing to slash everything from healthcare to nutrition in order to hand even more tax breaks to billionaires, we’re demanding a government that puts our communities’ needs first. Here are some of the priorities that are critical to my constituents, and which I’m demanding Congress include in appropriations bills: $1.5 billion for Lead Service Line Replacement. These funds would allow states to identify, remove, and replace all lead service lines within the next decade. We’ve doubled the number of supporting Congresspeople since last year. $500 million for the Low Income Household Water Assistance Program. Funding to help pay off water debts, bills, and other water expenses has expired. It’s urgently needed to keep people connected to safe, clean drinking water. $600 million for State Veterans Homes. This has bipartisan support and would allow critical investments in long-term and supportive care homes for veterans. Other funding priorities I will never stop fighting for include universal healthcare (including healthcare for veterans), expanded childcare benefits, and household food safety. I’ll continue pushing back against Republicans’ dangerous funding cuts that put our families at risk, and I will continue holding the Trump administration accountable for illegally withholding congressionally allocated funds and illegally dismantling federal agencies. Together, we’re demanding our government put people first, not corporations or billionaires. With you in this fight, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Nick Searcy
subject: I saw what really happened on January 6th
body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=55111962b8ee41ca91612585422c749b&_e=Sd2iyboq0xIpXAz6MBwIRc-h0ALVIYHsUrcUSsyH2KHFM-vCOLVMmZgceQ9tAQYBG0ykwxacbHwM8zAUKbh8USQNJ5aSkiLRrlDvkcwp1Pg5sDJ9ee46EHTp7QWtb-ImMFGt8R6bk2yKh3HwYUR1hIwbxpN4pBBQ-Zz5un31hM8y0-dgzVm0p1-y-kxGwqwRedyNy9S8luRaXuj0zbw7aKaOvuYm_rzzfCwzolzju275XBptQIxZqnN_KEchDVAMyHsBQU_yFBZokjU3IIYpjRZyzFpdBYtFzdOcIbib304f9oGaLxXwYuTBF_ILrrMOQiD6ek2q0Yg0zbjDeGquNns2NwApw5r-AWABafRu6G6a3rXnjZew-fWu7VSjzVe6ogcYQfpE0kX9DHz6Vbs6Yr1b6iEvaxC6xG1UO46CKSsjSVKLh_lFODyPzb8BjjqS_MS9eQEBOTOegvNcFOkXBhmSX_Irhk82bmhLie0TzLH-K9X7OrxSKUdffjGulrYmaaZy9p7DURMCiWWIG0pwtzQ_L2MZ4UaCqR-yokevsW8P5HrJ7TfAUtoK9INX4089VKVYLNwpP2SZu462btJlMOa2DEs_eX9JIzomkS_JAAi2SRoOWrngJp1tdv2dpDOa)

Fellow Patriot,

I was at the Capitol on January 6th.

I didn't see an "insurrection." I saw Americans praying. Singing the national anthem. Waving flags. I saw families, veterans, and peaceful patriots standing up for what they believed in.

**What I didn't expect -- _what none of us could've imagined_ -- was the brutal retaliation that followed...**

Since that day, I've watched in horror as men and women I stood with that day have been hunted down and treated like terrorists.

After 4 long years, the January 6th defendants have finally been pardoned. But the pardons alone aren't enough.

Some are still rotting in jail today.

Others are trying to pick up the pieces of lives that were shattered by a government determined to make an example out of them.

They've endured political persecution, lawfare, and a social stigma that sometimes makes a second chance seem impossible.

That's why I produced the films _Capitol Punishment_ and _The War on Truth_ and why I am proud to support Stand in the Gap, a nonprofit on a mission to provide the help, hope, and healing J6ers need to succeed in their second chance.

They're helping former January 6 defendants and their families rebuild their lives, with legal aid, health care coverage, counseling, housing support, and most importantly -- hope.

[You can help Stand in the Gap give these patriots the second chance at freedom they deserve by donating today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=55111962b8ee41ca91612585422c749b&_e=Sd2iyboq0xIpXAz6MBwIRc-h0ALVIYHsUrcUSsyH2KHFM-vCOLVMmZgceQ9tAQYBG0ykwxacbHwM8zAUKbh8USQNJ5aSkiLRrlDvkcwp1Pg5sDJ9ee46EHTp7QWtb-ImMFGt8R6bk2yKh3HwYUR1hIwbxpN4pBBQ-Zz5un31hM88T9EPU0Uyh28tucsJSDAvIPm57lWCidlsRxl4N9ctKN0PEWHUd5xqXF8uG1R7tR_Vq_He3pPoeFxWD6UR64A_SmNi-yx-6ItbaJ6MuHGOpI2yxCfrmgagDeveKsfx2Ui4U1wPVDI_addk4qCdqLEzVRvqyLpsyn5qHc2-6v762HdcVsUXUQYHB5yN5WjPSEkcWmW4g9zu9_M7sZRlvgegFg7bKXTeAWqWyJqxlywxQq_dICBp2KnunbKWnFeoUiK4YQ7hBgYTWpeA9MsiMTEE5JySyLFVP9Unz5Gu2Bx4cYJKFhueER1J_UBCHGlsHobfTe7rjglbY6GeMdpWBSY6P-K0ErySSfaxt9EeFgmNoJ3v3xsiPFNYpg4M7j-WKYwoA5XMVtNQqLDpsz44pny-Zqzgct7Zj-U8Rx2kw_nSnBmt4vSb5HK2FMcouUZCDkrFvsMk3AXvBlxkkwCNw0VcLlEuOWb1scgiexm2qRcN7w%3D%3D)

[Donate Now](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=55111962b8ee41ca91612585422c749b&_e=Sd2iyboq0xIpXAz6MBwIRc-h0ALVIYHsUrcUSsyH2KHFM-vCOLVMmZgceQ9tAQYBG0ykwxacbHwM8zAUKbh8USQNJ5aSkiLRrlDvkcwp1Pg5sDJ9ee46EHTp7QWtb-ImMFGt8R6bk2yKh3HwYUR1hIwbxpN4pBBQ-Zz5un31hM933jKIaFeNy5aG07t_oneIzIJ2J3f8dhKoIUA32C74wjmzliDYZBMxkYPyf4XK3e-liBX4zf0cfrXVtLdcUjq8yAhao_2sdR_JFqGMtZNkKKqr6G3sxHGNY-ZPV95b8MyY24GtULPTE3w4VDZcslw89vG-gH3wtK3Za1Yj8HRipTV7JvjZ0BUCbcqmQYN07c6YblkGoZM69Bae5cnltgrcoSj1PyZ_LKwiMQVYxeW74rrsRxXxrDmVk6X3d7pUWfnZDO3tDZLvYAnfytjEMaX1WLTC46lUUanF5kJ7sWwtz2lUE65DSNShRCzSYQLWfqk5MonO6gDyqWHB26Iiz3xW5mvZRvawENfF8Or8dyj5OLhxoIh2PLS8K4NDdLZiY5qep1TxXpvalvXX3b_tB8q0TYxVpzHpoSxiaZSjJ4cRuM3nNURVUov0Ug-AzKqcHNgRPVnabbE0B6FPB35dEANDX_c0JoWXLcDJcEe6rWaqPwHQ0S2D63PokOalgxl7a4M%3D)

These are real people just like you and me... Fathers. Mothers. Sisters. Brothers. Patriots. Their only crime was showing up to take a stand for their beliefs.

Every one of them had their constitutional rights violated.

But the media doesn't want you to hear their stories. The official January 6 committee suppressed the full story, cherry‐picking footage to paint the day as an "insurrection" while ignoring the peaceful majority.

The government wants them forgotten.

**But Stand in the Gap has not forgotten the prisoner.**

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to January 6 defendants transitioning back into society after incarceration.

Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten, Fellow Patriot.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=55111962b8ee41ca91612585422c749b&_e=Sd2iyboq0xIpXAz6MBwIRc-h0ALVIYHsUrcUSsyH2KHFM-vCOLVMmZgceQ9tAQYBG0ykwxacbHwM8zAUKbh8USQNJ5aSkiLRrlDvkcwp1Pg5sDJ9ee46EHTp7QWtb-ImMFGt8R6bk2yKh3HwYUR1hIwbxpN4pBBQ-Zz5un31hM88T9EPU0Uyh28tucsJSDAvIPm57lWCidlsRxl4N9ctKGPy4B9xloLIjPFei_t3zchQ7GRLXDxVjDSDkeImKrtSHd2ZXyPJBRN9B0z3-X0sod9X-VMuMaNSntryDeWSTzl89NOfyEkFPh3qvYxBFWF3tvq83C1_3qrALWgjolmdQXqlj3w51eJb2-_VSO5jcS_6KmNGya_OUhZe3VGqgctULNWa8zBifu7s3BAYjpbBk2QfR5rrvRaUqn7WMH6Mchiet_UHl3hjH45yGhwf1LNx6rnSVNicEf19Hjpd9I5BKTg0ftXeV3cgbUSGgdlkyZWmq58G1fYRcU8DAxPIijt-9DRWn1LkQZ8usgbeCBlNppWv_EvM9IbVi4k12bMG0J077NKShRaSuYXxYR64f6bfkH1Jpw672QkD4HGHANa_bro8V_-2TgWINqHN6zxMoCWFWFUoLIlrXeiKbDQLQhTEuIwMXXqeVpyizWMjlqjNBQ%3D%3D)

P.S. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.

Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties in finding a job,
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm,
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives,
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison,
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for January 6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

But they can't do it without you.

clean_body: Fellow Patriot, I was at the Capitol on January 6th. I didn't see an "insurrection." I saw Americans praying. Singing the national anthem. Waving flags. I saw families, veterans, and peaceful patriots standing up for what they believed in. What I didn't expect -- what none of us could've imagined -- was the brutal retaliation that followed... Since that day, I've watched in horror as men and women I stood with that day have been hunted down and treated like terrorists. After 4 long years, the January 6th defendants have finally been pardoned. But the pardons alone aren't enough. Some are still rotting in jail today. Others are trying to pick up the pieces of lives that were shattered by a government determined to make an example out of them. They've endured political persecution, lawfare, and a social stigma that sometimes makes a second chance seem impossible. That's why I produced the films Capitol Punishment and The War on Truth and why I am proud to support Stand in the Gap, a nonprofit on a mission to provide the help, hope, and healing J6ers need to succeed in their second chance. They're helping former January 6 defendants and their families rebuild their lives, with legal aid, health care coverage, counseling, housing support, and most importantly -- hope. These are real people just like you and me... Fathers. Mothers. Sisters. Brothers. Patriots. Their only crime was showing up to take a stand for their beliefs. Every one of them had their constitutional rights violated. But the media doesn't want you to hear their stories. The official January 6 committee suppressed the full story, cherry‐picking footage to paint the day as an "insurrection" while ignoring the peaceful majority. The government wants them forgotten. But Stand in the Gap has not forgotten the prisoner. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to January 6 defendants transitioning back into society after incarceration. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten, Fellow Patriot. With gratitude, Nick Searcy P.S. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties in finding a job, Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm, Harassment on social media and in their personal lives, Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison, And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for January 6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.** But they can't do it without you. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: hey there i really need you today because we are way way behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
grassroots donations make everything we do possible
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h)

Hey There, Ilhan here.
I had just a few minutes this morning to write you this message from my phone.
Long story short, our August fundraising deadline is at midnight and I really need you today.
Grassroots donations from people like you make everything we do possible, from taking on Trump’s corruption, to standing up for an end to the genocide in Gaza, to organizing our working class neighbors in Minneapolis.
I’m asking if you can make your very first donation today and help us get ahead of our midnight deadline.
It’s been a tough month across the board, and our fundraising shows it. Being honest, we are way way behind where we hoped to be by the end of August.
But a donation from you and just a few other people who believe in the progressive movement we are building could turn things around. Really.
We just need you to **[click this link**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250831-1-180&t=2&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h) or one of the buttons below and be one of the incredible people who chips in today.
Please, I’m humbly asking for your help.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250831-1-180&t=3&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1788_791427_fioj-h&akid=1788%2E791427%2Efioj-h)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21075%2E878179%2ElbYJMI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21075%2E878179%2ElbYJMI).**

| | I know that number sounds lofty. But the reality is that campaigns in and around Raleigh are incredibly expensive, whether you like it or not. Advertising rates keep climbing, and if we want to keep this seat red, we have to keep pace. We did it in 2024—raising nearly $2.5M. And we’ll do it again the same way: one dollar at a time, one supporter at a time. **_[That’s why I’m asking if you’ll chip in today. clean_body: | | | Good morning, Peter— I’m writing today with a straightforward request. Our campaign needs to raise $2 million to stay competitive in 2026, and right now, we are about $8,500 short of our August goal. | | | | I know that number sounds lofty. But the reality is that campaigns in and around Raleigh are incredibly expensive, whether you like it or not. Advertising rates keep climbing, and if we want to keep this seat red, we have to keep pace. We did it in 2024—raising nearly $2.5M. And we’ll do it again the same way: one dollar at a time, one supporter at a time. | | | | Thank you, | | | | Brad Knott | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@bradknott.com.

With just 15 hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, we’re still $9,325 short of reaching our goal. To continue fighting back against the Trump administration, we need to close this gap before midnight.
**Any little bit that you can chip in will help us reach our end-of-month goal and ensure we have the tools to keep standing up to Trump and his MAGA cronies.**

body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's end-of-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21986?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250831-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250831-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21119%2E9716520%2EpBe-us)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: They’re putting billionaires over workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
This Supreme Court is on the side of the billionaires. | |
---
Peter, **This Supreme Court is on the side of the billionaires.** It was dark, billionaire, right-wing money that stacked the Supreme Court with MAGA loyalists in the first place. The Court is helping Trump erode our democracy, and has made him a king in America. Who benefits the most from that? The ultra-wealthy and uber-powerful. It’s everyday, working families that are getting our rights stripped away, our government turned against us, and the promise of equal representation stolen from us. [**That’s why Labor Day is the perfect day to stand up, show out, and make clear that We the People won’t stand for a government that puts families last. Join a Workers Over Billionaires rally near you on Monday!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEoihmGTgCvHSCK0P0xirfamg-o8RlTl3M_MVuJLCv1cButeDuwaAYCcrFVYw0wmKz7iMGtk59prEurawB4f4H9AA0UTzELLn4peuSJMg4ASgj1Dsy7W4uo4Z6FhQITk4XVhMCnNI66-ulJmjKv6wURw7TUuV_dfJYsE-EHVdZBZsl9-7v9h26UCnTW7PpsnpCMZa48aN_StPNSHCtoaRH7l7OKYnG1NA60h4zTA1KYHWT9nApWjgbOFq4uw_kF1jR/4ji/JotfTXXxTQmaPRuftRLQpQ/h0/h001.TaZ5Vhvo75DL6KkauUADLCrRqMA2SHwh2O0LXDGUfcE) [JOIN US](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEJWEJPzKhc_m00EbKd-bl4PsugkJB-gGtoweEPnpi98SkTNWjZ7iNy0knnoyRK5JXRfxZZwhIUBOrHVSTe2PvZckAnWdZ0szr4-VO6-HTEDAKuA5tiL0WFtIFio7Skmp7mye8v6mTTCej5vNVSagGlZZlCUFoPjHJypF7gcFRQEEzHOB_F7OoSHmTH5qmPmcFUWVp3u0jScIW_0pCkQgqywpv9Aab15c4_3hsEja-FIjXCU_ahY_OivPN3MpiyGht/4ji/JotfTXXxTQmaPRuftRLQpQ/h1/h001.699j1BOsvWPmymvfGSsxfQl8T7ohogiiq0l8JcufOWs) Trump’s illegal Executive Orders, Republicans’ brazen gerrymandering, and the authoritarian seizing of our government programs and funding is all in service of one class of people: billionaires. The Supreme Court is supposed to stand up for our rights and America’s ordinary citizens. **But the only people that win when the MAGA justices rule are the wealthy and powerful.** [**That’s why we’re joining thousands of working people to make our voices heard this weekend. Find a rally near you, and fight back this Monday!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6p8x1lMSKsjulEVkrLYyeEu2TP6avBJ6dPOuB0VynA6nu3gcZEEXDFRF2gKnlIuOHqerlJibRNVZ4kc_h8ph9cE5FmUO9v1Dw5WnnwBwJ3n1s8c071pMguq_QEgh3iHh9ZbXsufKolXvwz0aGZGkhNa_f2UMdm0UAgd-jyqhQXLQTJWF52eWXPAaDCcYQltvQMespukVlBS_SiZBa5HhDv8y-Rp7u4YKC3AsDcfc9gbWo8vk0Wiv7V280UVFwISAmfD-bhsfLfUSJKX_iORdp3/4ji/JotfTXXxTQmaPRuftRLQpQ/h2/h001.zVyhfQL60wyrZfvsScYrkm7toMBV7eIL1E2v1QfoFiI) Thank you for making your voice heard, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

name: President Trump
subject: Here’s what happened to Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
These changes might definitely affect you, so I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law!
| | | | |
---
## **_MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY!_**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Friend,
These changes might definitely affect you!
Here’s what happened to Social Security:
I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY!

**But don’t thank me yet.**
_Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas._
It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late.

All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY:
_**[DO YOU STAND WITH TRUMP ENDING TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY?](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**_
[YES](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[NO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you,

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump
[END TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Team, We’re just hours away from our end-of-month deadline, and here’s what we’re up against. Republicans have pushed through one of the most damaging bills in years. It guts health care, raises energy costs, and hands massive tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy — all at the expense of working families. Martin Heinrich is doing everything he can to hold Republicans accountable and protect the people who will be hit hardest. But if we’re going to fight back effectively, we need to show strength now — **before our end-of-month deadline at midnight.** Grassroots support powers this work. name: Nez for Congress Finance Team
subject: Why our deadlines matter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter --
Unlike our MAGA extremist opponent, we can't rely on right-wing billionaires to write massive checks to fund our campaign. [**That 's why our small-dollar donation deadline tonight at midnight is so critical.**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/C5wOKRsXutPZ15d-78QkKA~~/AAPPABA~/LlhYHOmtYlZead7upj0tRsJjbbkFwgxduKrm3ttLMIIMhxEkX4GX2KEt1fN4jb6xgfY-cnhCEitPrgGG8Q6afZOdhkLwjd7btsL9WI0ZA7A3OLzChWxQ_8vD2LPKjFp5ZjZsJzwRdCCDTMInXwdUiSBE9-jNw05Jt8D8MxjX-nTETMlMww4_ZHEitXWB8Vm_ixrxLdgCeowOAqURCSKzuEvta_MUou8fFMRdqYam1_zuZDLn8o9W4DpZYP8RG-QiPAsjr4ujY6QRS1wH-cLpM_oFXjCN802GtStIG6hYb0OKTxHaA59FkAyDE3WgQzClAjZbMCLv9uHZKMqnZvwH9AEbYW-9NW2kaClkh8S0FMWqZUFNOMPsykDRqhcom2QP2eXEhKHa4Jzf2Oq88LFxKg~~) Here are just a few things our grassroots supporters help to fund:
* Rent and utilities at our campaign office(s)
* Gas money and travel expenses to help our team get around this vast district
* Salaries for our campaign team; helping us to have organizers on the ground in as many communities as possible
* Communications materials to help us get our message out to voters
* So much more!

[**If you can, please contribute here to help us close our $1,532 budget gap before our deadline. Your contributions are critical to funding our people-powered campaign to give rural Arizona a change in leadership!**](https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/C5wOKRsXutPZ15d-78QkKA~~/AAPPABA~/LlhYHOmtYlZead7upj0tRsJjbbkFwgxduKrm3ttLMIIMhxEkX4GX2KEt1fN4jb6xgfY-cnhCEitPrgGG8Q6afZOdhkLwjd7btsL9WI0ZA7A3OLzChWxQ_8vD2LPKjFp5ZjZsJzwRdCCDTMInXwdUiSBE9-jNw05Jt8D8MxjX-nTETMlMww4_ZHEitXWB8Vm_ixrxLdgCeowOAqURCSKzuEvta_MUou8fFMRdqYam1_zuZDLn8o9W4DpZYP8RG-QiPAsjr4ujY6QRS1wH-cLpM_oFXjCN802GtStIG6hYb0OKTxHaA59FkAyDE3WgQzClAjZbMCLv9uHZKMqnZvwH9AEbYW-9NW2kaClkh8S0FMWqZUFNOMPsykDRqhcom2QP2eXEhKHa4Jzf2Oq88LFxKg~~)

body:
We’ve got until midnight tonight to hit our goal |
#

Big news, Team, **We’re just $1,614 short of our end-of-month fundraising goal.** Midnight is the deadline, and whether we make it depends on what we do together today. name: Team Kaptur
subject: Tonight
body:
| |
---
Friend, Yesterday, Marcy reached out to a handful of our top supporters with an important message. **Our district is shaping up to be one of the most important political battlegrounds in the nation in 2026, and Republicans are already targeting Marcy's seat.** They want to silence one of our strongest champions for working people in Congress and further entrench our state in their extremist policies. That's why they spent $25 million attacking Marcy in the last election, and why they're going to try to buy this seat again in 2026. We're fighting back, friend, because Ohio is not for sale. But we need your support. Our monthly fundraising deadline is _tonight_ at midnight, and we're still short of our goal. Because this is it. 2024 was the hottest year on record — again. Wildfires, floods, and deadly heatwaves are becoming the new normal. And climate scientists are begging us to act while we still have time. I've seen what’s possible when we come together. We've **helped elect 170 climate champions** since we started. We've **flipped entire legislatures**. We've **stopped pipelines**. And we’ve **protected communities** from toxic pollution. But now, we have to go even further. We’re not just fighting Republicans. We’re fighting for _better_ Democrats — ones who won’t cave to Big Oil and corporate polluters. That’s why we invested in tough primaries this year — from Arizona’s 7th Congressional District to Virginia’s Attorney General race — and our climate champions _won._ **[This work is only possible thanks to grassroots donations from people like you chipping in what you can, when you can. So I'm asking you directly: Will you chip in a few dollars before midnight? clean_body: Can I count on your support before the end of the day? | = You know, when I think about the young climate activists I've met over the years — the ones who've told me they're scared about their future, or the parents who worry about what kind of world they're leaving their kids — I’m reminded why this work is so important. Every contribution we receive helps elect climate leaders who reject Donald Trump’s dirty fossil fuel agenda in school board meetings, city councils, state legislatures, and beyond. This is how we end the politics of denial and delay and drive climate action forward once and for all. Because this is it. 2024 was the hottest year on record — again. Wildfires, floods, and deadly heatwaves are becoming the new normal. And climate scientists are begging us to act while we still have time. I've seen what’s possible when we come together. We've helped elect 170 climate champions since we started. We've flipped entire legislatures. We've stopped pipelines. And we’ve protected communities from toxic pollution. But now, we have to go even further. We’re not just fighting Republicans. We’re fighting for better Democrats — ones who won’t cave to Big Oil and corporate polluters. That’s why we invested in tough primaries this year — from Arizona’s 7th Congressional District to Virginia’s Attorney General race — and our climate champions won. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s fight like hell for our planet. xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: Congress is about to gut the National Park Service — the next few days will be critical
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI4ODA3ODQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI4MDUzNTExOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
FINAL HOURS: STOP DEVASTATING FUNDING CUTS

Our team is rallying at national parks and monuments all around the country,
building resistance against the Trump administration’s attacks on our shared
lands and waterways. We need you with us before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to hold the line, Peter.

Renew your LCV membership by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to protect our nation’s national parks, monuments, and shared green spaces >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ RENEW TODAY https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ THIS IS IT, Peter — polluter-backed members of Congress are threatening
to slash billions in funding for national parks, monuments, forests, and historical sites. The cuts are all part of Trump’s mission to open up as much land as possible to
corporate polluters in service of his dirty energy agenda. Please, renew your membership before our midnight fundraising deadline to power our work to protect public lands and waters for generations to come >> https://links.messages.lcv. https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP BEFORE MIDNIGHT >> https://links.messages.lcv. Since his first day in office, Trump and his allies have been working to
overturn bedrock environmental laws, gut land management agencies and staff,
defund conservation programs, and make it easier for profit-hungry polluters to
dig their claws into our public lands and waters. We can’t let this happen without a fight, Peter. Our team launched a nationwide tour of public lands. We’re visiting parks and
monuments, connecting with others who care about the future of our public lands
at hikes, campouts, demonstrations, and town halls, all the way from Maine to
Colorado. But we can’t fight back against these devastating cuts to public lands without
you— and time is running out to make sure Congress hears us loud and clear when
they come back from recess in a few days. Our midnight deadline tonight is CRUCIAL to keep the pressure up! Renew now before midnight to help us build support for public lands ahead of Congress’ September 30 budget deadline >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrM8~ Here’s what’s on the table next month, what our team is out in the field
bringing people together to fight:The biggest cuts to the National Park Service in history, with Trump’s proposed cuts of $1.2 billion eliminating a whopping 40% of their operating budget.
Even more staffing shortages at national parks, adding to the chaos and uncertainty parks staff are already feeling after DOGE’s firings and mass layoffs earlier this year, leaving essential programs and visitor services in shambles at national parks.
Critical cuts and delays to projects like habitat restoration and wildfire prevention that could threaten the long-term survival of our national parks’ wildlife and ecosystems. Our fundraising deadline tonight will ensure we can keep fighting this fight,
but we’re running out of time. Will you renew before our midnight deadline to help us hit this important fundraising deadline so we can continue bringing people together to support our shared lands and waters? >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C7_ With gratitude,

Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12880784&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDUzNTExOAS2&spReportId=MjI4MDUzNTExOAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12880784&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI4MDUzNTExOAS2&spReportId=MjI4MDUzNTExOAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfEA~

name: Wes Moore
subject: I heard Donald Trump had something to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it is again
I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it is again: Deploying the National Guard in D.C. lacks seriousness and is deeply dangerous.
**Peter, I don’t listen to criticism from chicken hawks.**
People who talk tough but have never worn a uniform besides Brooks Brothers suits should not use our service members for political games.
As the commander-in-chief of the Maryland National Guard, I know what they are trained on. I know what it means to ask someone to put their life at risk, and what that means you are asking of their families. This political ploy isn’t it.
If the White House wants to get serious about public safety, they should talk to us. We’ve achieved some of the most impressive drops in violent crime in the country and Baltimore is the safest it's been in 50 years.
**[This stunt by the Trump administration is BS, and it has to stop – if you’re with me, please split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94208?refcode=em20250831-9358&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9358%2E614464%2EvWxCMz)**
Elevate,
Wes Moore
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94208?refcode=em20250831-9358&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9358%2E614464%2EvWxCMz)

name: Team Hick
subject: this email is just two sentences
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO

name: Democratic Senate Update via Team Gillibrand
subject: We’re behind. Trump’s billionaires are ahead.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
They’re trying to intimidate us into silence
Here’s an update on where we stand: 👉 We’re behind on our August fundraising goal.
👉 The far right is already flooding the field with millions of dollars.
👉 If we don’t close this gap before midnight tonight, we risk starting September on defense. Trump and the far right want us to give up — they’re unleashing dark money, attack ads and lies at full speed. But this grassroots team has never backed down from a fight. Every single donation right now is proof that people power beats dark money billionaire dollars. It’s proof that ordinary folks are ready to fight harder than Trump’s allies — and that proof matters most in moments like this. clean_body: They’re trying to intimidate us into silence Here’s an update on where we stand: 👉 We’re behind on our August fundraising goal. 👉 The far right is already flooding the field with millions of dollars. 👉 If we don’t close this gap before midnight tonight, we risk starting September on defense. Trump and the far right want us to give up — they’re unleashing dark money, attack ads and lies at full speed. But this grassroots team has never backed down from a fight. Every single donation right now is proof that people power beats dark money billionaire dollars. It’s proof that ordinary folks are ready to fight harder than Trump’s allies — and that proof matters most in moments like this. = | | = Thanks for stepping up, Team Gillibrand * =

> Hi Peter,

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

clean_body: | Peter — did you see this email from Roy? We couldn’t let you miss his message before our August fundraising deadline tonight. Not with so much on the line. National Republican groups are preparing to spend hundreds of millions on this race in an attempt to defeat Roy. It’s already started. We can only fight back with your help. = Let’s do this! Team Cooper Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Roy Cooper Date: Aug 29, 2025 Subject: Humbly asking... = | = --- Hi Peter, I know you’re probably ready to get this holiday weekend started, and that another fundraising request might be the last thing you want to see from me. But you’re among my strongest supporters, and this is a critical fundraising moment for our team, so I had to reach out. We launched our campaign just over a month ago, and tens of thousands of Americans have stepped up to donate. I’m grateful every time someone chooses to invest in our work — I know it’s not always easy to decide where to give. This month, Republican-aligned groups started spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to defeat me. It’s only the start of what’s ahead. Pundits are predicting this will be the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = --- = --- = --- = --- = --- = --- Thanks so much, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
