Peter,
Aron Johnson here, Jena’s campaign manager. I’ll be blunt: tonight’s deadline is make‐or‐break for our fall plan to get Jena’s message out to the entire state.
We’re only $350 short as of 12:00 pm. If you’re able to help us get there, rush in a donation right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250831-email]
Here’s what your gift powers immediately:
* Phone calls to voters who will decide this race
* Digital ads to reach voters in every corner of the state
* The volunteer and on-the-ground organization we need to win
Jena is running to ensure Colorado remains a place where everyone can thrive. But we need your help to keep this campaign moving forward. Chip in anything you can right now to help us close the books on August in the best way possible. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2508-q3-jg?refcode=250831-email]
With gratitude,
Aron Johnson

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: In a bind. Can you help?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Our deadline is at midnight tonight.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4952%2E35263%2E7ShmC-)
I have a quick, personal request: **Our crucial end-of-month deadline is at midnight tonight, and I need your support.** Not many folks are online and checking their inboxes this weekend — rightfully so! But this has put us in a bind, and we’re still a bit short of our goal for August. Reaching these goals allow me to support Democrats in tight races nationwide. Every dollar gets put to work to defend our values and take back a Democratic Senate majority. So if you can, please consider chipping in before the deadline: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/stb-em-aug25](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-aug25.EOUccb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4952%2E35263%2E7ShmC-)** Thank you for standing with us, Peter. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Thank you for showing up in August
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Looking back on this month, I am filled with so much gratitude for this team. Thank you.
Whether you came to one of Team Lizzie’s Days of Action, showed up at a redistricting rally, signed Gene Wu’s thank you card, called state representatives, forwarded one of our emails, spoke out on social media, or generously contributed to our campaign—your support this past month has meant everything.
In a moment of unprecedented challenges here in Texas and across the country, your actions are an important reminder of why we do this work, who we’re fighting for, and how much we can accomplish together.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250831?refcode=lpfe250831 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250831?refcode=lpfe250831]
We, the people, deserve better and we’re demanding better. I’ve seen the energy and commitment so many are pouring into the fight for fair representation. From the Team Lizzie volunteers from across TX07 who participated in our Days of Action—showing up, standing up, and speaking up for fair maps for all Texans—to the huge appreciation we saw in support of Representative Gene Wu leading the charge with the State House Democratic Caucus against Governor Abbott and Texas Republicans’ shameful surrender to Donald Trump with courage and conviction at a moment where our state and our country need it most.
People across Texas and the country are seeing what President Trump’s administration and Republicans in Congress are doing—and they hate it. What’s happening in Texas—and in Washington—is very unpopular. No one voted to have their voices silenced. No one voted to lose their health care, or to add trillions of dollars to the debt so they can transfer trillions of dollars to the richest Americans.
Trump sees the writing on the wall and directed Abbott to surrender Texas by rigging the congressional map in his favor. We will not stop fighting back.
If you’re able, I’m asking you to make a contribution to our campaign before the end of the day. Your contribution will help us continue to raise awareness, organize across the state, and fight back against this dangerous and undemocratic power grab from now to next November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250831?refcode=lpfe250831]
With your support, we can continue the work to protect every Texan’s fundamental right to vote and to be heard.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250831?refcode=lpfe250831]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: We haven’t been taking it easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
I won’t stop calling for complete transparency. |
---
Hey there, Peter, thanks for taking the time out of your day to read this message. I want to pass along an update on what I’ve been up to this month, but if you’re short on time today, I’ll cut to the chase: **Will you make a contribution to help us build our grassroots foundation? You can use this link:[secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-aug25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114363424/566775346/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWRmZWVkOS04Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gbn7As00Vj8NUevmoUx9xrbGPmuVHhGJuDKP_vdGrCM=)** The House will be back in session next week, but that doesn’t mean we’ve been taking it easy during the month of August. As a member of the House Committee on Oversight, I’ll _continue_ to demand full accountability of the corrupt Trump Administration as well as for the release of the Epstein files. Americans deserve transparency and the abusers who enabled Epstein’s crimes need to be held accountable. Even as the Trump administration works to deport Kilmar Abrego Garcia _again_ , we’re fighting to uphold due process protections for everyone. Violating one person’s rights puts everyone at risk, and I won’t let Donald Trump or his enablers dismantle our Constitution. I also had the opportunity to tour Phoenix College recently. They shared with me that Trump’s funding freezes are threatening critical student programming. These funding freezes are unlawful, and I’ll continue to fight to fully restore educational funding attacked by this administration. **This fight is easier with you on my side, Peter. So please, if you have room to spare in your budget this month, pitch in to help fuel our work:[secure.actblue.com/donate/ya-em-aug25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114363425/566775347/1302243248?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWRmZWVkOS04Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gbn7As00Vj8NUevmoUx9xrbGPmuVHhGJuDKP_vdGrCM=)** Thanks! Yassamin

* * *
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002

clean_body: I won’t stop calling for complete transparency. | Hey there, Peter, thanks for taking the time out of your day to read this message. I want to pass along an update on what I’ve been up to this month, but if you’re short on time today, I’ll cut to the chase: Will you make a contribution to help us build our grassroots foundation? You can use this link:= The House will be back in session next week, but that doesn’t mean we’ve been taking it easy during the month of August. As a member of the House Committee on Oversight, I’ll continue to demand full accountability of the corrupt Trump Administration as well as for the release of the Epstein files. Americans deserve transparency and the abusers who enabled Epstein’s crimes need to be held accountable. Even as the Trump administration works to deport Kilmar Abrego Garcia again , we’re fighting to uphold due process protections for everyone. Violating one person’s rights puts everyone at risk, and I won’t let Donald Trump or his enablers dismantle our Constitution. I also had the opportunity to tour Phoenix College recently. They shared with me that Trump’s funding freezes are threatening critical student programming. These funding freezes are unlawful, and I’ll continue to fight to fully restore educational funding attacked by this administration. This fight is easier with you on my side, Peter. So please, if you have room to spare in your budget this month, pitch in to help fuel our work:= Thanks! Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

body:
I know firsthand how hard it is when your family can’t get ahead, no matter how hard you work.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114363427/566775378/-480163815?refcode=email_083125_eomfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ZhZGNmYy04Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nfmtke1Kcuo0T996s05CQcRp14kqIobVpP_YzJuGC4M=) Team, Andrea Salinas here. Do you have a moment? I want to share my story with you, and why I’m more determined than ever to deliver real change for Oregon families, **[but if you don’t have time, I have to ask: Can you chip in to my campaign before time runs out on our end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114363428/566775379/-480163815?refcode=email_083125_eomfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ZhZGNmYy04Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nfmtke1Kcuo0T996s05CQcRp14kqIobVpP_YzJuGC4M=)** | | **[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114363429/566775380/-480163815?refcode=email_083125_eomfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ZhZGNmYy04Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nfmtke1Kcuo0T996s05CQcRp14kqIobVpP_YzJuGC4M=)**
---
Listen, too many members of Congress have no idea what it’s like to face tough economic times. But I know firsthand how hard it is when your family can’t get ahead, no matter how hard you work.
When my dad was five years old, he immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico, working in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was even in first grade. My parents worked tirelessly, but when it came time for me to go to college, they couldn’t afford both my education and their groceries.
So I had to put myself through school. **It took me seven years — working multiple jobs from painting houses to pouring coffee to pay my way through — but I got my degree.**
That experience fueled my determination to take action for families like mine. It’s what brought me to the State Legislature, where I fought to raise the minimum wage, passed the most progressive paid family leave bill in the nation, and lowered prescription drug prices for Oregonians.
**In Congress, I’m continuing that fight for bold change.**
I’m pushing for legislation to defend affordable health care, fight America’s mental health crisis, keep Oregon communities safe from extreme weather and climate-fueled natural disasters, and so much more.
**And I’m going to keep standing strong against ALL Republican attacks on working families — because Oregon’s 6th District elected me to deliver for regular people,_not billionaires._**
These are big fights,and taking them on has made me a big target for National Republicans. They’ve already spent MILLIONS to try to unseat me in the last two elections, and we only won by building the biggest, strongest grassroots team we could.
**[That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Please, if you’re with me, can you chip in before my end-of-month deadline to help us keep fighting back against Trump, and pushing for the progress Oregon families deserve? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114363430/566775381/-480163815?refcode=email_083125_eomfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ZhZGNmYy04Mjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nfmtke1Kcuo0T996s05CQcRp14kqIobVpP_YzJuGC4M=)**

body:
As part of our push to reach our $9,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, we’ve been going through our supporter records.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250831-5384-footer&t=1&akid=5384%2E420207%2EoyPFpu)
Hey Peter, as part of our push to reach our $9,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, we’ve been going through our supporter records. Here’s what we have on file for you:
**Pramila For Congress** **Supporter Record for: Peter** **2025 Donor: Not yet!*** **Suggested Donation:** [**$3**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250831-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250831-5384&refcode2=5384_420207_oyPFpu&akid=5384%2E420207%2EoyPFpu) **[Pitch in now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250831-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250831-5384&refcode2=5384_420207_oyPFpu&akid=5384%2E420207%2EoyPFpu)**
---
_*Our online records take some time to update. If you've donated recently, with another email address, or by mail, that may not be reflected here. Thank you for your support!_
Here are just a few reasons why reaching this goal is so important:
1. **Trump is escalating his march toward authoritarianism.** He’s deployed the National Guard in D.C. and is threatening to do it in other cities, too. He’s allowing ICE to terrorize immigrant communities. And he’s claiming many people _want_ him to be a dictator.

2. **We need Pramila’s voice in Congress to fight back.** We can’t let Trump’s actions go unchallenged. It’s critical that we keep Pramila in Congress fighting to defend our democracy and build a government that puts working people first.

3. **None of this campaign’s work is possible without you.** Pramila doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or lobbyists. That means everything from our year-round organizing program to our ongoing work to grow the resistance nationwide depends on your grassroots support.

[**Peter, can we count on you to pitch in $3 before Sunday’s deadline to help us reach our end-of-month goal? Your support is critical in this moment.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250831-1?refcode=em20250831-5384&amount=3&refcode2=5384_420207_oyPFpu&akid=5384%2E420207%2EoyPFpu)

In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

Now we need the organizers. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114364144/566778245/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTNlYTk2YjktODM4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uYNgq72Z618kHm5e5US3WkcLJRZuCoofbJ3DK4eLAXA=) | Hey Peter, Our end-of-month deadline is tonight, and I have an important decision to make about our campaign. **At our Friends & Family BBQ last weekend, dozens of people signed up to volunteer. So I have a tough call to make: Can we hire our first organizers to get the ball rolling, or do we have to wait until we have more money coming in? If we can close the gap on our goal by midnight, I’ll be able to give my team the green light to move forward. **So, will you chip in before midnight to help us kickstart our field program? I’m dropping a custom ActBlue link below so I can thank everyone who helps us meet this goal.** [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Aug2025-FR-August?refcode2=Peter**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114364146/566778246/9139517?&refcode=E14992-20250831-DecisionToMake-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTNlYTk2YjktODM4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uYNgq72Z618kHm5e5US3WkcLJRZuCoofbJ3DK4eLAXA=) Fingers crossed,

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s George Latimer’s finance team with an important update. We just checked ActBlue, and our online fundraising is slowing down — putting us on track to fall short of our $10,000 goal. Take a look: = | = As you can see, our fundraising has taken a dip. This means that if we want to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal by midnight, we need to pick up the pace. Our grassroots campaign is powered by people like you, chipping in whatever they can, when they can and with your support, we turn this around and meet this moment. George is fighting for New York in Congress, but he needs your help to stop the relentless MAGA assault on our democracy in its tracks. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Team Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
The solutions that will best serve Colorado will come from the people who call this state home, working together.
I’m committed to the work ahead and would love if you came along for the ride. / I can't make this vision a reality without you on my team.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114365052/566781287/-2054079050?refcode=jtk895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1ZmMzZC04NDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5gm3ZdvuNE29fiVPyJ_tvpuYsHhDgMduRpoIzIQ20s=)
---
Hi, folks, it’s Michael.
I’m running for governor because our state’s future shouldn’t be compromised by President Trump’s chaos or the broken politics in D.C. **The solutions that will best serve Colorado will come from the people who call this state home, working together.**
**[_If you agree, then I'm counting on you to chip in $5 or more toward my campaign's $20,000 end-of-month goal to help me make that happen by midnight tonight_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114365056/566781297/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1ZmMzZC04NDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5gm3ZdvuNE29fiVPyJ_tvpuYsHhDgMduRpoIzIQ20s=)** – but otherwise, I hope you'll give me a chance to explain:
Serving Coloradans means bringing folks in the public and private sectors together to build more affordable housing in our communities so people can live where they work.
It means making mental health services, health care and child care more accessible and affordable to every Coloradan.
It means bringing our education system into the 21st century so Coloradans have the opportunity to thrive, whether they graduate from high school or college.
It means protecting our public lands and building on Colorado’s leadership in the fight against climate change.
And it means forging better politics that show we can still work together and help us drive a stake through Trumpism.
Friend, I firmly believe that Colorado is the best state in the nation. And together, I know we can make it even better by building an economy that works for everyone and a democracy that belongs to all of us – but I can't make this vision a reality without you on my side.
I’m committed to the work ahead and would love if you came along for the ride. **[So if you're in, then please consider making a contribution toward my $20,000 goal before our August end-of-month deadline at 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114365061/566781306/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1ZmMzZC04NDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5gm3ZdvuNE29fiVPyJ_tvpuYsHhDgMduRpoIzIQ20s=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114365065/566781309/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk895-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGU1ZmMzZC04NDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5gm3ZdvuNE29fiVPyJ_tvpuYsHhDgMduRpoIzIQ20s=)

Michael

name: All On The Line Team
subject: The Key Races You Can’t Miss
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Our strategy hinges on your support.
|
---

Peter,
Right now, All On The Line is gearing up to educate voters on a crucial slate of elections in 2025 and 2026, where fair maps could be on the line:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114364992/566781147/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdxNOR_email_20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdxNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNjhjMjhjLTgzODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YS7J-TI0GPKKpABKjAX16_TnX8ZRWU5hYpD1qOAp0U=)
---
**Each and every one of these elections is critical to the ongoing fight for democracy, Peter.**
[**Anti-democracy forces know how much these elections matter. In states like Florida and Texas, we’ve seen their game plan when they win power in a state — change the rules and manipulate the maps to take more and more power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114364995/566781151/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdxNOR_email_20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdxNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNjhjMjhjLTgzODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YS7J-TI0GPKKpABKjAX16_TnX8ZRWU5hYpD1qOAp0U=)
[**The work to win these elections is happening now — and there’s much to do,**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114364997/566781153/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdxNOR_email_20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdxNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNjhjMjhjLTgzODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YS7J-TI0GPKKpABKjAX16_TnX8ZRWU5hYpD1qOAp0U=) from energizing voters to make their voices heard, to pushing back against attempts to manipulate congressional maps, to educating voters about what’s on their ballots. We need to make sure voters know what’s at stake in elections like these.
But it won’t be easy. [**We expect them to invest heavily in these same state-level races, because whoever wins gets to steer what happens next in the fight for democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114365000/566781159/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdxNOR_email_20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdxNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNjhjMjhjLTgzODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YS7J-TI0GPKKpABKjAX16_TnX8ZRWU5hYpD1qOAp0U=) We must continue to fight for fair maps and fair representation — and these upcoming state-level races are a moment for each of us to double down on our commitment to defend our democracy.
**[**Will you make a donation today to help mobilize and educate voters about critical elections and make sure we leave nothing to chance?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114365001/566781160/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_PriStateRdxNOR_email_20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250831-AOTL-Tier1-PriStateRdxNOR_&utm_campaign=PriStateRdxNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImViNjhjMjhjLTgzODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9YS7J-TI0GPKKpABKjAX16_TnX8ZRWU5hYpD1qOAp0U=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Our strategy hinges on your support. | Peter, Right now, All On The Line is gearing up to educate voters on a crucial slate of elections in 2025 and 2026, where fair maps could be on the line: = Each and every one of these elections is critical to the ongoing fight for democracy, Peter. = = from energizing voters to make their voices heard, to pushing back against attempts to manipulate congressional maps, to educating voters about what’s on their ballots. We need to make sure voters know what’s at stake in elections like these. But it won’t be easy. = We must continue to fight for fair maps and fair representation — and these upcoming state-level races are a moment for each of us to double down on our commitment to defend our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you so much, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. subject: We’ve come too far to stop now
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250831-1504-foote&t=1001&akid=1504%2E342411%2EPKTKLi ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Today is the [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250831-movement.5IqL0t&refcode=em20250831-1504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1504%2E342411%2EPKTKLi ]last chance to chip in $3 ahead of
tonight’s end-of-month deadline.

The Squad Victory Fund is backing our progressive champions in Congress —
bold leaders fighting for working families, racial justice, climate
action, and protecting our democracy from relentless attacks by Trump and
his MAGA allies.

With just hours left, missing this goal is not an option. Falling short
puts our champions and our entire movement at risk when we need to be
strongest.

Without the resources to keep up this fight, our movement slows down when
it needs to move fastest. That means fewer people reached, fewer
communities energized, and weaker support for the bold progressives who
are delivering real change.

We’ve come too far to stop now.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250831-movement.5IqL0t&refcode=em20250831-1504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1504%2E342411%2EPKTKLi ]Can you chip in $3 before midnight tonight to fuel this
fight and help us finish strong?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250831-movement.5IqL0t&refcode=em20250831-1504&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1504%2E342411%2EPKTKLi ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1504%2E342411%2EPKTKLi

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT

Fellow American, we noticed you've been quiet lately, and we're getting concerned. The Radical Left is doing everything in their power to dismantle the America First agenda, and we need your help to defend it.

Their out-of-touch policies are a direct attack on our American values, and it's crucial we stand strong against their attempts to undermine our nation. It is more important now more than ever to know who has our back in this fight.

[We need to know if you’re on the team, Patriot. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Thank you for standing beside me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Can you do me a favor?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=663%2E49239%2ETZGEir)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4893?t=2&akid=663%2E49239%2ETZGEir)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4895?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=663%2E49239%2ETZGEir)
Hi null,

Before anything else, I want to say _thank you_. I can’t even begin to express how much it means to me to have you stand beside me as we fight to keep Michigan blue.
Thanks to your support, we’ve had an incredible start: **_Multiple_ polls have shown me leading my MAGA Republican opponent, Mike Rogers.**
That’s HUGE. And even though my lead is within the margin of error, it shows we’ve got real momentum and that working people in Michigan are sick and tired of Trump’s chaos agenda.
But now we need to keep our momentum going. And I want to make sure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to you and your family. null, **[will you take 60 seconds to complete my official Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4895?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=663%2E49239%2ETZGEir)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4895?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=663%2E49239%2ETZGEir)
---
Your feedback will help guide this campaign every step of the way, from the messages we share to the voters we reach out to all across this great state.
**I love Michigan. I grew up here – surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work.** My parents ran a landscaping business, and from a young age, I learned what it meant to put in a full day’s work to build a better future for your family.

I’ve spent my career doing just that. During the Great Recession, I helped lead President Obama’s Auto Rescue, helping save over 200,000 Michigan jobs. Then in 2018, I flipped a Republican-held House seat blue – and helped Democrats take back the House majority.
Now, I’m raising my hand again, this time to fight for Michiganders in the U.S. Senate.

null, I can’t do it alone. This campaign is built by and for grassroots supporters like you. Your voice matters deeply to me, **[so will you share your thoughts and take my official Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4895?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=663%2E49239%2ETZGEir)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It hasn’t been easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
But with a good team, a lot of hard work, and a lot more luck, I made it this far.
#

Folks —
Sometimes I wonder what this guy would think about where he ended up:
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25/.JGniHS&refcode=em250831-2-700k&t=1&akid=6172%2E6688874%2Ee-HpQC)
He had no idea what the next few decades would look like, and he had a whole lot of growing up to do.
It wasn’t easy. It’s not easy dodging surface-to-air missiles over Iraq. It’s not easy flying a rocket ship. It’s not easy when the woman you love is shot. And it hasn’t been easy seeing the richest guy on earth and the President of the United States attack our democracy and drag my name through the mud.
So, yeah, it wasn’t easy. But with a good team, a lot of hard work, and a lot more luck, I made it this far. Much of that is thanks to you and I really can’t tell you how grateful I am that you’ve stuck with me all this time.
And honestly, it shouldn’t take more than that. But I’ve got one more request for you.
We’ve got a fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. And if we don’t hit it, we could be in real trouble.
So, I’m asking: [**Can I count on you for a donation before midnight tonight? We’re behind on our goals, but with a good push we can close that gap. It adds up fast when a lot of people are chipping in, and I’d really appreciate your support.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25/.JGniHS&refcode=em250831-2-700k&t=2&akid=6172%2E6688874%2Ee-HpQC)

subject: new poll shows Democrats TAKING BACK the Senate >>>
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=083125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=083125_1]
Thom Tillis is OUT — and Democrats are already leading in the polls. This is the opening we’ve been waiting for to flip North Carolina and take back the Senate. We can’t waste a second. Chip in before tonight's end of month fundraising deadline to help Democrats win this seat. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=083125_1]
Peter, the map just shifted.
An INCREDIBLY strong Democrat has stepped up to run for North Carolina’s open Senate seat. With MAGA Senator Thom Tillis retiring, this race is officially one of the most competitive - and most important - in the entire country.
And the best news? A brand new poll has Democrats surging AHEAD!!!
This is our best chance in a DECADE to flip North Carolina blue - but we can't take a single thing for granted. Will you chip in any amount you can so we can help Democrats WIN in North Carolina and TAKE BACK the Senate? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=083125_1]

Democrats are polling at 46% and Republicans are scrambling to catch up. If we act now, we can flip this seat, expand our Senate majority, and block Trump’s MAGA agenda in its tracks.
Don't let this moment go to waste, Peter. Rush a donation now so we can help Democrats TAKE BACK North Carolina! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-takebacknc?refcode=083125_1]
Thanks for standing up for Democracy,
The Real Texas PAC

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: Winsome is on a time crunch here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=49ab27f47be940c98b51720019acf137&_e=Qh-9dfohX6nk5kEMOGJkYfg42CB6BgNfLKFxKOBPHPD9doXpqaOzSPxnJZ1fXzjHFHK-OP9udsI-UZQYuN7l7KlbUzSCIBvN81kb_IJV7LaysJLe-uhlJDStL2dpAjuzwUsgju-KtdZX7XhFt3toMXTSNifOefogNIQHUTxmHEsbeo_PYH760ScJwYGEsTjWOchuN4yJiUNCO6cUThydYJxgvXfXzKeBH_dBYZRT4qeCNGoV8ChQhh67asNA2Ip_LFo8RndOC8kxawBBYTKm7-9H5bRFKCPemJz2vYT_3QJ0fpxIzeyNHCFFaODaf4j9eqytLLLyqFb_bIqKV1sO72VzQcgEBp4_Gmi95MZY6D5J9j8suD5sQs6UCpv343UxirgPbfgcxkN4CEdVFlYKzMGJeuoul3V_P3Q0NzEJmWzTvsX_5mKDT7ilydZ3vX8dgNhRCMFM5AX_Sdk8G9edXZrVCjQbAmLBmc3qBlLtwxJfY7CdQMqp9RA_o6UaduBIqa9it3bkxZZB5Tl_nHUzy4yi-jcjNh4zAEsl0hMD8pCTO1--lLMAPOlR3apiF1OkSvT8d2UVvUZglLCtkHx_yA2UcMRORHd-PUhadii6xhpk0au06anIVICkAmATaPCVrhWlUfSsI_t2x5PjdgNOvlbhTutVXwPS5Aakcw-mW2equ9B4-Rp3I3AVwkcq274w)Peter,**
**I'm writing to you today as a big supporter of Winsome Earle-Sears. As the current Lt. Governor of Virginia, Winsome 's story has already inspired kids of all races from all backgrounds. **
**But now, her race for Governor is TIED, and she urgently needs our help to take the lead.**
**As a conservative Christian, I know that Winsome shares our values and will fight tirelessly to protect our families and our freedoms. But despite her impressive record, she's getting outraised MASSIVELY on the fundraising front by her liberal opponent.**
**That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Winsome today. We're not just fighting for bragging rights - we're on a mission to lift families up and create a better future for our kids. But we can't do it without your help.
Winsome is up against a MAJOR deadline, and she needs your urgent support to stay competitive. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Corporate Democrats would rather shoot the party in the foot than embrace young, progressive candidates with bold ideas who have the power to excite voters and deliver real change.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Young progressives are rising — but instead of lifting them up, Democratic
leaders are trying to shut them out.

Candidates like Zohran Mamdani in New York City and Omar Fateh in
Minneapolis are running groundbreaking, working-class campaigns that are
actually energizing voters in a time when so many are disillusioned after
the 2024 elections. But Democratic elites are refusing to support them.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250831?refcode=em20250831-36975&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36975_1203867_TrfR7T&akid=36975%2E1203867%2ETrfR7T ]A post on X from @MohamedGula reading: 'First they abandon Zohran, now
Omar. @TheDemocrats have no loyalty to progressives, especially when they
look and sound like us. Tired of the performative 'big tent''.

In Minneapolis, the Democratic Farmer-Labor Party initially endorsed Omar
Fateh for mayor at the state convention in July, but party insiders later
rescinded its endorsement. Justice Democrats-endorsed Rep. Ilhan Omar
signed onto a letter with other local leaders calling this “a stain on our
party for years to come,“ and said, “It is inexcusable to overturn the
results weeks after the convention because board members did not like the
outcome.”

In New York City, Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and House Minority
Leader Hakeem Jeffries have so far refused to endorse Zohran Mamdani — the
Democratic nominee for mayor in their own city, who’s surging in the
polls.

The establishment is sabotaging our future,
Peter.

Corporate Democrats would rather shoot the party in the foot than embrace
young, progressive candidates with bold ideas who have the power to excite
voters and deliver real change. We have no doubt that this is how the
establishment will handle Congressional races, as well.

That’s why Justice Democrats exists. Our mission is to elect unapologetic,
working-class leaders who will transform the Democratic Party into one
that finally fights for all of us.

Next year’s elections are a major test for us. We have new congressional
candidates like Donavan McKinney in MI-13 we need to elect. We have
fearless incumbents to defend. We need your help to grow our power and
win.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250831?refcode=em20250831-36975&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36975_1203867_TrfR7T&akid=36975%2E1203867%2ETrfR7T ]Can you chip in $5 before Sunday’s end-of-month deadline
to stand up to the Democratic establishment and power progressives to
victory in 2026?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250831?refcode=em20250831-36975&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36975_1203867_TrfR7T&akid=36975%2E1203867%2ETrfR7T ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250831-36975-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36975_1203867_TrfR7T&akid=36975%2E1203867%2ETrfR7T

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36975%2E1203867%2ETrfR7T

body:
Reagan asked me to make to make sure you saw this | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=a903e149fe&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/64b366a47df5/fw-an-unmitigated-disaster?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=380cd14115&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Hi Friend,

Reagan asked me to forward this email to our closest supporters and make sure they saw it before the end of the month. If you haven't had the chance to read about the findings of the audit last week, I highly recommend reading below.

_Today is the final deadline_**** before we report our August fundraising totals. If you would be willing to [make a quick donation](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=f4e2a73911&e=77eef70c61) to [help us reach our end-of-month goal](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=7a1d85aceb&e=77eef70c61), it would be a HUGE help! Every cent raised will be used to help Reagan continue to fight for accountability and fiscal responsibility and to keep our communities affordable. \---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=5d297bc43f&e=77eef70c61)
\--------------- Thank you!
Team Dunn

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**
From: **Reagan Dunn** <[info@reagandunn.com](mailto:info@reagandunn.com)>
Date: Wed, Aug 27, 2025 at 9:54 AM
Subject: An unmitigated disaster
To: Friend

Friend,

Yesterday, the King County Council heard the final report of an audit I called for of the Department of Community and Human Service's taxpayer funded contracts. The results of the audit were jaw dropping.

While grant funding increased from $22 million in 2019-20 to **more than $1.5 BILLION **in 2023-24, accountability was nowhere to be seen. The audit uncovered shocking abuses: potential fraud, payments to unapproved subcontractors, altered or forged documents, overspending, and even taxpayer funds being withdrawn as cash.

**Let me be clear, this waste of taxpayer dollars is an unmitigated disaster.** [Watch my interview on KOMO News.](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4281fbb84e&e=77eef70c61) [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=2d441ed06c&e=77eef70c61)
I have been warning about a lack of accountability for years, which is why I requested this audit back in 2023. Sadly, my worst fears have been proven right, and I have already introduced legislation to increase accountability and transparency of these funding programs. **[Support my campaign to protect taxpayers!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=aae9b904da&e=77eef70c61)**
Friend, when I talk about being the last line of defense in King County, **this is what I mean**. Without my persistent demands for this audit to be conducted, these scandalous findings might have never come to light.

That's why I'm running for reelection -- to fight waste and fraud, protect taxpayers, and keep our communities affordable. But I can't do it alone. **_[Will you chip in $75, $50, or even $25 today to ensure King County has a voice standing up against fraud and waste?](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=984b56b878&e=77eef70c61)_**

This election is too important to ignore! Taxpayers literally _cannot afford_ to continue to pay for higher taxes while funding millions of dollars of fraud and waste. I am fighting to protect your pocketbook at the King County Council. With your support, we can win this November and continue to safeguard taxpayer dollars. \---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=45fc74057a&e=77eef70c61)
\---------------- Thank you for your support!
Reagan Dunn

name: Nikki Budzinski (personal)
subject: In the crosshairs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Hi friend, Nikki here. I want to thank you for your continued support ahead of tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline.

I just got off the phone with my finance director, Nadav, and he tells me that we’re one last push away from meeting our goal.

Before I ask you to **[contribute $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114366622/566787409/-550958566?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM0NDJiOS04Nzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwbDEmhe5UGy9qWGCo9Q4E4a44wvAwx9tD22B111nlY=)** , please let me explain.

I have two Republican opponents in this race, and a whole lot of national GOP attention and attacks come from that. While they focus on aligning with the MAGA agenda, we’re focused on our local communities in IL-13 – from Champaign, to Springfield, to Decatur, and everywhere in between.

While the House has been in recess, I’ve spent my time traveling across downstate Illinois to listen to the concerns folks have with what’s happening in Washington. I’m heartbroken by the stories of families struggling to make ends meet, and how the GOP’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” threatens their health and their ability to put food on the table.

I’ve dedicated my career to doing right by working families. I helped lead the effort to pass a $15 statewide minimum wage, expand rural access to broadband, and now in Congress, I’m prioritizing those who are now being left behind by this White House.

This fight isn’t easy, but it’s essential. While it’s tough to make progress in the minority in Congress, I’m getting it done – and I need your help to keep pushing forward.

The national GOP is already eyeing this seat as a key piece of their mission to expand their majority next year. I flipped this seat in 2022, and I’ve been in their crosshairs ever since.

I know the midterm elections seem far away. But early momentum will be crucial to keeping me in Congress fighting for you. If you believe in fighting for working families, **[$3 or any amount today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114366624/566787411/-550958566?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM0NDJiOS04Nzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwbDEmhe5UGy9qWGCo9Q4E4a44wvAwx9tD22B111nlY=)** will fund the voter outreach efforts we need to protect IL-13.

Thank you, and have a great rest of your holiday weekend!

Nikki
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114366626/566787413/-550958566?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTM0NDJiOS04Nzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jwbDEmhe5UGy9qWGCo9Q4E4a44wvAwx9tD22B111nlY=)**
---

* * *
Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States
Paid for by Nikki for Congress
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/p/e8jmxCqJNkS72mawkeDcaA2?unsubscribedata=4NTgcZI6niYbxpqBdUbu1nQAtfJ2e2FjMzKX9IAoEsFsmwuwsy%2FtP8mHR%2BkC5eu3biTMiWCxmL3H2fTtM7OTKaJX7LUotuUd1ZyjqgVpeBYEoAnJZ0%2FNRrpNjx1xDMAD%2B5p7oTTAg1%2BZbRtkr16%2BGDujyB0%2BNHr5OBFwFVbHyWKxXGqrViwv0t%2Fg0ubxpBlg%2FM5L06ArP2nSd2V0qO2aZ3QNn%2BJQfd4u6paTGcI2rlvLeInKXdbZ%2B18TKc8Xonn7SWIC6tjSCgt%2BltQty%2Bw56%2Fl98xCyF6WOUKrwfBxVLtK4FJoAJGbULCAOU9%2FjdFIhApfeVoU7RA2VwJrl98THZTQX8PEZOdCaaeYi%2Bks6lfuWpN1IqJRgwJb3FDwQm0kYGVMRdMofK6xvk11QjKCH46SIj3CnWzO1cKqHHmVa6vwO0R7rHXztfkqLuLFlQHx9)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I can’t do this without you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8935%2E5257348%2E-2sANm)
Hi Derek —
I’m reaching out one last time before tonight’s critical end-of-month deadline.
From my time leading the first impeachment trial, to my work on the January 6 Committee, to my work these days in the U.S. Senate, I’ve never backed down from holding Donald Trump accountable.
That’s made me a target. Trump and his allies at Fox News have spent years attacking me with threats, insults, and outright lies. But I won’t be intimidated, because I know I’m not alone.
Every time someone like you stands with me, it sends a message: We’re not going to let Trump’s lawlessness go unchecked. We still believe in truth, justice, and our Constitution.
**If you’re able, I hope you’ll pitch in before midnight. Every donation helps power this fight:[secure.actblue.com/donate/q32025_abs_em](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=q32025_abs_em.YYaWHs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8935%2E5257348%2E-2sANm)**
Thank you for being in this with me. I’m so glad to have you on my team.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8935%2E5257348%2E-2sANm)

I’m proud to be one of the leading lawyers in the ongoing fight to defend democracy and protect voting rights in the face of Republican extremism. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for _their_ own gain. **But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it.** My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. Your support – right now – will help Democrats defend democracy in the courtroom and stop attacks on our elections. Right now, we’re seeing Donald Trump and his cronies launch an assault on our government and the rule of law. They’re spreading dangerous lies, attacking our institutions, and working to undermine our democracy for their own gain. But here’s the truth: We’re not going to let them get away with it. My friends at the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State are standing up to these ongoing threats, but they can’t do this alone. They need Democrats like you in this fight, friend. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: We’ll be straightforward with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’ll be straightforward with you: before our end-of-month deadline, we’re coming to you with an important ask.
We’re going to lay out why a $5 contribution from you — especially before tonight’s deadline — would make a significant difference for our work together, but if you’re ready to chip in now, please make a contribution below to your personal link:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250831?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/34703?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20250831-9645-&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9645%2E2526796%2Ec4pcK3)
Here’s the work your contribution is funding:
* **Building resources to make local and community-focused impact:** From distributing thousands of backpacks across her district to make sure children started the school year off on the right foot, to raising funds for progressives battling Republican gerrymandering in Texas _**just this week,**_ Alexandria has always been laser-focused on supporting working class communities.
* **Standing up for accountability in Congress:** Alexandria's work on the Energy & Commerce means that she's on the frontlines of defending MAGA attacks on healthcare, Social Security, and energy policy. But right wing extremists are more powerful than they've ever been, and Alexandria has noted how much harder holding them accountable has become.

Alexandria can’t do this work alone — she needs a movement alongside her.
And when we’re able to post strong fundraising numbers, we're able to expand our movement, elect more progressive leaders, and keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for us all.
If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a $5 contribution before our end-of-August deadline?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250831?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/34703?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20250831-9645-&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9645%2E2526796%2Ec4pcK3)
Together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Thank you,
Team AOC

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9645%2E2526796%2Ec4pcK3). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: speak@ocasiocortez.com

As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $25 contribution would help us counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters.
[_**So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute that $25 (or even more!) right now so we raise the resources we need by tonight's end-of-month deadline? name: Wesley Bell (personal)
subject: This country is teetering on something that we can't come back from.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
For me, this has always been personal. I’ve spent my entire life believing in the promise of America, Peter.

Growing up in North St. Louis County, in a proud union household, I learned early that democracy only works when ordinary people are willing to stand up for one another.

My grandfather went on strike at a steel mill in 1967 so his coworkers could earn a fair wage. My stepfather wired homes as a proud member of IBEW. And when I was waiting tables at Shoney’s to pay my way through school, I carried the lessons I learned with me.

I believe that dignity comes from work, fairness comes from standing together, and justice comes only when we fight for it. But right now, what we’re seeing at the hands of one man and his extremist movement is pushing our country to a breaking point. America was never designed to function on division, fear, and self-interest, yet that’s what some would have us accept.

I’ve dedicated my career to public service, whether it was as a public defender standing beside the most vulnerable, as a Ferguson City Councilmember fighting for real police reform, or as St. Louis County Prosecutor taking on a broken system to make it more fair and accountable, I’ve seen firsthand how fragile justice and democracy can be.

Now, in Congress, I carry those lessons with me every single day, but our democracy is only as strong as we let it be. Right now, it desperately needs good people who are willing to stand up, speak out, and fight back against those who would rather see it crumble than fight for anyone but themselves. **Before we fall short of our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal for August, can I count on you to chip in to help me close the gap? >>** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bell-2025-q3-email&refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114367058/566789487/554393595?ms=em25_250831_eom4_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em25_250831_eom4_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em25_250831_eom4_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250831_eom4_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=5MPpVv8Mb0s0/NSdPeDbJJpGi2cNjQbBAtfZGB7E4R2ua4geGEek2D+4GsUGpkH/N04QQXdmHXHRr1V6R6ZOPEK/sUCYPoqH7dZ0QgMxRkgJtNXLINacSU/Ftd6f0lblkBAWcIPJUqfAzE+c/hBgZ2xlfCif+gKttpFFshJkJZA=&refcode2=9bc580e8-8b86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWJjNTgwZTgtOGI4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UO0g4bXd338B1di_1lwPUoAJL-KuytPQL6rbqiSxgSA=)**

Thanks for always being there,

Wesley

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: From the restaurant to the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Fight billionaires. Tip your waitress.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3314826c-149b-4da7-9e9a-11de68f9b478/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| What’ll you have, Peter? I’m running for Congress, but I haven’t stopped waitressing here in Eau Claire. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta61364b3-bd25-40ca-bda5-4c20db5e30dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve been serving since I was a teenager – helping to put myself through school and make ends meet. I love this job, and I think there’s real dignity in hospitality work. I also believe the lessons you learn waiting tables can apply everywhere, even in Congress. This campaign is built on the same values you learn on the restaurant floor: hard work, respect, and showing up for people, no matter what. I think Washington could use more of these values -- and fewer career politicians and billionaires who’ve never worked waiting tables in their lives. That’s why I’m running - and that’s why I’m asking: [**Can you throw some love into the tip jar for my campaign and Blue Amp Action to bring real change to Washington? Chip in $10 today.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb502bfb0-21f8-4d33-82a4-6b841c6895aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T963b9625-30cc-4e0b-ac99-e5998346ba76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21ec1341-bed4-4ea1-8395-d1b3f5a6e1ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb107027-fda8-4512-b8b7-74cf7ccefc7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you for backing a campaign and a candidate that never clocks out. Rebecca
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20250831_cooke-tip_b2_f1_s1_c1_warmup_n-t1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf38863a0-96fe-4b5e-9e6a-65bd9434b88b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: Emily Randall
subject: My neighbors understand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
We had 200 people come out on a weekday night in Tacoma to discuss our fears and hopes about this moment we’re facing.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114368707/566794735/1134054401?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.08.31_TownHall_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjNhM2I1MS04ZDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pOIoVYr3asVzRA6h31NBItfCPgquArHmFNlbf5i6UvA=) My neighbors who attended are concerned about the authoritarian Trump regime. But they’re also worried about everyday issues. Groceries. Gas. Prescriptions. Rent and mortgages. Trump and the Republican Congress have done absolutely nothing to help working people afford basic needs._**It doesn’t have to be this way.**_ Our team is organizing to elect champions for working people at every level, from the Washington legislature to Congress – plus, we’re using every tool at our disposal to communicate a positive vision of _**a government that works FOR us, not against us.**_ _[**That work is powered by donations from folks like you giving what they can, whether that’s a big check or a few bucks a month. Peter,

Did you know that the average American consumes over 150 pounds of added sugar per year?

MAHA is working to change that -- but we can't do it without guidance from Patriots like you.

We want your input:

🍎 Should SNAP benefits prioritize fresh fruits and vegetables?

🍎 Which programs should MAHA fund next to fight chronic disease?

🍎 How can we make healthy food more accessible for every family?

[**CAST YOUR VOTE**](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=16eeb3f2d1b04d469275a57f100a7540&_e=0RHxe-SrWUM3ESRkYFBTCLp70HcEJdLgjIoA9xCrOOqAyhLhu2BqE4Vn2VQy4zUBesBeYcm82Y3WSPsuj-N7od54yHGqHLX8sDcPGpll3AKDOOzmVeumJF0OB8p1Id7r9prOgXFIJWM49OCN__bUnvwU-YDv3dcRWbP8N7qy_7p4s_vWTe6PKVsNgQIC_NCXHgXoeVMTJUHZzO3qiSc2qKBjE5WWIsLIkB4p7wCh2zN7V9drXVfosMdqdSHRd-iNoboJ8YhUFiJpohwM9U3PbuOFRIRrFKytRbau0DNcInF-sOntxNRPfzljXKSLx7bVb8gNZ2LvuaVpg486zi4gE7MNwWkG3fSLeQo2fqa6K7qooKS6qL1BkpRFVY3LLrrdrQLUedfkxx37rKLpwjaFV0QKVrbeJrG7gBihl-4wrvuD2YX6SlDjE_D6xlQTeMkWIRZiHbS8H70th8P-UVtCXikRAkvCYnvSPTRyytuJxSZJd1OLZ5WyWFC1mt0KgFOiY0rlM6JQUtSr2z2HUPYkcPxl4IPcaqz3aiYoP4yg0b2neBdqZ_aatWr3M0enlRZTSP8lz2aOqSTqlMdUZJxJ9g%3D%3D)

Your response will help direct MAHA's next initiatives, making a real impact on America's health.

Join thousands of other supporters in shaping a healthier future -- your voice is missing if you don't act today.

[**CAST YOUR VOTE**](http://links.futureprosperityinitiative.co/u/click?_t=f00dcde1db774f098464bf29925dbc77&_m=16eeb3f2d1b04d469275a57f100a7540&_e=0RHxe-SrWUM3ESRkYFBTCLp70HcEJdLgjIoA9xCrOOqAyhLhu2BqE4Vn2VQy4zUBesBeYcm82Y3WSPsuj-N7od54yHGqHLX8sDcPGpll3AKDOOzmVeumJF0OB8p1Id7r9prOgXFIJWM49OCN__bUnvwU-YDv3dcRWbP8N7qy_7p4s_vWTe6PKVsNgQIC_NCXRmKbaH5Ze0gCb84UWO4tC1zZUshb77WACi58t00SyoOjJDNXqlrquIPR_BOYoCOVTeewdQ55fya_oIvZMC5ZsRsilFUwDbNkHZu4KXM-C7-HZjnExSk-H8l6nesTJ8CUwhcaO4GCyw4xEXtFLDRz6imJk8BInxdhMOAaO2VbfSK3SfsAwq4MPZAbYZLZOYnjkDee9mpyAY1Z7FapTAg4BDKH6RgCL4S5QXaY-qX-qfaHIDJkHo6LAS54GasyuNb_4wbDfro9CIjhXaSMZ_-kL5qOh7sFJnk8CZEo-yuHO4nJJJTqYtzPeacIkkUNez6IGY1KPgFD4h4EeelfumHwwlyrX_EUFwOgLmqG0CISHxvsiNmD6Nv095BXiyREgUrWmW2wsTZkHw3mhYSBK0l0mA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Help guide the next step in fighting chronic disease | | Peter, Did you know that the average American consumes over 150 pounds of added sugar per year? MAHA is working to change that -- but we can't do it without guidance from Patriots like you. We want your input: 🍎 Should SNAP benefits prioritize fresh fruits and vegetables? 🍎 Which programs should MAHA fund next to fight chronic disease? 🍎 How can we make healthy food more accessible for every family? Your response will help direct MAHA's next initiatives, making a real impact on America's health. Join thousands of other supporters in shaping a healthier future -- your voice is missing if you don't act today. Thank you, Andrew Team MAHA Future Prosperity Initiative (FPI) was founded on the belief in America's enduring promise of opportunity. | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
The power of the people is always stronger than the people in power
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=670%2E181023%2EKr8hh4)
Hey there — sorry to bother you on a Sunday. I’ll make sure not to take up too much of your time.
**[We’re in a toss-up race here in Michigan, and we’ll need a solid foundation to win the Governor's race. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 before tonight’s fundraising deadline?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/585?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ZUaTEC&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=670%2E181023%2EKr8hh4)**
[PITCH IN $5](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/585?c0=jmb-em-q32025.ZUaTEC&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=670%2E181023%2EKr8hh4)
---
[PITCH IN MORE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=670%2E181023%2EKr8hh4)
---
We need to take our campaign’s message of making Michigan a place where anyone can thrive all across the state to win this toss-up race. I’m laser-focused on reaching Michiganders day in and day out to ensure they know about my agenda to lower their childcare costs, bring high-paying jobs into our state, protect our rights and freedoms, take our public education to the top 10 in the country, and so much more.
But reaching voters with our message takes resources — and we’re up against some big spenders in this race who are working to drown out our voices.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: $15, $10, $5 — even $1 for VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It’s not always the right time for everybody to donate. But if you can afford to give — even if all you can afford is $1 — we’re hoping you’ll take that step.
#
Peter:
$1 for VoteVets.
Yes, just $1. That’s all we’re asking you to chip in today.
$1 because the people who matter the most to VoteVets aren’t the ones who write the biggest checks. They’re the ones who were there when it really mattered.
$1 because we have an important end-of-month deadline on Thursday, and we are behind on our goals.
$1 because we’re hoping that everybody reading this can afford to chip in at least one dollar and help us make up some ground so we can hit our goals by Thursday’s deadline.
It’s not always the right time for everybody to donate. But if you can afford to give — even if all you can afford is $1 — we’re hoping you’ll take that step. The real strength of this organization has never been massive donations. It’s supporters like you. People who are willing to step up when it counts and power our work with whatever they can afford to give.
Those donations have defeated more MAGA Republicans than we can count, and replaced them with Veterans. Leaders we can count on.
[**So, if you’re in, make a donation of $1 (or more, if you’re willing) and help keep VoteVets in fighting shape as we ramp up towards the 2026 elections.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250831-1-120&t=1&akid=34580%2E3013755%2E-FuVef)

Thank you so much,
The team at VoteVets

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Millions of voters at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
CBS: Experts warn the proposed SAVE Act could make it harder for some married women to vote. Here's who could be affected. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_1&amount=25]
The SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights and passed the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
PITCH IN $25 RIGHT NOW TO STOP THE SAVE ACT NOW ➜ [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_1&amount=25]
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_1&amount=50]

https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083125_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083125_1&amount=20]

name: Carolina, United We Dream
subject: Rest, dreams, and justice
body:
Our fight for liberation is deeply interconnected. | | | Hi Peter — I’m reaching out to wish you a Happy Labor Day weekend on behalf of all of us at United We Dream, and share a bit about the importance of this holiday to our movement. Labor Day recognizes the movement that secured so many of the protections our labor force relies on — like paid time off, weekends, and more. Rest is revolutionary, Peter, and that cannot be forgotten in this fight. Our fight for immigrant justice acknowledges the need for our rest and dreams for the future, because our communities are worth so much more than our labor and contributions. As working people who power this country and our communities, we know our fight for liberation is deeply interconnected. We don’t just power our country, _we power ourselves_ through love, tenacity, and unshakeable courage to show up and fight for what our people deserve. **As we collectively face a moment meant to divide us,****_we have to have each other’s backs._** **** **** [**United We Dream is training and empowering rising organizers across the country, building the community-powered solidarity we need to fight back. If you’re able, help us stay organized with a $5 donation today:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-Ttq7cYP9JPH-HqZyYDANWK0hO_e_uLyUE4aB1HwccfCy9T6qejyJb7DpuJ5WEUxkqa4X6GAu5pHCHfWFlS6lDxt2J7qGrUyYIk_aXf6yx9qJcSY_sWpyT7vD_A29CyHviVIX445CmV3ntOUm39do4wzKqMvFDdn9MqySdLykl5u97lavXE03lvNCFBjZxc45zHXHzSGYCZ7jcDOx2XKp4WBf-jwJbxs3gYHZ3XIl2aiNz9iBkdOlF6e-ziBTSJjz9u20G9r59frlexxhNg7vRly1Ae3rgkIOvur7kdBifSoJPvfaUqGuyRuMsEghqIsB2KI3OaCFtT6y1qCQxT-s9ZB-kON1qn4jcEueNNKm5kwOJiD5OitGIXUPf3kR7e-j0Cg/4ji/QsI4HaYXTiSf5YaOhMD3NA/h0/h001.zn0OiCvdnsn5idsuuKKZaz3SIbC7Jikh55vXewiks1I) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-Ttq7cYP9JPH-HqZyYDANWK0hO_e_uLyUE4aB1HwccfCy9TVtwtQzuNlkXA7ohRByAvN7YJN0mdKNl12Gcz6mDD8Hq5ON8rgyFHWYQblDdrRtQd28v768vMxyVNSwDfBoL_O99Sq3MIbICA7bw96e4PCCi0ynvHMBIVqfxCKqOHR4qID-O_IJbfH86rWaiVpiD5IZIC5o_a6H_YDiZIngIUcwyGYoNuDqm5jJYQ1NxNgJ4HMeh8wBHE8rHaiB191j5GpOb1bz4Mq-PJHdNuL78kkZDVN8K-CCoxl4FiIR4HKzchYq48n2zSE15694ydLUiXJs_JRwdncI9dmJcck0G4T9fwR4Vf5167ugdnXc6C8SFD6_GmQzaHH689nlPt9-JcYUgBjlYhbLRcK15tl2DgG0/4ji/QsI4HaYXTiSf5YaOhMD3NA/h1/h001.y2HG_9E6p7EXF6VM7vX-b6UpCdXlezMjEt5YVLrr91c)
