clean_body: Our fight for liberation is deeply interconnected. | | | Hi Peter — I’m reaching out to wish you a Happy Labor Day weekend on behalf of all of us at United We Dream, and share a bit about the importance of this holiday to our movement. Labor Day recognizes the movement that secured so many of the protections our labor force relies on — like paid time off, weekends, and more. Rest is revolutionary, Peter, and that cannot be forgotten in this fight. Our fight for immigrant justice acknowledges the need for our rest and dreams for the future, because our communities are worth so much more than our labor and contributions. As working people who power this country and our communities, we know our fight for liberation is deeply interconnected. We don’t just power our country, we power ourselves through love, tenacity, and unshakeable courage to show up and fight for what our people deserve. As we collectively face a moment meant to divide us,we have to have each other’s backs. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Another world is possible, and today and every day, we’re bringing it to life in our every act, our every breath, and every dream. In solidarity, Carolina, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

name: David Hogg
subject: We’re almost there, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re just hours away from our August end-of-month deadline.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250831-1&t=1&akid=2598%2E587540%2Eq9A24t)
Peter, I’ll keep this brief:
We’re just hours away from our August end-of-month deadline. _And we’re still short._
**Right now, we’re at 75% of our $25,000 end-of-month goal.** _That’s not good enough_ — not with everything on the line for our movement. Not when young candidates are counting on us to help them break through the noise and build winning campaigns.
We can’t fall behind. **_Not now._**
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to give — this is it.
**[Chip in $5 or anything you can before midnight tonight to help us close the gap.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250831_1_eom?refcode=em20250831-2598&amount=5&refcode2=2598_587540_q9A24t&akid=2598%2E587540%2Eq9A24t)**

Thank you for being part of this.
—David

Gavin Newsom’s Stop Election Rigging Response Act, _which neutralizes efforts by Trump and Texas Republicans to rig the 2026 Midterm elections_. Donald Trump and Republicans _**thought**_ they had the perfect plan to rig the 2026 Elections by taking a crayon to maps in Texas and other red states and eliminating Democratic seats. If we pass Proposition 50, we will foil their plot and position Democrats to retake the U.S. House. **[But that means winning an *unexpected* election in just over two months — with ballots dropping even sooner. clean_body: Trump thought he had a perfect plan to rig the 2026 Midterms | = | As you might have already heard : California will now officially vote on Proposition 50 in a special election on November 6th. This must-win ballot measure asks voters to approve Gov. Gavin Newsom’s Stop Election Rigging Response Act, which neutralizes efforts by Trump and Texas Republicans to rig the 2026 Midterm elections. Donald Trump and Republicans thought they had the perfect plan to rig the 2026 Elections by taking a crayon to maps in Texas and other red states and eliminating Democratic seats. If we pass Proposition 50, we will foil their plot and position Democrats to retake the U.S. House. = = This is a must-win ballot measure for Democrats to have a fair shot at retaking the House Majority. But this is a new election that we didn’t plan for or budget for... The entire California Democratic Party is urgently reorienting our strategy, planning, and organizing efforts to pass this ballot initiative. That includes: 1️⃣ Hiring organizers; 2️⃣ Printing literature; 3️⃣ Relaunching our Voter Protection Hotline; ...And more! But this effort isn’t cheap, and with ballots dropping in just a matter of weeks, we have zero time to spare. = = = = = = Thanks so much, — The California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Citizen Action Director @ Our Revolution
subject: Dictator.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1011&refcode=email-20250831_v&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump is saying the quiet part out loud:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?source=email-20250831&t=1062&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Headline: Trump: 'A lot of people are saying maybe we'd like a
dictator'

Our Revolution REFUSES to sit on the sidelines while Trump and his
billionaire allies continue running this country like their private
fiefdom.

That’s why we’re out in the streets, deploying our team of top-notch
organizers to coordinate volunteer-led Citizen Action Teams across the
country to show Trump that the American people do NOT want a dictator.
We’re Fighting Oligarchy by exposing the corruption at the heart of
Trump's authoritarian capitalism by strategic and high impact campaigns
led by local volunteers and supported by our paid organizers.

We’ve protested the Crypto Oligarchs at the Trump Golf Course, led
nationwide protests against Trump's Police State Oligarchs like Palantir
and Avelo Airlines; We just passed a resolution to start a process to get
Big Money - like AIPAC and CRYPTO - out of the Democratic presidential
primary in 2028.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?source=email-20250831&t=1063&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Photo of Our Revolution protest

But here’s the challenge: our end of month fundraising deadline is HOURS
away and the truth is we’re behind. If we don’t raise $6,245 by midnight,
we won't be able to scale up our work by hiring Organizers at the exact
moment Trump is dialing up the threat to democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250831nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Please chip in right now. Even $5 makes a difference, and if everyone
reading this gives today, we’ll smash our goal:

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump is readying the National Guard and insisting he can take over any
city he likes. He’s removing ANYONE from the government who dares to
disagree with him. And he’s openly testing the waters to see how far he
can go before someone stops him.

He’s not even bothering to hide his agenda. And the ONLY way we’re going
to stop him is with strategic grassroots opposition.

Trump and his elitist cronies want us tired, broke, and defeated. But when
our activists link arms in front of billionaire gates, we remind the
oligarchs: real power lies with the people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?source=email-20250831&t=1061&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Photo of Our Revolution activists delivering petition signatures

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250831nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Just imagine what we could do if we not only reached our fundraising goal,
but surpassed it. Because we’re not letting up. We’re escalating. With
your help, our movement will keep growing.But the clock is ticking and we
must raise $6,245 today or we won’t be able to do the deep organizing and
sustained street necessary to topple a dictator. If you can give today,
please do:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33750?source=email-20250831&t=1060&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]Donate Now

When history looks back, let’s make sure it remembers the people who stood
up – not the would-be dictators.

When we organize, we win.

Diane Morgan,
Citizen Action Team Director
Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

group in America.

establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=9312%2E5885482%2Ekxh_g8 ]GIVE MONTHLY

body:
House Majority PAC is the only organization solely focused on defeating Republicans and reclaiming our Majority. We’d hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can click here. We had to reach out.

FIRST → Republicans passed a GERRYMANDERED map in Texas to cling to their House Majority.

THEN → California proposed updated maps to COUNTERACT Texas’s and ensure we have a fair shot – and voters will decide in a couple MONTHS whether to adopt the new maps!

NOW → Word just broke that we – House Majority PAC – are one of Democrats’ MAIN funders to adopt fair maps in California and hold Republicans accountable.

So this End of Month Deadline is absolutely critical to PROVE that Democrats have what it takes to FIGHT BACK and make Republicans’ gerrymandering plot backfire!

That’s why generous Democrats just activated a 600% MATCH on every donation until midnight — the highest match of the year. Please: Will you rush $15 right now to help us FLIP seats from red to blue and finally RECLAIM our Democratic Majority? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2025?amount=15]

→ Democrats only need to flip 3 seats to win back the House.

→ We’re helping fund the effort for new maps in California to stop Republicans from cheating their way into another MAGA Majority.

But if we succeed, we’ll prove we’re ready to out-raise them, defend fair elections, and flip the House blue for good. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7c6bc61-1e89-41c1-a559-b467495ea1d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

### To celebrate the workers who built this country, we're offering [25% off all Paid Subscriptions thru Labor Day](https://substack.com/redirect/7056d6c9-143a-4cd0-b54b-e85d12c3fe5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)! Act now, as there are only about 36 hours left
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dwZI1buBEAey9W7fGg2gUT4dNyHI8lrsbMDvbVe1fOo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172377801)
**By David Shuster**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4c0eb05a-532d-4454-8f56-8678a78bbddc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There are dimwits, and there are damned dimwits. And then scaling the heights of stupidity so steep she inspires awe, there is Tulsi Gabbard.
A woman whose elevation to the post of Director of National Intelligence must have been the result of a lost bet or clerical error.
Ms. Gabbard's title is growing more ironic with each passing hour, a disturbing parody [in an administration already overflowing with incompetents](https://substack.com/redirect/ec4eb1b5-98ff-4f0e-aa48-105925e37e45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This "public servant," in a feat of catastrophic idiocy, **recently managed to out a covert CIA agent in Russia**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b3d01fb0-e156-4e0d-91b5-fd55429f7cc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Not in a fever dream, or the confused fog of a drunken stumble, but with cold, calculated deliberation. Gabbard posted the agent's name on social media, like a giddy teenager tagging party photos.
This is not mere malpractice. It is treason's idiot cousin, gallivanting out in the open, waving an American flag dipped in lighter fluid.
As first reported by the Wall Street Journal, Ms. Gabbard followed orders from [President Dementia Don Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/7abf4052-5a9f-4036-b3fd-4b6c4458f602?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and revoked the security clearances of **37 intelligence officials** who had committed the cardinal sin of investigating Russian election interference.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dwZI1buBEAey9W7fGg2gUT4dNyHI8lrsbMDvbVe1fOo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172377801)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a4a013bd-cfe8-4b42-9ae6-a5dc060c38df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In other words, intelligence officials who'd done their jobs.
And for this, Gabbard fired them and took away their clearances. Yet, in her zeal to conduct this purge, Gabbard failed to consult the CIA. She simply published the list on social media--with no vetting, no warning, and [no regard for human lives or the national interest](https://substack.com/redirect/df07094b-7f7d-48ae-9e92-aa584e5fe434?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**One of the names belonged to an undercover agent in Russia**. Now exposed. Possibly hunted. Almost certainly compromised.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8dd8ab6d-68d6-4283-976d-4fcd695884ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And with that name, every contact, informant, operation, and whisper in the agent's Russia network is compromised too.
In any sane nation, this would be a scandal of epic proportions.
There would be hearings, resignations, prosecutions, televised apologies, and retired generals thundering into studio microphones about honor and duty. But we are not such a nation. Not anymore. [In ](https://substack.com/redirect/dd4250f3-0720-49cb-bf6d-985c1f2a6068?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Trump's America](https://substack.com/redirect/dd4250f3-0720-49cb-bf6d-985c1f2a6068?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[,](https://substack.com/redirect/dd4250f3-0720-49cb-bf6d-985c1f2a6068?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this was just called "Tuesday."
Tulsi Gabbard is not merely incompetent. She is dangerous. She is the product of a political cult that views intelligence not as a tool for national defense but as [a weapon to be used to boost the delusional whims of Dear Leader](https://substack.com/redirect/f7489f33-d9b3-40b5-bba8-c2dc31670689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Under the Trump-Gabbard regime, the intelligence community's priority right now is not China, not terrorism, not global stability -- [but ](https://substack.com/redirect/c6ed00ba-1a61-4917-81f5-658e5331a628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Greenland](https://substack.com/redirect/c6ed00ba-1a61-4917-81f5-658e5331a628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c34a2da0-60ad-41a7-a992-90457bf75cf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dwZI1buBEAey9W7fGg2gUT4dNyHI8lrsbMDvbVe1fOo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172377801)
Several news organizations--including onetime Republican and [former Mike Pence national security advisor, Olivia Troye, who joined us to discuss this insanity on "Amped Up"](https://substack.com/redirect/c6ed00ba-1a61-4917-81f5-658e5331a628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--reported Trump administration agents were recently busted on the mineral rich island (territory of Denmark), engaged in influence operations.
Specifically, efforts to foment dissent. Never mind that polls have consistently found 85% of Greenland residents do not want to be part of the Unites States.
One might [continually laugh at the Trump administration antics](https://substack.com/redirect/4c51a156-7937-4695-a4f9-597c1d32a9af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if the consequences weren't so damn serious. This is not satire--it is self-destruction via unending stupidity.
Meanwhile, our NATO allies -- remember them? -- are turning their backs on the United States. Denmark has summoned our diplomats in protest.
And [the Trump administration carnage](https://substack.com/redirect/7abf4052-5a9f-4036-b3fd-4b6c4458f602?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) goes well beyond Denmark.
Recently, multiple news organizations reported that Gabbard barred U.S. agencies (CIA, NSA, DOD, and others) from sharing intelligence on Russia-Ukraine negotiations with "Five Eyes" partners. "Five Eyes" refers to the post-World War 2 intelligence sharing alliance, comprising the U.S., U.K., Canada, Australia, and New Zealand.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5b5bda6-6800-46f3-a4da-6a3f2b921621?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For decades, [the U.S. relied on this intelligence sharing alliance to prevent and defend against terror attacks](https://substack.com/redirect/c6ed00ba-1a61-4917-81f5-658e5331a628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But Trump and Gabbard have now gutted this alliance in a move so breathtakingly asinine it could have been scripted by a KGB satirist.
Because, of course,[ protecting Russia--not America--appears to be the real mission priority here](https://substack.com/redirect/55d49a61-b579-4b75-87bb-260b5fe9008e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ddfe6bb5-6a1e-4904-a3c7-6261b78f32c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For years, countless lawmakers across the U.S. political spectrum accused Gabbard of acting as a Russian asset.
She parroted Kremlin talking points, undermined U.S. intelligence, and now, has quite literally, **endangered the life of a covert officer embedded in Moscow.** If the CIA had a retirement gift shop, Gabbard would be employee of the month--in Red Square.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.dwZI1buBEAey9W7fGg2gUT4dNyHI8lrsbMDvbVe1fOo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172377801)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9909242-9266-4b00-ba45-48ee274a7cc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And yet, Gabbard remains in office. Unfired. Unapologetic. Unfit.
The last time a covert CIA operative was outed by a White House insider--Valerie Plame by Scooter Libby in the George W. Bush era--there were special counsels, indictments, and convictions. Some of us remember.
We were there, including the trial at the D.C. federal courthouse. But under Trump? The Constitution is mere toilet paper and [loyalty is measured not by truth but by Retweet, and total self-humiliation](https://substack.com/redirect/27d31264-183f-474b-bc54-8b732287b24f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during North Korea-like cabinet meetings.
Tulsi Gabbard has disgraced her office, endangered national security, and made a mockery of American intelligence. She is a human wrecking ball in yoga pants, draped in the flag, with a hallucinating brain-like-substance full of conspiracy theories and a moral compass that points directly to Moscow.
**She must go. Not tomorrow. Not after the midterms. Now.**
The republic cannot afford another day of this insanity. The stakes are too high. The cost--already appalling--will only grow.
For the sake of every intelligence agent or operative in the field, every ally betrayed, and every American who still believes this nation can be something better than a punchline, Tulsi Gabbard must be removed.
Maybe the next Director of National Intelligence -- if such a role still exists after this travesty -- will not treat social media like a public execution ground.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dbc96485-ea8a-499d-9ae4-196f342ecfec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tulsi Gabbard is a treasonous moron. Enough already.
* * *
_David Shuster is an Emmy award winning broadcast journalist who is best known for his work at NBC News and as an anchor MSNBC. He is a contributor to Blue Amp Substack and co-host of[our weekly show (Thursdays, 2pm et, on Substack), "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."](https://substack.com/redirect/46c79d2d-eb73-442b-a670-a5287879c0bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_

Friend, the hypocrisy is unbelievable.| | | Friend, An investigative reporter from ABC 7 News just uncovered **_the most infuriating part_** of the Loudoun County scandal.

The **same high school** that suspended two boys and accused them of sexual harassment for speaking out after being recorded by a biological girl in their locker room — **has separate gendered restrooms for teachers and staff.**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/-wPWEldp8bJ9bGbSFhwPURsO36Rdga-80zbsYiNdtU4G6L-TZ1oQfCZIZLpVNKJTJynktfhgXvQDj2DFeSO0nLw0eDplon-x-3R3h_uHFlhl551mq9_7W0ZAv2lSkwBTEyZ37tbYn8SkzJO5f8t4z7ln1wAVEVMhbhurhTW5WmqZtefkQvkGDyXIr4SKrlfVIVzwu7dWse_7djHdL0dnFmVPCrxxL0UqVcxElq2qczJIWNPJjIKre7jzAW5QeBN9twTtE_KBBuKcu7QAWc0GFnhGHZEpbRieoXV5q2ZgJv6AOyqgjAo609090zW0FSx2ULJm5HZ7ggIkEaPnfha3rtC_oCkRxc8FYELdMAoRAxrgF08OIGBKpBa47CtWbeYIBz3uPc_yqXmCPQ0xGBXeoWfTTp5WwSwAdPGfab4ExXL4KeIbZXgmoRvfT9X8c7rBmfFmp1YH-2rKP9EdufsGXP4rQ7BwTX2-b4EfE9aFmM4SlvsCFe7yh_AEzoeT061Ga2IxJN3MSrTQ5Ar3BgGaTz9mH5BgGPRNGP2NVPeTOXdTA1jtSL1xz1GlIkMxBSVvEpYXgm7o9yVyzp5nX51B/e4PiN0vLeL-78vHVWRMw8Au-1rU0e9jY/12)

LCPS knows that men are men and women are women. They protect their adult employees with gender-specific facilities.

**But when it comes to teenage students?** They force boys and girls together, then punish the victims who speak up.

**Rules for thee, but not for me.**
---

Our children deserve the same protections we give adults — and Jason won’t stop fighting until they get them.

For our childrens' dignity,Team Miyares

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: This seat belongs to us
body:
| | **Peter, we don’t need another politician who will rubber-stamp some outsider’s agenda.**

We need a representative who listens to our communities and stands up for the needs of rural Southwest Washington.

This seat belongs to us – and I intend to keep it that way. The road to Election Day will be the toughest challenge we’ve faced yet.

The national Republicans and special interests backing my opponent are powerful and relentless, and they’ve got a blank check to defeat me no matter the cost.

[If you can, please rush in a donation before midnight to make sure we have the resources to fight back. name: Democrats.org
subject: Please don’t scroll away from this important message >>>
body:
---
Team, ☀️ ️Please don’t click away from this message — we have some important updates to share: 📢** We’re almost at the end of the month, which means we’re one step closer to our next FEC deadline. [**Today, we’re asking you to contribute $3 to the DNC to help us gather the resources to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4441_fr&refcode2=4441_22930333_cnaQO7&akid=4441%2E22930333%2EcnaQO7)
Over and over again, Republicans have proven they won’t stand up to Trump. We need to elect more Democrats who will. **To do that, we need to keep building a strong, united Democratic Party — one with the resources to elect Democrats at all levels who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states.**
The DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute resources to the areas that need them the most. This year, we’ve announced initial seven-figure investments in both Virginia and New Jersey ahead of their state-level elections. We’ve launched our Organizing Summer program to mobilize volunteers and activate voters in every single state. We’re investing in every single state party — in red, blue, and purple states alike. _To win everywhere, we have to show up everywhere._
[**If electing Democrats at all levels of government and holding Trump accountable is important to you, please consider contributing $3 to the DNC today to support our work nationwide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4441_fr&refcode2=4441_22930333_cnaQO7&akid=4441%2E22930333%2EcnaQO7) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250831_4441_fr&refcode2=4441_22930333_cnaQO7&akid=4441%2E22930333%2EcnaQO7)**

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114371779/566804337/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWFkMGY5NC05Yjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOYPW4MVMyOk8T-dN-RY9L-sMm66E-GmydBZ9z6BcJg=&emci=e040c155-df84-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=4ead0f94-9b86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15529135) | Team — Congressional Republicans have created an absolute mess in Washington. Costs are going up, people are losing critical healthcare benefits, schools are losing funding, and people are worried about making ends meet. This is the opposite of what Congressional representatives were elected to do. We should be _helping make lives easier, safer, and better for everyone_ — not making them worse. But under Donald Trump and Mike Johnson, we cannot count on Republicans to do right by the American people. That is why we need to hold onto my toss-up seat and flip the House majority from red to blue. Enough of the GOP chaos and confusion. clean_body: | | Team — Congressional Republicans have created an absolute mess in Washington. Costs are going up, people are losing critical healthcare benefits, schools are losing funding, and people are worried about making ends meet. This is the opposite of what Congressional representatives were elected to do. We should be helping make lives easier, safer, and better for everyone — not making them worse. But under Donald Trump and Mike Johnson, we cannot count on Republicans to do right by the American people. That is why we need to hold onto my toss-up seat and flip the House majority from red to blue. Enough of the GOP chaos and confusion. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Vandalism isn’t slowing us down
body:
| | | | [](https://tlc.messages50.com/c/AQiAjRYQx9wEGPKH3Fwg9ZF1HKgwn_PEKSEYNdPnWk3ciF9lk5e1AT9q2_RnPt2cBmY)
---
| Patriot,
---
We have certainly had an eventful past week! Did you see the news? We started a nationwide bus tour in California in support of the SAVE Act – important legislation that will ensure that ONLY citizens vote in our elections. And the Left was so “triggered” by the buzz we’ve been generating that they vandalized our bus in hopes of stopping us from getting our message out. Take a look! ****

name: Heidi Hall
subject: I need to level with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Friend, I don't like reaching out on a Sunday, but it has to be today.
I wanted to give you an update on our End of Month Fundraising Goal now that we're just 12 hours away from our deadline—the first deadline since things got turned upside down and we could be running in a whole new district. (One of the handful that could decide control of Congress).
Friend, we still need to raise $5,684 online before midnight. If you only have a moment but want to help, can you donate any amount today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
MEET OUR GOAL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Look, from the beginning, I got in this race to help working people in California. Folks like the people I grew up around and families like those I moved to Grass Valley to raise my boys around.
I am not a political insider. All too often in my life, politicians higher up got in the way of my job. I could tell some stories from the EPA .
As a county lawmaker, I've tried my damndest to cut through the red tape, especially around wildfire prevention, healthcare access, and lowering costs for working people.
This race won't be decided by elites in back rooms trying to control everything, and it won't be decided by Donald Trump.
It'll be decided by people like you, people who care about our district, care about our future, and know that representation means electing someone who will never let partisan politics get in the way of fighting for them.
Friend, people like you have helped our grassroots-powered campaign make great progress this month, but we have just a bit further to go. Will you help us make a final rally to reach our fundraising goal before midnight tonight? No matter if you chip in $5, $15, or $50—any amount makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG_]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250831_em_fr_b1_HH_BIG]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Mazie Hirono

body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter — I wanted to personally reach out to you one last time before tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. Right now, I have two jobs in the Senate. Donald Trump has proven that he won’t lift a finger to help working families, and I’m fighting to protect people all across Hawaii from everything he’s doing to make the cost of living _more_ expensive. But I’m also laser-focused on helping Democrats win back the Senate majority next year. It’s true that we’re more than a year away from the midterm elections, but the stakes couldn’t be higher. Not only do Senate Republicans refuse to take a stand against Trump’s lawlessness and corruption, but they also continue to prioritize billionaires over hard working Americans. We need a Senate majority that works for us, not the people with the most money. But here’s the thing, Peter: **Our movement to hold the Trump administration accountable, deliver for working families, and flip the Senate blue is made stronger by your support.** **[When we reach our fundraising goals each month, we show Trump and Republicans that we have the resources to fight back. We’re a bit short of where we need to be, so if you can, please pitch in to help us hit our goal and support this important work:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114372264/566806256/-1381597145?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzJmMTZhYy05Yzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gPI2W3z5cFl68ZbWrbRu5Y56KatE7EWrCNDa9F26v5g=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114372270/566806301/2142146037?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzJmMTZhYy05Yzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gPI2W3z5cFl68ZbWrbRu5Y56KatE7EWrCNDa9F26v5g=)

Tell Congress to IMPEACH him!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoGrv3z3k6IRa1LgP-rh4uEONr4vTWZRIc6OAhixElP3HktiSEUdU2LqdsvbqgRmds4jr4Uej0S3Kr5waQjJV74ALcTlmIz2tbt4JQJ30kFheg_Bgv75Qnjia-zRxc_tdghwA1YDZMRi3FmJyWxr2PL-7UHsxnzGqI8npa3Styt2m_eEDI5aKyBT-O5sxXaSgeWzvnb0syzPgOWOWqGS0V3AmQe-COX5AAZ4mOIEFKX6VDFIbdiZmp7XicTZ2iGJ6bEpj-j7033zNCafK1RkEfXNrdyH1l16CZfnPTTcCrRo2Ms5eiAcM9uffe6ySpWyUTakKFiogNONor6xYj8prJTpfUM130cfn4ErmHZqPpa3ykGJad5OJD46k5dzSqYjIR-B_x1ExDOvGrmQW2xgiSEWMyFROe6tPKGAaR6WjUfvR38esZ5fLAcBNyRav-kEOlHdqTBEUSl-wot8g1v4Mh7te1hOJdw4FcpFI2TvYyLTcg/4ji/kAz-vSLHSf-iwqKyriJBhw/h1/h001.mGtTiZwCGdlqFBbnCYCifUO7a3EwrH6LsVtsV1q2nW8)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHouj7Xgr-ixXs34xWMLA5OLfhFWoE79OxoUZhc1SO8iW-GfnO6i5Ee4AosHilgXh5Uh8aSyWnTtiylLL4GHdbSfNqMbXadJSVlZNXgneG3q32hK8R4tQC_Bgwaek76l5PVRsq419ODzBwRAwDROBAbIctecahAJa9HCB-4XGUkY3Y36SHNNpzury6R1CnJUd3ya-_2cgwT_3LOfmU813bdOv8Owk5rJeZ9HpemoMa9MQlEG-5iAyaKi2b0o0jg2ezexFQjWFOtMilIuhJncra5glM2d_NKnER120mHjaywTVLHTBev_AgkNsiFNFE1lpULSMB-1cEyh2D2XXG8duTetcYFiizpenkP4kPwzq1wfA/4ji/kAz-vSLHSf-iwqKyriJBhw/h2/h001.QF4FgKfgekeC7q1VyKqjt5HnfyiUyu63E5G7O6nOoXg)**
* * *
In 1935 the Supreme Court’s _Humphrey’s Executor v. United States_ decision made it clear that presidents can’t purge independent commissioners without cause. That safeguard protects our watchdogs and keeps our government honest. Trump doesn’t care. Since the start of his second administration, the aspiring dictator has been hacking away at the guardrails, **_illegally_** gutting federal agencies and ousting political appointees who are essential for our government’s functioning. We’re talking inspector generals, waste, fraud and abuse watchdogs, and the heads of the critical agencies - nonpartisan roles designed to serve the public, not a president’s ego. And now Trump is signaling he wants _Humphrey’s Executor_ overturned __ to bulldoze what’s left, replacing competence with cronyism and turning government agencies into personal fiefdoms. **If he succeeds, the last firewalls between a rogue president and a wholesale takeover of apolitical posts will be gone, our freedoms and democratic processes be damned!** **[We cannot allow Trump’s lawlessness to continue. clean_body: | | | ** Silencing truth-tellers is dangerous to America. In 1935 the Supreme Court’s Humphrey’s Executor v. United States decision made it clear that presidents can’t purge independent commissioners without cause. That safeguard protects our watchdogs and keeps our government honest. Trump doesn’t care. Since the start of his second administration, the aspiring dictator has been hacking away at the guardrails, illegally gutting federal agencies and ousting political appointees who are essential for our government’s functioning. We’re talking inspector generals, waste, fraud and abuse watchdogs, and the heads of the critical agencies - nonpartisan roles designed to serve the public, not a president’s ego. And now Trump is signaling he wants Humphrey’s Executor overturned to bulldoze what’s left, replacing competence with cronyism and turning government agencies into personal fiefdoms. If he succeeds, the last firewalls between a rogue president and a wholesale takeover of apolitical posts will be gone, our freedoms and democratic processes be damned! ** | Trump's actions are an unprecedented assault on independent agencies and government accountability. He has already fired over 50 officials, many of whom were confirmed by the Senate and served under both Republican and Democratic administrations. This is not normal. These unprecedented purges are not just legal issues; they undermine the very foundations of our democracy. This is a five alarm fire for the rule of law! By allowing criminal Trump to remain in the White House, we imperil our democracy and our freedoms! We can’t let this stand. ** Every day we wait is another day our institutions are dismantled. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

clean_body: They’re targeting the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. | Fellow Conservative, Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one's shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway. The out-of-touch fake news "reporters" at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs. We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can't abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country. Yet the liberal news corporations, who desperately want to keep the status quo, attacked us for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government. All of us –Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we're up against more than just the DC establishment. We're up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats. We need you, Fellow Conservative to keep us on the frontlines, bucking the corrupt status quo! -> If the media wants to attack us for having a "warrior mentality" - the mentality to do whatever it takes to achieve a mission... -> If the media wants to attack us for supporting President Trump's MAGA movement - the movement that says we can make America great... -> If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste - which has been exposed by Trump's DOGE department... ....Then they don't understand WHY Donald J. Trump and ALL of us were elected! As SEALs, we all shoot straight with each other. We're going to shoot straight with you, too: This hit piece was horsesht and part of a larger conspiracy to silence us. If they can silence us, they can sure as hell silence you. name: Troy Downing
subject: Hail Mary Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I'm down to my last play

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Sgw1HCDixvXF5Hy_d9jrQ)That’s it... I’m throwing my final Hail Mary pass.
Peter, it’s not looking good. **The August end-of-month deadline is IMMINENT, and I’m down to my last play.**
I was counting on grassroots Patriots like you to help run defense, but I guess I’m out of luck.
I’ve sent texts, sent emails, made phone calls... and I’ve heard nothing. It’s been **__RADIO SILENCE.__**
**THIS. WON’T. DO.**[ CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) _I’m**NOT** a quitter_ \- I will keep fighting, even when my back is against the wall.

It's Troy Downing. I’m just a guy from Montana taking a huge leap of faith.
Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.
**I've taken my seat in Congress, and I couldn’t be more honored to serve you!**
But, I still need to make one thing clear to my new colleagues: the American people are demanding real change. To do that, I need your help to shatter my next goal. I’m asking you, person to person, please **CHIP IN TODAY.** [Whether it’s $5 or $100, EVERYTHING HELPS.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._JADn4CQdg)[CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[You’re on deck, Peter. Will you help me crush this next goal?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Congressman Troy Downing| |

name: Carol (iPhone)
subject: typing this quickly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
Hey team, it’s Carol. I’m typing this quickly between events.

| Hey team, it’s Carol. I’m typing this quickly between events. I had to reach out because we’re just hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re $1,973 behind on our goal.

Listen, I don’t come from money or politics. I’m a youth advocate, nonprofit leader, public servant, educator, and engineer – and now, I’m running for Congress to fight for our community.

We’ve been endorsed by Latino Victory Fund, EMILYs List, and BOLD PAC. These endorsements aren’t just big names backing us. They’re proof that our grassroots team is growing.

My supporters know that this campaign has what it takes to flip one of the toughest seats in the country and take on Ryan Mackenzie.

Will you contribute by midnight to help us keep up the momentum? name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
#
Peter: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between State Democrats Committee and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94363?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sherrod Brown and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94364?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94364?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94364?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94364?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94364?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94364?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94363?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave)
---
I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and won. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and _won._
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, Peter: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $10 now – split between my campaign and State Democrats Committee – to help me win in Ohio and deliver for workers across the country?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94363?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave)**
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Sherrod Brown
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94363?refcode=em20250831-9356&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9356%2E614464%2E-Twave)

We’ve got a big $12,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to hit before midnight tonight — and it’s going to take every bit of grassroots strength to get there. We’re building a campaign that’s ready to take on whatever Donald Trump and his allies throw at us. But to stay strong and competitive, we have to finish this month with real momentum. Will you chip in $10 right now to help us build the kind of campaign that can win — and keep NM-02 blue? = Thank you — truly — for being part of this, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Team MTG
subject: We could really use a bit more help
body:
I hope this email finds you well
| | | | Friend, since Congresswoman Greene sent out this note we’ve been able to chip away at our August fundraising goal, but we still have a ways to go.
Things are going to heat up over the Continuing Resolution fight when Marjorie gets back to DC, and it would be a blessing to have a full warchest.
**_[If you haven’t already, please consider making a donation at this link before Sunday night](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
---
Friend,
I’ll keep this short.
**I’m about to end the most politically challenging month I’ve had in a long time and I’m up against the clock to beat my fundraising goal.**
[DONATE](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
The Democrats and the RINOs who are selling out our country are planning my political demise in next year's elections, and they will be even more determined after I return to DC to fight another wasteful Continuing Resolution.
**_[If you can help out with a donation before the end of August I’d be so grateful for your support](https://link.email.greene4congress.)_.**
One Nation Under God,
| | [](https://link.email.greene4congress.)
---
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://link.email.greene4congress.)

### **_[Unsubscribe from list](https://link.email.greene4congress.com/click/e3588242/VaHR0cHM6Ly9tdGcubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZ3JlZW5lRk9VUmNvbmdyZXNzX2NvbTI1MDgzMQ/LbmNsZ3BsVXkx/qP2hpZHM9bmNya1lDTXFzOEtXUGxz/gaLSkJg/s3s2a737692)_**

name: Tobias Read
subject: Ballots are becoming political chess pieces
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250831em-ballots [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250831em-ballots]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250831em-ballots [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250831em-ballots]
Hi friends, it’s Secretary of State Tobias Read.
As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I see firsthand how vulnerable our elections can be—not just to foreign sabotage but to domestic power plays from the top.
First, federal interference can lead to centralized mandates that override local protocols.
Then, election workers face threats, both virtual and physical, that jeopardize their safety.
Lastly, without local autonomy, ballots become political chess pieces.
That’s why I’m committed to making Oregon a national leader in election security and integrity—from the ballot drop box to the courthouse.
Will you join me? We have a major fundraising goal coming at midnight tonight, so please make a contribution of any amount to to help me defend our democracy from authoritarianism. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250831em-ballots]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250831em-ballots]
Thank you for standing with democracy.
—Tobias Read, Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

clean_body: [] [] Hi friends, it’s Secretary of State Tobias Read. As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I see firsthand how vulnerable our elections can be—not just to foreign sabotage but to domestic power plays from the top. First, federal interference can lead to centralized mandates that override local protocols. Then, election workers face threats, both virtual and physical, that jeopardize their safety. Lastly, without local autonomy, ballots become political chess pieces. That’s why I’m committed to making Oregon a national leader in election security and integrity—from the ballot drop box to the courthouse. Will you join me? We have a major fundraising goal coming at midnight tonight, so please make a contribution of any amount to to help me defend our democracy from authoritarianism. [] DONATE NOW [] Thank you for standing with democracy. —Tobias Read, Oregon Secretary of State P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [?] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia, the top-ranking Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
I need to level with you.
Because of California’s redistricting, I’ll be running for re-election in a brand new district — the 42nd. **It’s tougher, it’s more competitive, and Republicans are already eyeing it as one of their best chances to flip a seat in California.**
**That’s why I set an ambitious goal: 500 grassroots contributions before midnight tonight. If we can hit that mark, we’ll prove we have the strength to take on whatever Republicans throw at us in CA-42.**
Hundreds of grassroots supporters have already rushed to help me reach this goal, but with just a few hours left until the deadline, _**I’m just under 100 donations short**_. I know these end-of-month deadlines might not seem important, but they’re how we show the GOP we’re serious. And I can’t do it without you.
**[So I’m asking: Can you chip in $5, $25, or $42 right now to help us close the gap before the deadline? Every single donation matters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114373650/566810653/-309737922?refcode=250831_RG_oneof500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk1ODI4NS1hNDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqzyNU_NB1ayRj4u9zEylafEEi2i6qRHyyqNhXsnHS8=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114373651/566810654/-309737922?refcode=250831_RG_oneof500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDk1ODI4NS1hNDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NqzyNU_NB1ayRj4u9zEylafEEi2i6qRHyyqNhXsnHS8=)

Thank you for standing with me,
Robert Garcia

Fellow activist, PA is only **one of seven states** where voters vote for all judges and justices in partisan elections. With the legislative and executive branches usurping their authorities and putting the priorities of billionaires over the good of the people, it is the courts that people historically have turned to for justice. That is why it’s so critical that we work to ensure that PA courts remain fair and independent.

**However, we are falling short of our budget to launch a massive Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) program for the upcoming judicial election, and with only 9 weeks until Election Day, we are depending on grassroots support to close that gap. **

With Trump’s unprecedented attacks on political opponents and on the economy, institutions are failing to meet this moment with much-needed EARLY funding, which means we are not seeing the level of support that we typically see from traditional funders. However, our rights and freedoms are literally on the line this November as state Supreme Courts impact everything from marriage equality and reproductive rights to redistricting, voting access, climate, and more.
[**We cannot afford to reduce our GOTV program this fall. Please help support our work to engage and mobilize voters across Pennsylvania ahead of the highly consequential judicial election by rushing a donation of $25 or more before midnight.**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7cnf2nT45L4TDLL79xclFmlYUKVz-2FZIWg-2FtTcyX6kz-2Fi7J96gDG4ZDmkSBYGThdKcE-2Bmo7NCESXd98pH7VgHdP-2Fn215kSbKOwJEWvaK3HMdi0Fyc4M5B6VyVcTP-2FZixrI-3DBG0f_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYVOU8kuoKp7s0Hg5EKDLh78S3wGeb3Zuy4W1j94LTJAMos0EisLneZA1UtD-2FoUJa-2BFuNX12yHQrgeSewBg4r4c4jE1uvCgP7fYa17ESPlpEhZpup9iB22Bi2QdgsmJYx8YXy9vPTh-2BlxJaQYkB1P6ACLBSJH42PVJQF7joUjm1jfL-2FhZQCkyO6C10hIclbsmmnD85sb6IIsIUueuHmrFTLA-3D-3D)

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_
---
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, PA is only one of seven states where voters vote for all judges and justices in partisan elections. With the legislative and executive branches usurping their authorities and putting the priorities of billionaires over the good of the people, it is the courts that people historically have turned to for justice. That is why it’s so critical that we work to ensure that PA courts remain fair and independent. However, we are falling short of our budget to launch a massive Get-Out-The-Vote (GOTV) program for the upcoming judicial election, and with only 9 weeks until Election Day, we are depending on grassroots support to close that gap. With Trump’s unprecedented attacks on political opponents and on the economy, institutions are failing to meet this moment with much-needed EARLY funding, which means we are not seeing the level of support that we typically see from traditional funders. However, our rights and freedoms are literally on the line this November as state Supreme Courts impact everything from marriage equality and reproductive rights to redistricting, voting access, climate, and more. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In this together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

body:
Will you split a donation between Justice Christine Donohue and EMILYs List? |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114374362/566813045/984999909?refcode=WUEFH858_20250831_DonohueSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056867&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEyMDU2NS1hNTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nafwlm9Q67rjMuFOeakbJLeI3hTxyPvlfVN_r57hY04=) Hi Peter, my name's Rahul Kale, and I'm a former EMILYs List staffer who now works to build winning campaigns in my home state of Pennsylvania.

This November, Justice Christine Donohue and two other justices are up for retention, and the Pennsylvania Supreme Court majority is at stake. Nobody is more passionate about building (and keeping) progressive majorities where it matters most than the EMILYs List community, so I'm coming to you with some crucial information about this race.

This election comes at a pivotal moment: partisan efforts to undermine judicial independence are intensifying, and the Pennsylvania Supreme Court is a critical backstop for voting rights, reproductive freedom, labor protections, and fair elections.

**National Republicans know what's at stake too, and they're planning to pour money into this race to vote out Justice Donohue and flip control of the court.**

[**We need to fight back and protect the integrity of our courts. Will you split a donation between Justice Donohue’s campaign and my friends at EMILYs List today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114374363/566813046/984999909?refcode=WUEFH858_20250831_DonohueSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056867&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEyMDU2NS1hNTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nafwlm9Q67rjMuFOeakbJLeI3hTxyPvlfVN_r57hY04=) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114374364/566813047/984999909?refcode=WUEFH858_20250831_DonohueSplit_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056867&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEyMDU2NS1hNTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nafwlm9Q67rjMuFOeakbJLeI3hTxyPvlfVN_r57hY04=)

Justice Donohue has consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to protecting the freedoms and futures of hardworking Pennsylvanians:
* She helped pave the way for a potential expansion of abortion access in the state.
* She spoke for a majority of the court in upholding the rights of Pennsylvania voters to vote by mail after repeated partisan attacks.
* She was part of the majority that ruled against the state's unfair 2011 congressional maps.

It's critical we fight back against the GOP's deep pockets and dangerous agenda, and keep Justice Christine Donohue on the court. It would be an honor to have you with us in this fight.

clean_body: Will you split a donation between Justice Christine Donohue and EMILYs List? | = Hi Peter, my name's Rahul Kale, and I'm a former EMILYs List staffer who now works to build winning campaigns in my home state of Pennsylvania. This November, Justice Christine Donohue and two other justices are up for retention, and the Pennsylvania Supreme Court majority is at stake. Nobody is more passionate about building (and keeping) progressive majorities where it matters most than the EMILYs List community, so I'm coming to you with some crucial information about this race. This election comes at a pivotal moment: partisan efforts to undermine judicial independence are intensifying, and the Pennsylvania Supreme Court is a critical backstop for voting rights, reproductive freedom, labor protections, and fair elections. National Republicans know what's at stake too, and they're planning to pour money into this race to vote out Justice Donohue and flip control of the court. = | = Justice Donohue has consistently demonstrated a strong commitment to protecting the freedoms and futures of hardworking Pennsylvanians: She helped pave the way for a potential expansion of abortion access in the state. She spoke for a majority of the court in upholding the rights of Pennsylvania voters to vote by mail after repeated partisan attacks. She was part of the majority that ruled against the state's unfair 2011 congressional maps. It's critical we fight back against the GOP's deep pockets and dangerous agenda, and keep Justice Christine Donohue on the court. It would be an honor to have you with us in this fight. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for your support, Rahul Kale Executive Director, Vote Yes for Fair and Independent Courts = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

Peter, Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe has officially called a special legislative session on redistricting. On orders from Donald Trump, Missouri Republicans will be redrawing Missouri’s congressional district map to eliminate Rep. Emanuel Cleaver’s seat in Congress. It’s a transparent effort to rig the rules to benefit Trump — and we must fight back. **[Can you please chip in any amount today to help Indiana Democrats and Missouri Democrats fight back against clean_body: | Peter, Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe has officially called a special legislative session on redistricting. On orders from Donald Trump, Missouri Republicans will be redrawing Missouri’s congressional district map to eliminate Rep. Emanuel Cleaver’s seat in Congress. It’s a transparent effort to rig the rules to benefit Trump — and we must fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = This isn’t just about one district — it’s about whether American voters get to choose their representatives, or whether politicians get to rig the rules to choose their voters. And with Trump’s political machine and a Republican supermajority pushing hard, the danger couldn’t be greater. The new map wasn’t even created in Missouri — it was crafted behind closed doors by special interests in DC in a blatant attempt to keep Trump Republicans in power. They know they can’t win on the merits of their terrible policies — that’s why they’re trying to rig the rules of our elections. clean_body: I hope you didn’t forget about tonight’s HUGE End-of-Month midnight fundraising deadline! | Fellow American, I hope you didn’t forget about tonight’s HUGE End-of-Month midnight fundraising deadline! Every Democrat consultant and activist will be pouring through our numbers. If they see any sign of weakness, they’ll throw everything they have at me. We only need to raise $335 in the next several hours to hit our goal. For America, Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

subject: I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option
