body:
I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uwpJwwq2bmRmst9iqifEO13u_81QU2CWUb8fga3AeIBglV_GF6vApdImJIOfJkXQ0lNvwIC_bABbGh72pemo7LqcmA0PN95o5_-ST379J1WsbOla8chNwWy_nou1B1sgq6do7-bm5hgcWUYqxy6qMJRvsGxZbV6ZVVb6YQA1EGWKUWVEWB8XZGwFmDH3G1UPHDSj0y49a6uMZ0wp9CbJL4SWVkSgQ4d1XKUgQjfFS9628rNCVbF4E04cHA9zLKoCGM40wLhc7BPaA3wLcR-8gNn6XVo3BwL_6f8kO6P-A7l7Viyhs8QkqZjG7Xkn7FRZEy8bvqxMd68FTGwmfuXBDXyX3HxzO_gxgakv5Hc9GjQqfJv3W6R-PkwZ02FQjidWZD21MKdoyix3ar-3_7A6fbI7M9rJNttM5tpklRAisP9TbMm3R20xVC2OgER-Abh4xhXcF2RzAn9L10T-YI3FkjANQN0sJGAIeYVZrS85cFLk%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I5nG2vmiXD2_1ChCzIKWGtn1QkXNgICa7z8e2yVMUVf7k_MKAcaScLt9cq6PBIjrGt_X4s5k8jqmNa_7Kxirm1ysMdrtFpf424gIZtlAEOoKaKdgTt0TrRkqK0Wsrl4HTLwsF4_0WPbg-MXJE__bTBXrzXMTogRVkBdmrsTiNodL1MzdClg0Tx3Ard66F5lcjffknldp92DpaW41spHHTMnOW2tT1mujG0Kktl-h4LAkG-94jCalbPhvT2kUY7zpAJWgXV6cILOmYPjBh18feo_opK_cao47F2cEZDK-Lil6rr_xjYLUnWyZc98Z_1-2NClA-LGKoQSnWp5xGlUxIuX4EaW2sFJ2yA6KUyTXYCDUtSqGPa6a-1ybwzBUu48BYlAikPXilf7CePpeHBUykO5yPP6SHuc8zx3UxpRcjYYaGBu75mv854mKtSm-Csic-YbnWkgdSJDMfdkcLRWZG8h9RP3AR6IBvERsU8iLyyfhPdlfG3w8A-DZ-z9evfGnpH6zz9-BD7VItGrEk1L7LrfmbpcB6r-ckY2n073Ws0EYekoXOxpIAaQeyNA08VAd5Uz616PmUHPamw2o27a2JucWR4KQTYZuv23UvrhqJRx8QjzcY3wuaCe3GM3AJK4t-0is3AZkGyi4RntJQcklrAs9-5Q61K65P1kBbFlbDs7w%3D)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uTdyfwZfVKJ-yE4uQVAFNWPKmtlxGyeB-01BuqA4CkZfm5Rt4gw4vlr7u3vIB55IdXsR6HrnMLI5b31zx9piQpX1t9WF1994ziUL9lZUJNvvAmqx1m_60tu4D-o2ll552un5AV_zhooHzroUyDY0_g4WNkV31GOb5uI3KvahA0B6eNn8KElTddgQClUfxIe8BPQUrLZEouMTLOmf6ltSPXjyItytlW54rHK9PN5aeO1Pc7sOjrXv3hECwaLfgyZy0PSVdsoBQqTkpnyj4DbNww8vEjdVA4uP1AeGz1GnhiBn_4KcQ8YSfnErBpNakle2tqN_aY79NyOEro7Zc-3VNNV6qM5212ADWOWREXoIz29UsHvJin99aLEcBkSuyQIOKMTq-2NVSCocPmrZjC-CT9XxGBH84i4eB_hlbYVrz17ilK69RxMi3MJIFHqxiGGzS8IRVr5NvSkCjYsfy00s6lcViujRh4bBF5Mcrqn7Mmq8%3D)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uAyhffP-h3nBYLD_j57FXx-NINkjhZfb6GCUJnxOQiY5oobFO6Y8Q9JPHA1EkA-Li6hcX1w90wBoQsdEQCGQaMRIBxmyijXIKaHeDbEJa3kTDC6rsNyA-Fd9QNDx8NN-edapDsmTtzRWJIFkRV3wPz1Nie0fHLAwje26RF68MfNWOhZCHORhetp8IdcszaVRjtplesfJHzlxtzwhx0eyU8BTucRwdToq6BcJPtAH6_zxtLTUCOZD1w5E0x8YfSkd9E7kCoFJdFf2e2zEybNGkVr-sO4e7WguX_NF4yEVOSHj1vD56Rem3HdJP9Jqs9ADqunfY2N8Z_EpWFpxjxfQU5w4QmSghdHRpzMQGrJ2vsMZKrEicMRoqubeuCYIq_v-XIKAma3TJPBo6lThEvNBLIq0Io5nDYZE--SCIKJn5lxEyAGBp-WKKymQIK_SdilsYETuGStmyhrwVRslTogRWGzr4vfbarbOJgdXLVVWKsDA%3D)**

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uno4560GTo1ooq5IsdPBHmcedtEvH3Qm4dId6N_o1v2MNLbPKAgAlodgq26G7UzPKjzm_JwtkWL30eECncn6bjGWYa8_T7Iz1U5pPUsQ5IeW0txrcri_Qy791N6kMYLUKQGYoJAYF-J6Gxy7tae-PqU99PbTYq2Q7qxh8JrGYEagfHSFUqzEph8UJzCL88blQzEVg10YWm6uTCOxHbYXgYrpgbQZGMESwOY87Ubh_QQJRaxevPNgqIlCyw_qO9DQzYy84-S-TaAOiqJEJQeSIr2H_72Io5cnRKjsboVUmNmbZFbVp8m7TndMgwPlLQ2JFeKSYvy_zYKL0LgV4mqzWikDkI4R_k1DNZWbIz7Ld6gyvPMs5z1iduRNGaJoXBEHG8a1d0XCrzl8ID14RnByDp9VAyRcu8ShOWjdcXWPoE6GbTzUM6S22AfizgwuzqMkXBGn2u85pptx8FtDJ9ngypKnQVPW2XVNhMBuYUFr_JLA%3D)

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_
**
[I’m not asking for much, but even $1 will do the trick now.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uSnCs0trpUovsC8tMn_7MgkW97w6QvDMRqqMInRTDzG1No5vYgd3phrN6taD9RMBSq1iPS30mjUM7580D8YradrNTGjjg_Eay4-dxeHoY7HtN2cQFmV75mHmtkIAH__JGHpbSk0MAWCyQ_tQw7LR-gyxSEnHhpAbQs1YeMC2nCX-gtspdQHdYckWsrnbG1Q6nOWBWDQ_fwmuQZaX22_k3et5rm1GPCsTJgw8li1W3c3qHNJ8j3EFo9Atxa74Z4PNFqC_iN90GHlKWyBgX__2g8eWMIof20KkdipE0zkEpep_HWJGVHUfKmu3JqDKp9k25aO2dXpY31BPL6lLsDpTym_4F5YSb9Sd7vVP4zJETYwiGFFP1IbEHq-8OZ51U2O9M-Nuc2o3uFGzkWT-VuVUMCTTN0Ba6O42gf2KXa_AlpkOAsfJaW-cNwazI96ff5JlrzyQMuH3SJws4b9xoidezaQ7HIqOBBPAsBRiEOw2yj8Y%3D) **

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uLMDtPqLADAEoXVIjgSq8j7VJohWt7HtRaEQdZFR_xKG1deNHbMGunxzoPvqS1c463I0C--btMf4SWztYorAaIjXoR_lrxgI444QYkiFborIYvKW_7H62SxFy6i1xs6-QlKKEZJPCOd92bN1aHPoRVkMECz7E77vuuserrB3TrUp1RtzuTqGQS3ZAcfRKMqHb2_EeMxV5shCdVqyvLZQoSkfukZpOagJzIgpTI7TuUPqr1y7KzmNQBDaN0_J6_t1sDoWK1OemuM4agqCV2vuP3biAeuwTD17JtiZg-43SipxtEbIPq_DRYqMAyzYjKek4wcq-ekjxfews9w_RS_uauYqcQqaeqmIXMbpPG8oycj8oPsb_2GzWQrzVmZDtauyzgtEQQt-LIVFFmBapk88eAyqYD2fSsrU3Z6ASrOHXBNb77fE3oIpO090KSN4wz3cawV6DjnQ2Jd0bxOXyb64R1vsm17FU4FptafdW5lrinZk%3D)
I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago.
**
[I’m virtually unknown in Minnesota, so I need to raise as much capital as possible to introduce myself to people across the state before the end of the year.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-u0qD7lqhEZUtkZ9KXLkHcO76TQ2q4pDSGqk1Ia1LSKnvF2DozaP8XKqLl8kY3-jAaWCYMfxzduSogzk1ZBqDOmIEWHXo05kGNgm2Q0hWc5ctdZf7TsY9Rhj3i1G3ApHGWaOwUkeZDLpEvZefolWTAGovdgoQlqUVF9jCFPX5g7Hw69fBD54pYmBPpBO1qdF8evwhmg6EU46np3AF16kv2G34UNhWpOt4KSbnW17ys_WcyRRbbN7JYdFCxMWsVc9Cyibdlb6RF7AC194lNqGnIJzvZyM-ncj18fkByC2c28hh02hcp_Z58_BaYTRh47ADae0zklDmPUO5WkhEkCchseAogcM2cOPfH9rs9VJcLePJG8kxby4N4Z_UnG6ebfbWyTBqRI3uoMhdsfSsIOPOobcY30GjhXbd0nklrFMtOpIeN2UjDlMVwKmwZ4WNiTPna6wauwwzvTCHsBn7sN8k5fdTX3NAa4fOLcrzKSnYiMz8%3D)**

**[Could you chip in $1 today to help me change that?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-uVFoYnODKs3QUgUZo4-Ier8csX-9B41fnFDYK12DQuJ48V_6vmIn5DHXhECxjWKjESdZwc2Fx7rHR2VF2wU_2w636F_i6UVwZSG5RxiHJYCPvZwv9SDfID5uYyRdcZUBKsWgX7TS_Guq2ptse_wtXB022H3YfcGlUe5k1afd0GxHwrN1FSDlUTQc4Yh-9O-Eb0eufuHMy9sF7tUsE58_mjo9CSJuqE0W_x6y49spZI1apmmdB6ohs5r1WVhz1Cktgrf5aqCei8tfSINpObpHrvMfQUldWMHGl4FXcVe6sA2VwVyO_4Ri1GMwSAx5A4KqBZj-yCENlV8R2WIFvSvoNp1o81oR6z4uN8CTIpPmVSoyHEWW5gW8Bvsmmx8pvnUu47NRn939OpMV9QVSXZJCJWCXK6Sj3pWLWbaLU6u9vqtzHq4rj4vhYCUsAf7Y4JFskVsCkTQgbRAnIV42vUSYn4T4xTI5R7ro0JcKdVMTa8gQ%3D)**

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=d897b14f383e4689ba1f7e12816c1c3b&_e=EGmTWJSm_sCXQTjXvz9I7YhJ-clps7dJXDrz0noj_M8nZWVfXXTokBey8JADqS-I-ffCpeVpSeqcgzpQtpkjTisD2Jaluif7GH5nFRrbyCnmhJw6mE1f2Ag_oKqCF1LqZMiermO6fZTiqsotE3sZGb4ysPaPp7DG47BOoGRt1HJ0huAm_1ZnOwVom7bbYi7wlh2bEFXWbCU2SeU-8P0khOOI6XoYC-xaqKqCLkJnsP233mYLj7Riy5AmKYvf69-u5RkcTK3B6C-RGK38ETTCyRwsBcrZVEThEwYSIzZhlgqA03oJeGtlwhxFxrnduIuApP-x5ayxJ1wk4hrXNLhUc2iqG0lbDPzI1O7ugP3jXYUrZ8o1M77NRu-FAFtHGki6jyt4V6_fzQy-U-n0cqFNtOJikVSc2sRFmUd8aFoWYWdiHiYtSlKYS4PeOMZGeiUlZI1RzP2lHXxZIe4melLnKbf8HWf4eJvlVpaXHcGZwZ3uAsGFCJdwoqNL89Jb8lF_rPCHngK4_iP5Lvi4BRC808zOAT649f1QnHvKs-zdJgigYPUAHgejFDo_Lep4I1BDSAbresRVE2T81gxQX_u80Q8cd8gOKN1SdZD0SKA-8iezrWpWjEAdYciJ5p62H3ZC6lpCsED790RdV26orDtsjKbqiBTRDzejhPh8n2wNXQO_wTmXpufhFa5vvOupIQOCCMprmhuzCuP2bEM045Zjz6803UQ0xek2Z0nkhVDdqfw%3D)
We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing.

We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity.

We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education.

We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it.

But I can’t do it alone.

**I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything.
**
I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

**P.S:** The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me.

As a fellow American who loves this country, **[I ask you to stand with me. clean_body: I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. | Fellow Conservative, Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away? I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this critical email right now. I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, I decided: I would fight for my country. My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs. Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived. For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight. But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield. While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs. While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with. This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away. I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever. The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund. I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago. We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing. We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity. We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education. We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it. But I can’t do it alone. I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me. As a fellow American who loves this country, , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: We don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but here's why it's so important that you donate to Abigail's campaign for Governor today. = We don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but please give us 30 seconds to explain why it's so important that you donate to Abigail's campaign for Governor today. = Here's the deal: Abigail needs your support today to win the biggest election of 2025. Early voting begins in a matter of weeks and the latest polls show MAGA Republican Winsome Earle-Sears gaining ground. She's spent nearly $10 million against us so far, with national Republicans piling on more each and every day. This is our only chance in the country to flip a Governor's office blue – and we're not taking anything for granted. Your $25 will fund TV and digital ads in key media markets. Your $25 will provide organizers with literature and yard signs to gain support on the ground. Your $25 will empower us to counter Trump's attacks and keep putting Virginia first. We could keep going, but the bottom line is this: your $25 today will have a huge impact. = = = = = = = Thanks for stepping up, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Bonnie
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
The Big Beautiful Bill was the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in our history, and it also handed ICE a staggering 400% increase in their annual budget. That’s money they’re now using to terrorize our communities.

ICE should be focused on getting violent criminals off the streets, not hard working people just trying to make a better life for their families and live the American dream. It’s an abuse of taxpayer dollars and human rights.

Will you chip in whatever you can before the end-of-month deadline so we have the resources to stop Trump, hold ICE accountable, and take back the House? We’re $5,541 and just 1 day away from our end-of-month goal! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bwc-august-2025?amount=]

Friend, our HUGE SIGNS are here. Grassroots donors like you pitched in to print them ... now, we’re buying stakes and other supplies we need to post them across VA-HD22. The 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates could be decided in this district THIS NOVEMBER ... _expanding_ our majority will be our next chance to deliver Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans a huge defeat. Our MAGA Republican opponent is putting signs of his own up across the district ... _we can’t keep up without you._ [**Donate to finish putting up our HUGE SIGNS before early voting starts on September 19.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnteF0OIUJWB_fzFA0KnJLA1mqPFF6iHPu1bEbDAC9hYsHWysptdN4OfibtlHR3Ye4FWEf86XHW2dOtQOWtbYFGaG4cnEJcXC5A0KLNaURzKLypiyQm9XWlrGx6C22IfPqmv9HgYZLBR92STplDWE0pI1yud19Ezx-IVbJSDZYSuic5Zm8JsodiJyXFWr2JKjWVhgQUWVQJuud88ljb31zCE/4ji/DnRgeBh1TwK7mSKCpKxTIA/h2/h001.FIk_aEqTwOFITD5dyY1p5j1bAE7SMna0gzlsxmn3pqc) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A8QvOmC-FYZWd74fTGmSaa0ckN9AJlsQ0F1gMbFoNxF0gCtqock7VFQcpIZz2p3AOwVqCvVJgDpcZ0J0F2OH5638iBDfW8QPcC1EL4yw4DoDSpHriJWGGlwqwx-SiRhZqi3tmylV-ZKxv2kLNFaImOA0rh0zB2pKMWEkfW68PObfwXILW7_F6CMGT9N1T9wX6hgswcZwVf9BEHHdyLOq0cPZyf-B7QK3wuUreUuAwxQJw/4ji/DnRgeBh1TwK7mSKCpKxTIA/h10/h001.jc9kXJoSnz3Kcogr45uZpN5tbNy1yRYDpDraBK6-5es) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. name: Louisiana Voter Action Project
subject: We cannot let them get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Though a long and winding fight last year Louisiana's voters got the fair map they deserved . Now the Supreme Court is not only going to try and take that away, but also try and knock out the last vestiges of the Voting Rights Act in its totality.
We can let [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_2&amount=25] SCOTUS get away [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_2&amount=25] with this, Folks. RUSH $25 or more to stand up for the districts we deserve in Louisiana and elsewhere across the country>> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Politico: Louisiana asks Supreme Court to gut Voting Rights Act and ban use of race in redistricting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_2&amount=25]
There's no way to sugarcoat this, Team: Louisiana is asking the Supreme Court to gut the central provision of the Voting Rights Act and ban any use of race in redistricting.
In a legal brief filed this week, the state urged the Supreme Court to overturn a landmark 1986 ruling that established a legal test for when a voting map illegally dilutes minorities’ voter power. That ruling, Thornburg v. Gingles, has been understood for decades to require that states with significant communities of minority voters draw districts that fairly reflect their voting power.
Louisiana also told the Supreme Court it has made the decision not to defend the state’s current congressional map from 2024. That map contains two majority-Black districts among the state’s six House seats. This unusual move comes as the state claims it was " coerced " into complying with the Voting Rights Act.
This is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Chief Justice John Roberts has been working to gut the VRA for more than a decade. The VRA's provision against racial gerrymandering is one of the last major legs of the law standing.Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
Team: We can't tolerate this kind of blatant partisanship overruling our voting rights. Stand up for fair districts in Louisiana and beyond with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back. Our right to vote depends on it >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_2&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=083125_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=083125_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083125_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083125_2&amount=20]

body:

#

— Team Magaziner

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: My final email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
If 1 in 3 folks reading this pitch in, we’ll hit our goal in no time. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376004/566819290/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGZmMzY4ZC1hZjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-ktv_bS9U1a79-Cvjw_8tClRfmiUd0M5mq27oUi2XM=&emci=712c1d69-ba82-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3dff368d-af86-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=252045)
---
Team, this is the last email you’ll get from me today. We’re closing the books on our fundraising for August at midnight tonight. [**Is there anything else I can say to earn your support before the deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376005/566819291/1597441237?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250831_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGZmMzY4ZC1hZjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a-ktv_bS9U1a79-Cvjw_8tClRfmiUd0M5mq27oUi2XM=) What if I told you that meeting our goals determines our ability to respond to MAGA attacks and let them know that we won’t back down? What if I told you that your support lets me focus on fighting to hold the Trump administration accountable and uplift Democratic candidates? A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

clean_body: = Hey friend, My team has reached out a couple times in the last few days about our End of Month deadline. I wanted to send a final email because the deadline is coming up in just a few hours, and we were hoping you’d help us bridge the gap? Because Trump is attempting to overwhelm the news with his chaos (redistricting, threatening sending troops to Chicago, attacks on voting rights, etc), we saw a drop in our digital fundraising as everyone’s attention is divided – and that set us behind for the quarter. Because of your grassroots efforts, we’ve been able to make up a lot of the loss – but we’re still just under $1,000 short of where we wanted to be for August. = = Thank you, Mark | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. name: Andy Beshear (personal)
subject: One more personal question.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
I just want to take a minute to thank you, Peter.

While so many folks have fallen into a summer slump, you’ve kept this team moving forward. And because of you, _we’re beating the odds._

In Kentucky and across the country, my team and I have been hard at work supporting leaders and good candidates who are ready to put the focus back where it belongs: **On the people.**

Not on special interests, not on party insiders, but on people who get up every day, go to work, and do their best to take care of their families. Peter, the truth is simple: Voters care most about what is happening in their daily lives, and elected officials and candidates should be working every day to make their lives easier.

That’s what real leadership looks like, and it's our responsibility to ensure that your voices are prioritized if we want to keep making real progress. But to keep this momentum going, I need your help one more time before midnight tonight. We’re closing in on our August fundraising goal — and reaching it means we can support and uplift the leaders who will never forget who they serve.

**Will you chip in $5 right now to help us reach our goal and hit the ground running as we look ahead to September? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/itt-q3-2025?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376366/566820390/841405539?refcode=em25_250831_eom2_fndd_gq_act___andypers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250831_eom2_fndd_gq_act___andypers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=1eaffc76-b286-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode2=1eaffc76-b286-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWVhZmZjNzYtYjI4Ni1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H5UYkx73JYWvvBEBLPzq8ITdURSTFwXBL9YX_Lwccpk=)**

With gratitude,

Andy

body:
Sharing a few thoughts this Sunday. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376517/566821061/823540626?refcode=ea.f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjA0NzdiZi1iMzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6qAs5TMVWrnmqWasiBTnPkzQMwXxOpoOlkCxYs-q2k=&emci=56519d92-e484-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
It’s the last day of the month, so I have to ask for your donation. But you deserve to know why I’m asking and a reason why this campaign deserves your investment. _So where should I begin, Peter?_ I can **reaffirm my commitment to the basic rights** Americans should be able to count on: accessing reproductive care, having a say in our democracy, breathing clean air, and drinking clean water. I can tell you **I’m infuriated at the prospect of slashing Medicaid and SNAP** so billionaires can get a bigger tax break. I can promise again that **I will do everything I can to help make this country better** as the next United States Senator from North Carolina. But at a time when extreme Republicans in D.C. are loyal to nothing but their own power, it’s important that you know this about me: **I understand that as an elected leader, my duty is to be a voice for the people of this state**** and our country****.** I will always listen and do my best to address folks’ concerns. I’m ready to do the hard, necessary work of fixing what’s broken in Washington and upholding the laws and democratic values that are at the core of what America stands for. **[Peter, we’re just a few hours away from the end of August, and I’m personally asking one last time if you can chip in. GOP groups are already spending money here in NC to try to defeat me, so I need your help to fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376518/566821062/-1743631236?refcode=ea.f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjA0NzdiZi1iMzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6qAs5TMVWrnmqWasiBTnPkzQMwXxOpoOlkCxYs-q2k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376519/566821063/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.f60477bf-b386-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjA0NzdiZi1iMzg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i6qAs5TMVWrnmqWasiBTnPkzQMwXxOpoOlkCxYs-q2k=)

clean_body: Sharing a few thoughts this Sunday. | It’s the last day of the month, so I have to ask for your donation. But you deserve to know why I’m asking and a reason why this campaign deserves your investment. So where should I begin, Peter? I can reaffirm my commitment to the basic rights Americans should be able to count on: accessing reproductive care, having a say in our democracy, breathing clean air, and drinking clean water. I can tell you I’m infuriated at the prospect of slashing Medicaid and SNAP so billionaires can get a bigger tax break. I can promise again that I will do everything I can to help make this country better as the next United States Senator from North Carolina. But at a time when extreme Republicans in D.C. are loyal to nothing but their own power, it’s important that you know this about me: I understand that as an elected leader, my duty is to be a voice for the people of this state and our country. I will always listen and do my best to address folks’ concerns. I’m ready to do the hard, necessary work of fixing what’s broken in Washington and upholding the laws and democratic values that are at the core of what America stands for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I appreciate all you do, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. name: Mark Warner
subject: This is the last time you’ll hear from me this month​​, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376557/566821161/172610512?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM7RS_250831_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTJmMDEwNy1iNDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZHJJkT0gO2_we0OpaJFdxOD-hl2dvYY-ZXXteyY3EU=) Derek,

In a moment, I’m going to ask you one last time to chip in before our fundraising deadline at midnight, but first, I want to say thank you.

Your engagement month-to-month – whether that be simply opening and reading an email like this one or donating to my reelection campaign – is making an impact in a consequential election where your rights, freedoms, bank accounts, and democracy itself are on the line.

Whether or not you donate today, please know I’m grateful you’re on my team. I know that with supporters like you on my side, we can hold on to this seat and flip the Senate for Democrats.

And look, I know you hear from my campaign frequently – and I don’t expect you to donate every time I ask. But today is an important milestone for our campaign. We’re closing in on our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight, and it appears we might fall short of our projected target for August. So if you can, pitch in right now before we close the books on the month. Here’s a link to give, if you’re able: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250706-eom**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376558/566821162/172610512?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOM7RS_250831_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTJmMDEwNy1iNDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZHJJkT0gO2_we0OpaJFdxOD-hl2dvYY-ZXXteyY3EU=)

name: Chris Ahuja
subject: We don’t take AIPAC money. We take action.
body:
End of Month: let’s finish strong!

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=7074b6d334&e=5a6ee82cdb)
| | | | | | Dear Peter,This month we proved what grassroots power looks like. We organized in neighborhoods across L.A. and stood strong against fascism and hate. ICE gestapo continues snatching our neighbors, and we continue to say “Not in our America!” **We made it clear: no AIPAC money, no corporate PACs. Ever. That’s why Track AIPAC endorsed us.**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=64dfce9815&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Now we’re hours from closing the books on August, and we’re just $2000 away from our goal.** How we finish tonight decides how strong we roll into September—field, comms, and the organizing muscle it takes to win.[**Can you chip in $15, $35, or $100 before midnight to help us close the gap?**](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=f2c31ea53f&e=5a6ee82cdb) This is how we prove that people can beat lobbyists and the MAGA Trump machine. **Let’s finish August strong.**
**With gratitude,
**[****](https://chrisahuja.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=97f443092fb7c091746070aa0&id=4e3e5145cf&e=5a6ee82cdb)**Chris Ahuja****Democrat for Congress, CD-32**

subject: Final thought
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376909/566822691/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTJkNWZkNy1iNTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OFenLYChva_xKwgwIOyZkAE4ibbjKIGuqCgkutncs=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376911/566822693/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTJkNWZkNy1iNTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OFenLYChva_xKwgwIOyZkAE4ibbjKIGuqCgkutncs=)

Peter, I know you’ve heard from me and the team a ton lately — sorry about that. The truth is we’re coming up on a big midnight deadline, and I hope you’ll hear me out one last time before the clock runs out.

I never expected to be in Congress. I ran because when I saw our entrenched MAGA representative turning his back on CA-27 in favor of the MAGA agenda, I knew I had to take a stand.

And I wasn’t alone. My message resonated with thousands of supporters like you, who knocked on doors, made calls, and donated to support my campaign.

**We defied the political headwinds in November 2024 and narrowly defeated the GOP in this race. Since then, I’ve been fighting for our communities in Congress – despite being in the minority party.**

While I’m using my position to the best of my ability to push back on the devastating impacts of the MAGA agenda, controlling the House majority is the only surefire way to stop the attacks on working families and our democracy.

Just this week, more essential programs are in turmoil. This White House attacked our science agencies by firing the leader of the Center for Disease Control (CDC) – the latest in a long string of assaults on longstanding institutions.

The fight to end the chaos starts now, and I’m already a top target of national Republicans who want nothing more than to flip CA-27 right back to red. It’s why they’re backing my new opponent and are running attack ads as you read this message.

Unlike the first time I ran for this seat, I’m already in Congress – laser-focused on delivering results, not fundraising. But if we hit tonight’s August goal, we’ll be better equipped to protect this seat and give Democrats a chance to win the majority.

**[If you’re with me, $3 or any amount – even one dollar – will show that our movement is still strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114376919/566822699/-1384072709?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTJkNWZkNy1iNTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=--OFenLYChva_xKwgwIOyZkAE4ibbjKIGuqCgkutncs=)**

name: Christina Bohannan (personal)
subject: Things don't magically get better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter,

My parents taught me to see the good in everything, even when life was tough. But they also taught me that when the path you’re on isn’t leading you where you want to go, you don’t just sit back and hope things will magically get better. _You take action and choose a better way forward._

That lesson has been with me all my life, and it’s what drove my decision to run for IA-01. Our community is being represented by someone who has chosen time and again to put political elites and party bosses first. Mariannette Miller-Meeks has left the people of this district behind, and if nothing changes, she’s going to keep doing it.

I won’t stand by quietly and let that happen.

I know we deserve better than what we’re getting. We deserve leaders who listen first and who are willing to stand up even to their own party when the priorities in Washington don’t line up with the needs of the people here at home.

This campaign is about choosing a different path. One where our kids have strong schools, where farmers and small businesses can thrive, and where families can afford to live with dignity and security. That’s the future I will fight for in the halls of Congress.

Tonight is our August end-of-month fundraising deadline, and how we finish this month will shape the road ahead. **Will you make a donation before midnight to help us close out the month strong and keep building this campaign, together? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cb-q3-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114377004/566822938/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250831_EOM5_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250831_EOM5_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5ed49d3c-b686-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWQ0OWQzYy1iNjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TBYOoBnxnwnx7B1nFvtsWZPlul06AwzgjFSkezyaAk8=)**

With gratitude,

Christina |

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I can’t do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
| | |
---
Friend —
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024, and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's before our end-of-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114377103/566823356/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5592-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjQ5MjQ4NC1iNjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlmykTZYAyrtntZ0nmzF82UYLbhsPJ5Y9Fd_2dBftiY=)

name: Raul
subject: Can you step up before midnight?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=2ERettbojYtQNqut%2Bs0RQCtGuAAOXOYHJj8YqU1uBkSoYf1y3vgWD7mpTlhxygLxOywhsu%2BlqRgM6CqjMdoyN0RTbdwSt4BXJ5E6Mhm97hFLNaFxINFo6%2BSSRo615bnIiXQnNnm8mIoN8mHdgXMbsoVyQZB7SxcPrwXAm5E2SYq9nk4o5pqhORlThjmaSLLOY%2BkXLhNHA%2BZmpVNXhySDVnDOtK835hZRshNZHokfRz0prAunzaH8YXoEHyCAIqP8Bn1F16GM0HmMf2IEthXNuLYv76d57eHxJYjRlbGe0cH9ReMpCcse8gAyh4UxIb3KN%2BpfCOJ1vq7wONSVNEmJaET5iprejSj0JQfSVW9W7VAf84bc7rDXl2mxO81o66kC3sURgvicrMhMsUB6in1MCqYM5rei%2B5lkmTOuLV79HNR6LD8ZTrkD1d3HWVnEkGwR]

# [#]
It’s Raul — sorry to bother you on a Sunday.

I know it’s the weekend, but tonight at midnight is our end-of-month deadline, and I wouldn’t be reaching out if it weren’t important. We’re still short of hitting our $7,000 goal.

We’re working to build a campaign focused on what actually matters to our communities here in CA-25 — not distractions, not division, but real solutions.

Unfortunately, Trump and the Republicans have a different agenda. They’re creating chaos, fueling fear, and doing everything they can to tighten their grip on power — including targeting this very district.

That’s why hitting this goal matters. If we’re going to push back and move this district — and this country — in a better direction, we need to be ready.

Will you chip in $10 before midnight to help us build a campaign that delivers the leadership CA-25 deserves?

DONATE $10» [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-aug25?amount=10&source=SBD_RR_EM_FR_083125_EOM5_D1_S1]

Thank you for standing with us,

Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.

cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats,
Thank you for joining our training on rural organizing! With the passage of Trump's Big, Ugly Bill, and E lection Day only 65 days away, we must ensure we mobilize voters in every corner of California to vote YES on Prop 50 and fight back against Trump's election rigging.
That is why CADEM is hitting the ground running and organizing now for the November 4 special election . Will you volunteer with us to pass Prop 50?
LINK_URL [LINK_URL]
VOLUNTEER WITH CADEM [http://cadem.org/castrong]
Here is how you can take action:
* [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/] Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833391/] to call voters in English to support Prop 50 starting September 6. Phonebanks are available 6 days a week.
* Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833417/] to call voters in Spanish and English to support Prop 50 starting September 7. Bilingual phonebanks are available twice a week.
* Sign up here [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/812582/] for our next training on messaging swing voters on September 16.
* Stay connected by following us on social media. [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
Thank you for doing your part to defend democracy.
CADEM

Hi Peter, it’s Valerie. My one piece of advice for someone figuring out their way in life is: **You need to know your _“WHY.”_** No matter what path you take, you must be sure of _why you_ feel called to do so. I’ll admit it, Peter — it took me a bit of time to figure out what exactly my _why_ was. Then, almost all at once, I realized I have been following my _why_ my whole life. From volunteering at my sons’ school, joining the school governance committee, running for Orange County Commissioner, then for State House and now ending up in Congress — my career in public service has been somewhat unconventional. But my _why_ has always remained the same: **To uplift the common good.** I’ve found my calling, Peter. I’m in Congress fighting to better my home district, and set precedents of excellence for years to come. But my mission is impossible without your support. Will you help defend my seat by pitching in $10 or anything you can afford before our end of month deadline at midnight? clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, it’s Valerie. My one piece of advice for someone figuring out their way in life is: You need to know your “WHY.” No matter what path you take, you must be sure of why you feel called to do so. I’ll admit it, Peter — it took me a bit of time to figure out what exactly my why was. Then, almost all at once, I realized I have been following my why my whole life. From volunteering at my sons’ school, joining the school governance committee, running for Orange County Commissioner, then for State House and now ending up in Congress — my career in public service has been somewhat unconventional. But my why has always remained the same: To uplift the common good. I’ve found my calling, Peter. I’m in Congress fighting to better my home district, and set precedents of excellence for years to come. But my mission is impossible without your support. Will you help defend my seat by pitching in $10 or anything you can afford before our end of month deadline at midnight? Here's a link for you: = Thank you for helping me fulfill my why. — Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Nick Searcy
subject: I saw what really happened on January 6th
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20836848/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdGVzWHJNc2E4eQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MzE/LbmNsRFpRU3JXTg/qP2hpZHM9bmNuekJTS3c1SHhieWVscw/gaLTLMQ/s4rfb10c920)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Patriot,

I was at the Capitol on January 6th.

I didn’t see an “insurrection.” I saw Americans praying. Singing the national anthem. Waving flags. I saw families, veterans, and peaceful patriots standing up for what they believed in.

**What I didn’t expect — _what none of us could’ve imagined_ — was the brutal retaliation that followed...**

Since that day, I’ve watched in horror as men and women I stood with that day have been hunted down and treated like terrorists.

After 4 long years, the January 6th defendants have finally been pardoned. But the pardons alone aren't enough.

Some are still rotting in jail today.

Others are trying to pick up the pieces of lives that were shattered by a government determined to make an example out of them.

They've endured political persecution, lawfare, and a social stigma that sometimes makes a second chance seem impossible.

That’s why I produced the films _Capitol Punishment_ and _The War on Truth_ and why I am proud to support Stand in the Gap, a nonprofit on a mission to provide the help, hope, and healing J6ers need to succeed in their second chance.

They’re helping former January 6 defendants and their families rebuild their lives, with legal aid, health care coverage, counseling, housing support, and most importantly — hope.

[You can help Stand in the Gap give these patriots the second chance at freedom they deserve by donating today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate Now](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
These are real people just like you and me... Fathers. Mothers. Sisters. Brothers. Patriots. Their only crime was showing up to take a stand for their beliefs.

Every one of them had their constitutional rights violated.

But the media doesn’t want you to hear their stories. The official January 6 committee suppressed the full story, cherry‐picking footage to paint the day as an “insurrection” while ignoring the peaceful majority.

The government wants them forgotten.

**But Stand in the Gap has not forgotten the prisoner.**

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to January 6 defendants transitioning back into society after incarceration.

Let’s show these patriots they’re not forgotten, Patriot.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate $10](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
With gratitude,
Nick Searcy

P.S. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.

Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties in finding a job,
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm,
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives,
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison,
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for January 6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

But they can’t do it without you.

[Donate Now](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20836848/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MzE/LbmNsRFpRU3JXTg/qP2hpZHM9bmNuekJTS3c1SHhieWVscw/gaLTLMQ/scq5aa84dff)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Before midnight, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’ve got just a few hours until our end of month deadline at midnight tonight. That deadline comes at a moment unlike any other in our nation’s history.
#

Peter just a few hours left until our deadline.
This one comes at a moment unlike any other in our nation’s history.
I served in Iraq as a Marine at the height of the war, about 20 years ago. All those years ago, I never thought I’d see times like these. I signed up to defend our Constitution. To make sure exactly this kind of thing never happened at home.
This is authoritarianism. It is here. And we need to stand up now or risk losing the rights and liberties we were born with.
You know what’s happening, but most people still don’t. If we’re going to build a movement that stops and reverses Trump’s power grab, we have to start reaching everyone.
That’s why I’m trying to meet and speak to people beyond just cable news. It’s why I’m doing podcasts and social media, interviews with local and national papers. It’s why I’m doing town halls across the country.
That’s what I did in my campaign. It’s what I’ve been doing since I got elected. And I’m going to keep doing it as long as I have to until we start to break through to people.
[**To keep that going, I’m humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign. All I ask is whatever you can afford, even if it’s a donation as small as $1. Anything helps, truly. And it means the world to me to have your support.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250831-2-160&t=1&akid=3951%2E734936%2EzWgL5Q)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

It’s why I’m doing podcasts and social media, interviews with local and national papers. It’s why I’m doing town halls across the country. That’s what I did in my campaign. It’s what I’ve been doing since I got elected. And I’m going to keep doing it as long as I have to until we start to break through to people. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for everything, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ll keep this quick.

The midnight deadline is looming, so I’ll keep this quick:
**We only have a few hours left until we close the books on August fundraising, and we still have work to do so we can close the gap and hit our $33,000 end-of-month goal.**
Every donation before midnight tonight helps us stay in this fight, keep New Hampshire’s seat blue, and build the Senate majority Democrats need to stop Trump’s MAGA agenda.
If you’ve been waiting for the right moment — this is it.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: One more email, before it gets any later
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I really appreciate you reading this during a holiday weekend, and I hope you know that I don’t expect you to chip in to every email we send.
#

Hey,
I really appreciate you reading this during a holiday weekend, and I hope you know that I don’t expect you to chip in to every email we send. But this is my last ditch attempt to get to where we need to be before our deadline at midnight tonight.
We’re close — real close — but not quite there.
Our average donation right now hovers around $22. If everyone reading this chipped in that much, we’d absolutely destroy our goals. But not everyone can donate.
If you’re one of the few who can donate, it would really help us reach our goals and send a loud message to Trump and the MAGA Right.
[**Please, chip in $22 or whatever you can afford, and help us hit these goals before midnight. Any amount helps, and it all adds up.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25/.JGniHS&refcode=em250831-3-700k&t=1&akid=6173%2E6688874%2EVm44SK)
**[CHIP IN $22](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25/.JGniHS&amount=22&refcode=em250831-3-700k&t=2&akid=6173%2E6688874%2EVm44SK)**
Thanks again,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6173%2E6688874%2EVm44SK).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Every gift matters, whether it’s $5, $10, or more. We don’t need DC mega-donors. We need an army of patriots standing together. Will you be one of the final 97? We're in this together, Team Hawley | \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: Wednesday, August 27, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: 137 donors short. | | This is urgent. Our end-of-month deadline hits Sunday at midnight and my team just told me the truth: We are 137 new donors short of our 500 goal. Every new donor is proof that Americans are fed up with the Left’s reckless agenda. Every donor is one more patriot raising their hand and saying, “I will not surrender this nation.” I’m asking you personally: will you be one of the final 137? Be donor #364 out of 500: [[DONATE $10]]() [[DONATE $25]]() [[DONATE $50]]() [[DONATE $100]]() [[DONATE $250]]() Thank you for never backing down. body:
Thank you for opening this email.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4152%2E400544%2EYN8R51)
**Thank you for opening this email.**
It’s a holiday weekend, so we promise to make this quick:
**Our August deadline is at midnight, and my team just informed me that we are still $20,000 short of our goal. With Republicans jumping into this race, we can’t afford to fall behind.**
I’m running to change the game for New Mexico and build a state where every family has what they need to succeed. But I can’t do it alone.
**[If you’re in a position to do so, can you pitch in a contribution of $5 or any amount to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250831_2_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250831-4152&refcode2=4152_400544_YN8R51&akid=4152%2E400544%2EYN8R51)** **[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250831_2_eom?amount=5&refcode=em20250831-4152&refcode2=4152_400544_YN8R51&akid=4152%2E400544%2EYN8R51)**

Deb

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: This campaign isn’t about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250831-834&t=1001&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250831-834&t=1002&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5 ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

This campaign isn’t about me.

It’s about the ideals we share — Medicare for All, taking on corporate
power, and ending the genocide in Gaza. It’s about building an economy
where working people can pay the bills, put food on the table, and thrive.

And that’s exactly what scares the political establishment.

Already, more than 1,700 people have raised their hands to volunteer. Tens
of thousands more have donated to keep us moving forward. And we’ve
already traveled over 8,000 miles across Michigan.

DC is watching. The pundits are watching. And AIPAC and their MAGA
billionaire allies are watching, too.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250831-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250831-834&refcode2=843_251025_Chqqx5&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5 ]If you haven’t already, and you’re ready to join us, make a
$10 donation to say you’re in.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250831-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250831-834&refcode2=843_251025_Chqqx5&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5 ]Donate $10 ››

Who Michigan sends to the Senate in 2026 matters — not just for us, but
for the country.

This is a state Donald Trump won by 1.4% in 2024. The Senate majority
could come down to who wins here.

And right now, with the Democratic Party at record levels of unpopularity,
we can’t afford to play it safe.

Sending an empty suit to Washington who takes marching orders from
corporate PACs won’t inspire people. It won’t win back trust. And it won’t
deliver the change working people deserve.

This campaign is different. We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs. That
means every single mile we travel, every event we hold, and every
conversation we spark happens because of people like you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250831-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250831-834&refcode2=843_251025_Chqqx5&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5 ]So if you’re ready to prove that people-powered politics can still
win, please contribute $10 now to fuel our campaign.

With gratitude,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=843%2E251025%2EChqqx5

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

This campaign is different. We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs. That means every single mile we travel, every event we hold, and every conversation we spark happens because of people like you. [ ]So if you’re ready to prove that people-powered politics can still win, please contribute $10 now to fuel our campaign. With gratitude, Abdul

body:
# [#] Hi there, it’s Josh. I wanted to reach out personally and remind you that our end-of-month deadline is tonight at midnight. Your support means a lot to me and our campaign.

Finishing this month stronger than ever means we will have the resources necessary to expand voter outreach, defend NJ-05 from continued extremist attacks, and continue to spread our message of bipartisan problem-solving.

This is our opportunity to prove that we have what it takes (and more) to put up a strong fight in 2026.

Midnight is just a few hours away, and we’re still a few supporters shy of hitting our crucial $10,000 goal. So please, if you haven’t done so already, chip in $ to help us get there: www.actblue.com/donate/TeamJosh/YourPersonalLink [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2508?amount=]

Thank you for your support,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. ---|---|---
# [District Round‐up 8.31.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F08%2F31%2Fdistrict-round-up-8-31-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=6962816acead461158ccd193851a8875&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on August 31, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=8bff2df500716f715b75a94fe8e814b5aef5ab3632114952d058fbfe40ad0aa3&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5092&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=499a0143d9debb73d1bdf079e1f848bb&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=31a8c1f64f53467e83abbb83dfc3da26)
This past week, our country was rocked by another senseless murder perpetrated by gun violence, the leading cause of death for US children. Indeed, two children were gunned down, not outside, not at a game, not in a school, not at a movie, not in a grocery store, not at a mall, nor at so many other places Americans have been slaughtered by bullets.
No, these two children were praying inside of a church. None of that religiosity saved them.
But no one should accept children being shot anywhere.
And so I posted on Facebook this graphic to explain my position on Gun Safety in contrast to that of our Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce.
And did Representative Joyce do anything in response to this fresh American horror while neighbors, organizations, and government entities have been flying their flags half mast?
Absolutely not.
Instead, he served up this image in his newsletter today, as if promoting gun sales is the answer to innocent blood spilled.
As a reminder, here is a picture of innocent blood spilled from the Uvalde school murders of children by gun in Texas. I've made it much smaller if you need to skip over it.
Please help our neighbors vote this tone-deaf elitist out of office so that gun violence is no longer the number one killer of US children.
In other news, yesterday, Campaign Manager, Jack Stansbury, and I traveled to Burnham, Mifflin County for their Community Day Fair. Many thanks to the [Mifflin County Democrats](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=0a6557e2f0d80c21c660a6f7399ea858c475df8b939644b36faac445f2709ba5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5092&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=ec88be8b3d86d31d84ce270c716cf17c&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=31a8c1f64f53467e83abbb83dfc3da26) for hosting a booth there. I had a great time speaking and listening to voters about what is on their hearts and minds concerning the federal government. Later, I spoke with voters at the Juniata County Fair and learned about the Tuscarora Academy and the Tuscarora people.
Unsurprisingly, no one I spoke to could come up with the name of our US Representative because he hides. Multimillionaire John Joyce is too elitist to answer our phone calls, letters, and emails, much less inquire of his constituency at a small town fair.
But I, Beth Farnham, am glad to take the time and care to talk about our precious Democracy, the rising cost of living, and so many other issues with Everyday Americans. Please vote for me in November 2026 so I can properly represent us!
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b0bdcf1021173a97eac570679fdcfe928e2c5d3e5a387859295d6d1e2552d17a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5092&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=f8b09372217b4b88f557db0baaf6414b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=31a8c1f64f53467e83abbb83dfc3da26)!
P.S. Many thanks to Campaign Manager [Jack Stansbury](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1f0ac3c4b7ba24c7a3312e4c9a7941cb7bae25dda85cd868fb77bb53f5417edd&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5092&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=c5c0b03a7f42fc061d5796c2647a8190&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=31a8c1f64f53467e83abbb83dfc3da26) for accompanying me across our beautiful Congressional District and for taking photos on this gorgeous day.
P.P.S. Check out the Fall crafts from the Mifflin Dems.
Later, Jack and I attended the Juniata County Fair and stopped by the Juniata Historical Society booth where we learned a lot about the Pomeroy-Academia bridge and the Tuscarora Academy. Spencer McLoughlin is the Chair of the Juniata County Dems and has extensive knowledge of Juniata County.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

clean_body: | Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-cros... | or | | | or ---|---|--- | | By Elizabeth Farnham on August 31, 2025 ---|--- Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: This past week, our country was rocked by another senseless murder perpetrated by gun violence, the leading cause of death for US children. Indeed, two children were gunned down, not outside, not at a game, not in a school, not at a movie, not in a grocery store, not at a mall, nor at so many other places Americans have been slaughtered by bullets. No, these two children were praying inside of a church. None of that religiosity saved them. But no one should accept children being shot anywhere. And so I posted on Facebook this graphic to explain my position on Gun Safety in contrast to that of our Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce. And did Representative Joyce do anything in response to this fresh American horror while neighbors, organizations, and government entities have been flying their flags half mast? Absolutely not. Instead, he served up this image in his newsletter today, as if promoting gun sales is the answer to innocent blood spilled. As a reminder, here is a picture of innocent blood spilled from the Uvalde school murders of children by gun in Texas. I've made it much smaller if you need to skip over it. Please help our neighbors vote this tone-deaf elitist out of office so that gun violence is no longer the number one killer of US children. In other news, yesterday, Campaign Manager, Jack Stansbury, and I traveled to Burnham, Mifflin County for their Community Day Fair. Many thanks to the for hosting a booth there. I had a great time speaking and listening to voters about what is on their hearts and minds concerning the federal government. Later, I spoke with voters at the Juniata County Fair and learned about the Tuscarora Academy and the Tuscarora people. Unsurprisingly, no one I spoke to could come up with the name of our US Representative because he hides. Multimillionaire John Joyce is too elitist to answer our phone calls, letters, and emails, much less inquire of his constituency at a small town fair. But I, Beth Farnham, am glad to take the time and care to talk about our precious Democracy, the rising cost of living, and so many other issues with Everyday Americans. Please vote for me in November 2026 so I can properly represent us! Together, we ! P.S. Many thanks to Campaign Manager for accompanying me across our beautiful Congressional District and for taking photos on this gorgeous day. P.P.S. Check out the Fall crafts from the Mifflin Dems. Later, Jack and I attended the Juniata County Fair and stopped by the Juniata Historical Society booth where we learned a lot about the Pomeroy-Academia bridge and the Tuscarora Academy. Spencer McLoughlin is the Chair of the Juniata County Dems and has extensive knowledge of Juniata County. If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: Time is Running Out!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://voteheidicampbell.com/]
Peter,
This is it, the last day of August! Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tonight, and we are working hard to hit our goal.
Your consistent support has allowed us to achieve so much for District 20, and we need your support one last time this month to ensure we enter September with the resources we need.
Chip in today before midnight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/heidiemail2025?refcode=augusteom] to help us reach our August fundraising goal.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/heidiemail2025?refcode=augusteom]
You can also provide support and join us for our upcoming comedy show fundraiser at Third Coast Comedy Club! Details are below and you can RSVP here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thirdcoastfr]
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thirdcoastfr]
Thank you for being an important part of our team.
With gratitude,
Heidi Campbell
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thirdcoastfr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thirdcoastfr]
Senator Heidi Campbell is a Tennessee State Senator, representing District 20. She is championing change for Tennessee and won't rest until we see gun safety reform, corporate accountability, and a safe and prosperous community where everyone can thrive.
