name: eric sorensen (personal)
subject: Final request before the holiday
body:
I’m glad I caught you, Peter.
Tonight marks our August end-of-month fundraising deadline, our second to last deadline of the quarter and officially four months from our election year.
At the moment, we’re still coming up $2,527 short of our online fundraising goal. Will you rush in a donation before midnight to help us meet this monthly benchmark?
Here’s a good link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q3-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114378675/566829025/896231865?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M5NWM2Ni1iZTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WM3M-aV6M7PthI1EoL_IYMYZe_chY2Cr3VSruYNdElA=)
Every day I spend back home in the district, every pained call I receive from a concerned neighbor, is a reminder of just how critical it is that Democrats retake the House. It’s clear that the MAGA Caucus is operating at the mercy of one tyrannical man’s whims. The best way we can push back on their dangerous agenda is by relegating them back into the minority.
And our fundraising goals aren’t random -- they’re the minimum amount we need in order to educate and engage the voters who will turn out and keep this competitive district blue.
In a district this close, every grassroots contribution will make a difference.
This is the last time I’ll reach before the deadline. If you can, please chip in $3 to help us get over the hump: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q3-2025**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114378676/566829026/896231865?refcode=em-8.31.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2M5NWM2Ni1iZTg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WM3M-aV6M7PthI1EoL_IYMYZe_chY2Cr3VSruYNdElA=)
Thank you, and have a happy Labor Day, Peter.
-Eric

Eric Sorensen for Illinois
P.O. Box 1172
Moline, IL 61265
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://act.ericforillinois.com/p/uulxx7KmPEOHzSyNB6xzow2?unsubscribedata=dqoHJuvHMhlRwD7X0G%2BONF4aaxbT3MPWw8NsEuJil%2FFaVUtgW7EZAbrcbip9zag5ctwmYD0pouiprF17AnvvMv%2BxdDJX6z%2BtISvade6yfT5GqwtXJGMcJn2oaTwDiKkZKLyJs1rMMP6y9A01udiE%2FVs5AEPKlwtGKPZBYWxFNztDDXs51UxWWnYwl7OresoRmZU8Vq4iWP0IjCj9Kg6DA3jRQRjNQXN3Hj4T7h5%2B2j%2B60zs%2FeHxlg67OoBaL%2BXcZZ7RI%2FLXlprQueg0ZUUbIKO6rQ1wj%2Fzk9Mb%2F%2BKaaDAKbGSoKJSuAYs5uaPhWoPTVvlHqbRwrXjbMH3EDMMEVvyy78x8Dnc6WJAaY2zM7lsCJckA%2B4F53Il2NT84GdGIamxg02Jv4S8Tas9e665oujIrL8MHuyRdA1ab3LKUA5SwVhC7gBvhpJhRSeDdHT4E%2FX).

name: Powered by People
subject: Hoping to reach you before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
We know it’s late on a Sunday, so we’ll keep this short.
We’re so close to reaching our end of month fundraising goal and we need your support right now to help us get there.
This month Ken Paxton has relentlessly attacked Powered by People and Beto, but we remain undeterred in our fight to stand up for Texans and our democracy.
Powered by People and our work is about showing up—every day, in every community—especially where others won’t. We believe in the power of people working together, but this is only possible if you’re in it with us.
[**Will you chip in $3 to help meet our $15,000 goal ahead of tonight’s end-of-month deadline? Every single donation will make a difference.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65954?t=2&akid=240336%2E444211%2EpFuBT1)
**[DONATE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/65954?t=3&akid=240336%2E444211%2EpFuBT1)**
In solidarity,
Powered by People

clean_body: We know it’s late on a Sunday, so we’ll keep this short. We’re so close to reaching our end of month fundraising goal and we need your support right now to help us get there. This month Ken Paxton has relentlessly attacked Powered by People and Beto, but we remain undeterred in our fight to stand up for Texans and our democracy. Powered by People and our work is about showing up—every day, in every community—especially where others won’t. We believe in the power of people working together, but this is only possible if you’re in it with us. In solidarity, Powered by People Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: pls read before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We're falling short of our end-of-month goal and need your help to close the gap

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=726%2E49239%2E9uDO8j)
| | |
---
Sorry to reach out again, null. But we've got a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and we're still 13% short of our $250,000 goal.
It's especially important we hit this goal because the GOP is planning to spend millions to flip Michigan red – and we urgently need the resources to fight back.
I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: **[Will you rush $5 now and help us close the fundraising gap before midnight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5468?t=2&akid=726%2E49239%2E9uDO8j)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5409?t=3&akid=726%2E49239%2E9uDO8j)
---
Thank you,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5465?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=726%2E49239%2E9uDO8j) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5415?t=5&akid=726%2E49239%2E9uDO8j)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Hi Derek —
I need to ask **_one more time_** before tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. **We’re just $7,500 short. [Will you pitch in right now to help us close the gap?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk215-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10278%2E434096%2E1wN36p)**

---
On Tuesday, the Senate’s back in session. You can bet Republicans are eager to get right back to work gutting funding for programs folks rely on to pay for giveaways to their rich pals.
They’re pushing a secret plan – leaked courtesy of Trump’s Treasury Secretary – to privatize Social Security. And they’re hiding it behind a smokescreen of lies.
Here’s what I’m fighting for:
👉 Hold Trump and the GOP accountable for gutting Medicaid + food stamps
👉 Stop their backroom plan to hand Social Security to Wall Street
👉 Cut through their lies and tell voters the truth
👉 Kick these crooks out and put working people first
**[If everyone reading this gave $5 right now, we’d hit our $30,000 goal tonight. If you haven’t chipped in yet, now’s the time. Can you pitch in before the deadline?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk215-fr-fl&t=4&akid=10278%2E434096%2E1wN36p)**

John ❤️

name: =?utf-8?B?QeKAmXNoYW50aSBGLiBHaG9sYXI=?=
subject: I’m tired, but…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
This work is personal for me. I’m where I am because other women lifted me up, believed in me, and showed me that I belonged in politics. At Emerge, we’re building that same network of support every day for the women who will lead us forward.

| _[_**Please take a moment to read a personal message from our President and CEO, A’shanti Gholar, before our midnight deadline. Anything you can give will make an impact, but if now is not the time, we still hope you’ll continue reading.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114379188/566830955/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNDVhYjUxLWMwODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHtyxnUabvTVFRs3FXZY9_VfwejjOOzl1awpFW__u5k=)_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114379189/566830956/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNDVhYjUxLWMwODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHtyxnUabvTVFRs3FXZY9_VfwejjOOzl1awpFW__u5k=)
---
Peter,

I’ll be honest with you: I’m tired. And I have a feeling that if you are paying attention, you probably are too.

The attacks on our rights are overwhelming. But that’s the point. **The opposition wants us so exhausted and demoralized that we stop fighting back.**

_But then I think about the women of Emerge._

I think about the 6,500+ women we’ve trained, with more than 1,200 alums serving in office today. I think about our alums in Texas who are standing up to extreme gerrymandering, about the Black women of our Seated Together program who are now in Congress, and about every candidate who puts her name on the ballot to serve her community.

**That’s what gives me hope. That’s why I keep going.**

This work is personal for me. I’m where I am because other women lifted me up, believed in me, and showed me that I belonged in politics. At Emerge, we’re building that same network of support every day for the women who will lead us forward.

[_**But here’s the truth: if we fall short of our August fundraising goal in just a few days, we may have to scale back. That means fewer women trained, fewer leaders ready, and fewer victories at a moment when we need them most. Can you chip in $25 before midnight to help us train more women to run, win, and lead?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114379190/566830957/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNDVhYjUxLWMwODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHtyxnUabvTVFRs3FXZY9_VfwejjOOzl1awpFW__u5k=)

The fight ahead is not easy, but we cannot hand our opponents the victory of silence or surrender. Together, we can turn our anger into action, our exhaustion into energy, and our hope into the women leaders this country so desperately needs.

Thank you for standing with me,

A’shanti F. Gholar
President & CEO, Emerge [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114379191/566830958/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-08-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIwNDVhYjUxLWMwODYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sHtyxnUabvTVFRs3FXZY9_VfwejjOOzl1awpFW__u5k=)

* * *

name: George Latimer
subject: Unity over division
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=YQH4VViS2sT49TShVnFRLYS91PhwO5sKkH9f9%2FtMGrULCGHBrWVOAc%2FOw5KBCQgGKHsbGTckEeBZYETGWgPkI36KFYNXTncjxD6JOjXxvkKC56Dlb94EwbagPQsNSuZZ418NnQuAulnDWaGoP8UGZbFoOzgouW1fAkBtUcD1rX7yuxGcEPuhOS1Audvkebq%2F7kOJ2BAklQmUWbdTqjQ0T48AYsVGjEBoFFADm4E5oOjN2m%2FqCyLNNQhiBbP5%2Flf0WgvnLqg8mKTnHfcvoffn3WahZ6RS8D2EmOOQZKXUo5zRd%2BcIWCMLNP2mGQvBJzrQxQmfRfEsReGWM3lOPxHNh5Edotaho7r8zG6jRk3nUAN1OJleqylA8YstppqoWhCzG0cRHQeW5fzLjvAUDJu245Owyitu4q3FTNUS%2BVMe1DTJpUwvl4OBOCT9%2Bqf%2BtcVq]

# [#]
Hey Peter,

Think for a second: How often do you find yourself recalling one of the many political scandals, divisive speeches, or outright extremist antics that dominate our news cycles?

Now think about how many practical, meaningful pieces of legislation have made it through our gridlocked Congress and improved your life or that of those around you since Trump took office.

The contrast is stark, isn’t it?

We can elect people who gain through division, or we can elect people who are willing to get to work and help the people in our communities who need it most. And you can bet your bottom dollar that I’m doing the latter.

Before midnight, can I count on you to pitch in $ to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? There’s truly no time to waste, and any amount goes a long way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-aug25?amount=]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-fr-aug25?amount=]

Thank you,

George
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hey Peter, Think for a second: How often do you find yourself recalling one of the many political scandals, divisive speeches, or outright extremist antics that dominate our news cycles? Now think about how many practical, meaningful pieces of legislation have made it through our gridlocked Congress and improved your life or that of those around you since Trump took office. The contrast is stark, isn’t it? We can elect people who gain through division, or we can elect people who are willing to get to work and help the people in our communities who need it most. And you can bet your bottom dollar that I’m doing the latter. Before midnight, can I count on you to pitch in $ to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? There’s truly no time to waste, and any amount goes a long way. [=] DONATE [=] Thank you, George [] [] [] For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] .

name: Jonathan Nez
subject: time and time again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/gyhU7p6sRfMDNNG5zvLFWg~~/AAPPABA~/pnJPYjWBVyCae-hKLiibbyW7OvHn3-GPSyFUqK1NIhse6gszyelPpAuUdv0sPpkQqDI6dUoVbwn5ycYk33aNOHTW4VOldrysDJc28xyblmGhIGia0FdwLVzC18CUoJLjbny050dp4sVv0zKc_ZK2hQ~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/1E5vaO3bRmOFIhHKW5FGCg~~/AAPPABA~/fv_AShHwblgu3PzIuwM4hgMu5Mwee5tEn0BJxZgdDGlcIHCxkMGA7tsxSWp6d_xC6mipDtHQad3q4WYQhk5Mwv7ISkYvs0KxCeGzr_dMlv37dGIOwJxehaKtEQeOAwt3AmKyoZM3wNLQs_9COo-ONIlmJE59ddZqyddnz7yWj17CGahKnWQkxf2P2hIoMiSQ7Pa3y711lvfEfJEmrFXpQw~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/YhII_AuMTGtZgrLogp0S0g~~/AAPPABA~/mSxXRTE513ypDx3jjdi1GRSa7j0pqGMtyUvkYQqyNBzTBUvW7mTwMylKtY8E1JWFYHVVhU5rc21zBChoN51RXQ3NZw3m5uNS3Llo6ucpRXQR8Ie2JHpk_WpGddHOQRhBaSWHYHMB5GWxs6LdANFZ2A~~

We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? ~~ If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. DONATE $10 NOW » DONATE $25 NOW » DONATE $50 NOW » DONATE $100 NOW » DONATE $250 NOW » OTHER » Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona. I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt. I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? ~~ Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose. As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: ~~ DONATE ~~ Thank you so much for your support, Jonathan Nez ~~ DONATE ~ ~ www.tiktok.com/@nezforaz Jonathan Nez for Congress PO Box 1854 Flagstaff, AZ 86002 United States Contributions or gifts to Jonathan Nez for Congress are not tax deductible. subject: Donald Trump is a manchild

body:
At a time when we need a leader with compassion and dignity, we’re dealing with Donald Trump — a manchild who wakes up crying and complaining about something new everyday while millions of people across the country are just trying to make ends meet.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114379547/566832306/-173082340?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQ0NTVjMC1jMjg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MskB2hrmabWtd67aAa7h_5fyWc_Q8mccOcHG7Oydl-s=)

Peter,

At a time when we need a leader with compassion and dignity, we’re dealing with Donald Trump — a manchild who wakes up crying and complaining about something new everyday while millions of people across the country are just trying to make ends meet.
In Minnesota, I’ve fought tooth and nail to support the families Trump is neglecting. And we’ve made progress growing the economy, feeding children, and creating jobs while also making sure everybody’s human rights are protected.
**It’s no wonder that because of our work, Minnesota is one of the best places in America to start a family.**
But, Peter, Trump is trying to roll back that progress with extreme policies that will only make costs rise and hurt our economy.
**To protect our progress and our One Minnesota values, we have to keep speaking out and standing together against Trump’s selfish, reckless agenda. Hitting our end-of-month goal at midnight is a critical next step, but according to my campaign team, we’re still $7,855 short. **

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’ll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We have plenty of reason to continue organizing and growing the resistance.
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
I’ll keep this quick: I’m reaching out personally because my team tells me we’re still about $2,000 short of our August fundraising goal, and there are only a few hours left before the end-of-month deadline.
Can I count on you to pitch in before midnight? Here’s a secure link to make sure your donation goes through instantly:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250831-2**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250831-2?refcode=em20250831-5394&refcode2=5394_420207_XjQ3de&akid=5394%2E420207%2EXjQ3de)
From Trump’s national guard deployments to ICE’s continued terrorizing of immigrant communities, we have plenty of reason to continue organizing and growing the resistance. I’m counting on your support to make sure we have the resources to do it.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250831-5394-footer&t=1&refcode2=5394_420207_XjQ3de&akid=5394%2E420207%2EXjQ3de)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Paid for by Pramila for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5394%2E420207%2EXjQ3de).
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111

body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |

| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – a triple-matched gift of $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: LAST CALL: Respectfully asking before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Ballots will drop in a few weeks...

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there. It's Gavin Newsom. I'm reaching out to respectfully ask you to make a $35 contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California before our August fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight.

I want to stress the importance of this ask: ballots drop in just a few weeks and our opponents have already started paid advertising because one man with a history of giving to extremist causes and candidates has already contributed $20 million to beat us.

Folks... God help us if we're not successful here. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House -- talking to more and more Republican states; they're going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.

[**Will you please make a contribution to my ballot measure committee before midnight? This is moving fast. We will put your donation right to work.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4476?refcode=em250831&t=1&akid=2509%2E4767699%2E270WwE) Gavin Newsom |
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4476?t=2&akid=2509%2E4767699%2E270WwE)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2509%2E4767699%2E270WwE).
Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: Newsom for California – Governor 2022, House Majority PAC, Bill Bloomfield.

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: Let’s push onward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
I wanted to take a moment to thank everyone

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to thank everyone who’s stood with me in recent weeks — **if my race ends up in a more competitive district next year, I’m confident we will win thanks to people like you.**

I know we’ve reached out a lot over the past few days, so let me keep this quick — [**our end-of-month fundraising drive ends tonight at midnight, and your support is so important to helping us reach our goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114379687/566832736/1222002032?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250831_FR_EOM_0_3MO_BeraHQ_NA_NA_9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDY3NGJjMi1jNDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdcaQBLyjzLPH-VYtrMkFnJaxvNRq_Ph1ciITjOQYCs=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114379688/566832737/1222002032?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250831_FR_EOM_0_3MO_BeraHQ_NA_NA_9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDY3NGJjMi1jNDg2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tdcaQBLyjzLPH-VYtrMkFnJaxvNRq_Ph1ciITjOQYCs=)**

— Ami
